Thomas Harriot was a man. He was from England. He lived a long time ago. He was an astronomer. He was also a math person. He studied people and wrote things. People say he found the idea of refraction. Thomas Harriot was also known for other things.

Thomas Harriot was born in 1560 in Oxford, England. He went to a school called St Mary Hall in Oxford. His name is in the school's list from 1577. After school, he learned about finding ways to travel on the sea. He studied navigation. This study was about the big, open sea. It was also about how to cross to the New World. The New World was across the Atlantic Ocean. He used tools like an astrolabe and sextants to help him learn. Then, Harriot went to the Americas. He went with a group in 1585 to Roanoke island. Sir Walter Raleigh paid for this trip. Sir Ralph Lane led the trip. There, he learned a language. This language was from the Carolina Algonquian people. Two Native Americans named Wanchese and Manteo taught him. He could translate the words. This made him very important for the trip. When he came back to England, he worked for the 9th Earl of Northumberland.

Harriot went to Oxford school. He finished his studies in the year 1580. After that, Sir Walter Raleigh hired him. Harriot was a teacher for math. He used his knowledge of stars to help with ships. He helped design Raleigh's boats. He also kept the money count for Raleigh. Before the trip with Raleigh, Harriot wrote a book about sailing. He tried to talk to Manteo and Wanchese. These two people were Native Americans. They were brought to England. Harriot made a simple writing system for their Carolina Algonquian language. Harriot and Manteo spent many days together. Harriot asked Manteo many questions. He asked about life in the New World. Harriot learned many things. These things were good for English people who moved there. He thought that Native Americans were smart. But he thought their tools were not as good. He also thought that Native Americans were very amazed by Europeans.

They saw many things with us. These things were like math tools. They were also like sea compasses. They saw spring clocks. These clocks seemed to run by themselves. Many other things were also strange to them. They could not understand how these things were made. They thought these things were made by gods. They thought they were not made by people. One man went on a trip. This trip was around 1585 to 1586. He went to the New World. He visited Roanoke Island. This island was near North Carolina. He learned more things. He learned about the Carolina Algonquian language. This language was a local talking way. Harriot was very important. He was the only English man who knew this language before the trip. So, he helped the trip to be a success.

A man wrote a book about a trip. The book was called "A Briefe and True Report of the New Found Land of Virginia." This book came out in the year 1588. This report told people about the Native American people. It was very important for later English explorers and settlers. The man wrote that if good rules were used, the people could learn to be good. He also wrote that they could learn the true religion. But later, people mostly forgot his kind words. They paid more attention to the parts about finding shiny rocks and things that could be taken. Harriot helped the trip as a science helper. Raleigh asked him to find a good way. He needed to stack cannonballs on the ship deck. He made a theory about packing them tightly.

Harriot worked for many years. His boss was Henry Percy. He was the 9th Earl of Northumberland. Harriot lived at Syon House. Henry Percy's cousin, Thomas Percy, ran the house. The Duke had many smart people around him. This was better than Raleigh's help. In the year 1595, the Duke of Northumberland gave land in Durham to Harriot. This helped Harriot move up in life. He became part of the land-owning people. Soon after, the Duke gave Harriot a house at Syon. He let Harriot work on light and how light bends. Harriot's helpers started to lose favor. Raleigh was the first one to lose favor. Then, Henry Percy, the Earl of Northumberland, was put in jail in 1605. This was because of the Gunpowder Plot. He was close to a plotter named Thomas Percy. Harriot himself was also in trouble.

Harriot kept working on stars. He studied astronomy. In the year 1607, Harriot used his notes. These notes were from seeing Halley's Comet from Ilfracombe. He used them to learn more about the comet's path. Soon after, in 1609 and 1610, Harriot looked at the Moon. He also looked at sunspots. In early 1609, he bought a "Dutch trunke." This was a telescope. It was made in 1608. His looks at the sky were some of the first times to use a telescope for stars. Harriot is known as the first astronomer. He drew a picture of a star object after seeing it through a telescope. He drew a map of the Moon on August 5, 1609. This was months before Galileo did. By 1613, Harriot made two maps of the whole Moon. These maps showed many parts. These parts were like lunar craters. He drew them in the right places.

In 1614, Harriot saw a doctor. This doctor was Théodore de Mayerne. He was a doctor for King James I. Harriot had a problem. It was a sickness in his left nose. This sickness ate the wall inside his nose. It was also linked to a sore on his lip. This got worse. In 1621, he lived with a friend. His friend was named Thomas Buckner. They lived on Threadneedle Street. He died there. People thought it was skin cancer. Some people thought that smoking too much tobacco caused the cancer. Harriot died on July 2, 1621. This was three days after he wrote his will. Henry Stevens found his will. His helpers printed his book later. The book was about algebra. Nathaniel Torporley was supposed to help with the book. But Walter Warner fixed the book. The book is a small collection of his work. It does not have all his writings. He left many more writings.

Thomas Harriot was buried in a church. This church was near where he passed away. The church got hurt in the Great Fire of London. Later, they took it down in 1781. Thomas Harriot was a man. He saw sunspots in 1610. He used a telescope to look at the sunspots. Looking at the sun was very dangerous. But Harriot looked at it directly. His eyes did not get hurt. A man named Nisan Samuel was born in 1812. He lived in a town called Vinooty. He was from a well-known Jewish family there. He had to leave his home country. He left because people were mean to him. He traveled across the land. There, a man called Baron Rothschild became his friend. First, he lived in London. There, he met a Jewish man. This man changed his faith to Christianity. Samuel got interested in Christianity too. So, he became Christian himself. He started going to the Established Church. At this time, he changed his name. He became Edward Samuel. In the early 1840s, he looked into Nonconformism. People asked him to speak at small groups. These groups were Independents and Strict Baptists. He was also baptized around this time. In 1844, he was asked to speak in Farnham. A group of people met there. They did not belong to one church group. They asked him to lead them. He made it a real church, following Strict Baptist ways. A year later, Samuel left. He became a pastor in Hitchin. He wrote a book called The Triumph of Christ on the Cross. He also wrote about his own life and change of heart. He worked with the Strict Baptist group in Sleaford for many years. The church kept meeting in a small room. This room was said to have many pigeons. In 1850, George Turner became the pastor. He planned to build a new chapel. The church bought land on Bear Lane. They built a chapel that held 250 people. The first service was held on April 9, 1853.

The chapel was special. It was given a Grade II listing on December 29, 1972. This means it is a building that is "nationally important and of special interest." In 2001, it was one of many such buildings in Waverley. Park Lane Chapel is a small chapel. It was built for Strict Baptists. This happened in the early to middle years of the 1800s. The chapel has stone walls. The front part is covered with stucco. The door is set back under a porch. There is a small stone with a date on the front. Above the door, there is a rose window and a pediment. The roof has flat, overlapping stones called slates. There are two windows on each side. These windows are made with red brick. Inside, it was built on one floor. The outside walls and iron fences are also part of the listing. Separately, Shefqet Kastrati is a man. He is from Albania. He started the Kastrati Group. This group is a big business in Albania. He has money in energy, building, and travel. He is seen as a big helper for Albania's money growth. He is one of the richest people in Albania.

Shefqet Kastrati was born in 1961 in a place called Albania. He started his work in business. This was after the old government ended. In 1991, he opened his first fuel station. This was the start of the Kastrati Group. The Kastrati Group is a big company. It has many kinds of businesses in over 12 areas. Kastrati helped make many things better in Albania. He helped many people in the private business part. Another company is RxAll Inc. This company uses technology for health. It helps with medicine rules. It stops fake medicines. RxAll Inc. had money problems in 2017. But the team kept trying. They got money from the Nigerian government. They also got help from other groups.

RxScanner is a small tool. It helps people check if their medicine is real. It helps medicine helpers too. This helps them keep good records. It also helps them catch bad people. Many places use this tool. Country FDAs, hospitals, and drug stores use it. It uses AI to check the drug's tiny print. This print tells if the drug is real. It helps stop deaths from fake medicines. It works even if there is no internet. It sends answers to a phone app. So, it works in hospitals and stores. RxAll POS is a program for drug stores. It helps run the store very easily. RxAll Delivered lets people order real drugs online. Then, it brings them to the store. The company has gone to many places. They are in East Africa. They are in West Africa. They are in Southeast Asia. They are in the Americas. The company won a big award in 2019. The Adair County Courthouse is a old building. It is in Iowa, United States. People listed it as a historic place. It is the third building for county courts there.

Long ago, the first courthouse was in Fontanelle. It was a two-story house made of wood. When the town center moved to Greenfield, the old building changed jobs. It was used as a school. It was also a church. It was a meeting hall. It was a town hall. Later, a big fire burned it down in 1910. Then, a new two-story courthouse was built in Greenfield. This new one burned down in 1889. The work moved to a nearby place. A new building was built for the courthouse. The stone for the current courthouse was put down on July 4, 1891. This building was made of brick. It cost a lot of money. In 2024, a big tornado hit Greenfield. This tornado almost hit the Adair County courthouse. The courthouse is a brick building. It has a strong base made of limestone. It has a roof on top. The building is important. It shows the power of the county government. Semih Güler is a football player. He plays for a team called Kayserispor.

The movie's look used many pans and zooms. It also had sudden scene changes. The art style came from old drawings. These drawings were from the 1800s. John Leech drew the story first. Milo Winter also drew pictures for the 1930s book. The film felt very dark. It had many shadows. Some people thought it was the scariest movie of the Dickens story. It first came on TV in 1971. A man named Robert Keeling said a film was very good. He liked its strange and beautiful pictures. The story is about a manga called Yomawari Sensei. This manga is about real life. He teaches at a night school in Yokohama. At night, he helps young people. These young people are in trouble. They might be runaways or struggling with drugs. He gives them help and support. Wills Township is a place. It is one of nineteen towns in Guernsey County. This county is in Ohio. Ohio is in the United States. In 2020, 1,521 people lived there. It is in the east part of the county. It touches other towns. Two small towns are in Wills Township. One is Lore City. It is in the south-west corner. The other is Old Washington. It is in the west. Wills Township started in 1810. It is the only Wills Township in the whole state. A board of three people rules it. These people are called trustees. People vote for them in November. They work for four years. They start their job on January 1. Another person is the township fiscal officer. This person also works for four years. They start on April 1. Ambleny is a town in France. The Ru de Retz is a water path. It is part of the edge of a town. It flows north through the town. Then it goes to the Aisne river. This river is north of the town. The Ru de Retz then flows west. It joins the Oise river in a place called Compiègne. The Quenneton stream joins the Ru de Retz. This happens south of the town. It is at the edge of the town from the west. Lori Alan Denniberg is an actress from America. She plays a role as Pearl Krabs. This is from the cartoon show SpongeBob SquarePants. She also voices other characters. Her mother is a Southern Baptist. Her father is Jewish. Both of her parents were performers. They helped her want to be an actress. She started acting when she was five years old. She graduated from New York University. She helps animals. She speaks against hurting animals. She supports groups that help dogs and cats. She is also on the board of Pickle Pants Rescue.

Alan has made voices for many years. She has worked with her voice for over thirty years. To find the real feeling of a character, she likes to make things up. She also learns to trust her own choices. Alan voices Pearl Krabs on SpongeBob SquarePants. She voices Sue Richards, who is the Invisible Woman. She also voices Diane Simmons on Family Guy. She voices The Boss in the Metal Gear game. Lori has done voices in big movies. She worked on Toy Story 3 and Inside Out. She also worked on SpongeBob SquarePants films. She did voices for Henry Hugglemonster and Animaniacs. Alan's voice for The Boss was called a great acting job. In 2005, she helped voice ads with big stars. In 2014, she won a Voice Arts Award. Alan has been on TV in many shows. She was in Desperate Housewives. She was also in CSI and Law & Order. On stage, she acted in shows. She was in The Pee-wee Herman Show. Churchs Ferry is a small place. It is in Ramsey County, North Dakota. A big lake called Devils Lake is near there. The town had few people. It was a city since 1883. But it was not a city anymore. This happened in September 2022. The name came from a man named Irvine Church. He ran a ferry on Devils Lake. A steamboat also went on the water. The lake started to get smaller after 1900. It got too shallow for big boats. A dry time called the Dust Bowl made the lake even smaller. By 1940, it was just a small puddle. The lake started to get better in the 1900s. People could play there again by the 1970s. The lake started to rise in the 1990s. Many houses near the lake were moved or broke. This included much of Churchs Ferry. The town voted to stop being a city. The last mayor was Paul Christenson. The city really stopped on September 1, 2022.

A little town was small. It was 0.43 square miles in size. In 2010, there were 12 people there. There were 5 homes. And there were 5 families. The town had 100.0% White people. Most people lived in married couples. The average home had 2.40 people. The middle age of the people was 48.5 years. Some people were young. Some people were middle-aged. Many people were between 45 and 64 years old. The town had equal numbers of boys and girls. In 2000, things were different. There were 77 people then. There were 33 homes. The town was more crowded then. The town was still 100.00% White. Some homes had children. Some homes were not just one person. The average home size was 2.33 people.

The city has many people. Some are young. Some are grown-ups. Most people are between 45 and 64 years old. The middle age is 48 years. For every 100 women, there are about 103 men. The average money for a house is $33,438. The average money for a family is $60,313. A man’s average money is $30,625. A woman’s average money is $33,750. No one in the city is poor. A train called Amtrak’s Empire Builder goes by. It goes between Seattle/Portland and Chicago. But the train does not stop in this town. The closest train stop is in Devils Lake. Emmanuel Pahud is a man who plays the flute. He is from Switzerland. He learned to play the flute when he was a small boy. He studied with many great flute players. He trained at a school in Paris. Then, he joined a big music group in 1992. He plays many kinds of music well.

Playing was a big part of Emmanuel Pahud's life since he was born. His family moved a lot. His dad worked for a US company. This made him know many places. When he was a baby, his parents moved to Baghdad for one year. Then, they moved to Paris when he was one. In 1972, they went to Madrid for two years. Later, in 1974, they lived in Rome for four years. In Rome, the Binet family lived nearby. They had four kids who played music. His dad, François, played the flute. When Emmanuel was four, he first heard the flute. His older brother played Mozart's Flute Concerto No. 1. This started something big for Emmanuel. He said he heard the flute, the violin, and the piano. He wanted to play the flute. He wanted to play the Mozart concerto. A neighbor also helped him. The neighbor's son played the flute. Emmanuel listened to him. He learned that the music was by Mozart.

Pahud became the main flute player at the Berlin Philharmonic Orchestra. This was a big, famous place. He joined when the old players were getting old and leaving. Many spots needed new players to try out for. Before him, a man named Karlheinz Zöller played that job. Other famous flutists played that job too. Pahud said that playing there was special. The whole group of musicians worked together very well. He said the music had a beautiful feeling. It was different from other orchestras. At age 22, he was the youngest player. He went away for a time. Then, in 2002, he came back. Sir Simon Rattle was the conductor. Pahud said Rattle is smart. He knows the orchestra very well. He helps the musicians do what they want. This makes the orchestra feel like a team.

The Berlin Philharmonic is a big group of musicians. They feel very independent. In 2007, a man named Pahud was voted onto the Media Vorstand. He played the main flute. He shared this job with Mathieu Dufour. Dufour left in 2022. Then, Sébastian Jacot took the job. Pahud works much more now. When he started in 1992, he played about 50 concerts a year. Now, he plays about 160 concerts. This is in an average year. This means 90 solo or small group music shows. It also means 75 big orchestra shows. This is twice the work many musicians do. Pahud says he keeps a good balance. This stops him from playing only one type of music. In 1993, Pahud started playing in other countries. He played with big famous groups. These included the London Symphony Orchestra. He also played with the Yomiuri Nippon Symphony Orchestra. He plays at big music times in Europe, the US, and Asia. He also played with the Australian Chamber Orchestra in 2005–2006. They played Vivaldi Flute Concertos.

Pahud is a musician who plays in small groups. He has played in many places. These places are in Europe, North America, and Japan. He played with pianists like Éric Le Sage and Stephen Kovacevich. He also played in a group with a flute, a violin, a viola, and a cello. They made a record in 1999. In 1993, he helped start a festival. The festival is called Le festival de l'Empéri. It is in a place called Salon-de-Provence, France. Pahud said the festival is fun. People like it very much. He said the festival is a place to try new music. It is a place to take chances. He likes to mix different artists and different music. Pahud has played many times with pianist Éric Le Sage. In 2008, he played at the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival. He played a new piece called Elliott Carter's Flute Concerto. He went back to the festival in 2009. Pahud said he can change his music style a lot. He is like a chameleon. He tries to match the music's color. This means he tries to play what the music needs.

We talked about how to use an instrument. It has many sounds. You can blow on it. You can use it like a trumpet. You can use it like a recorder. The fun part is mixing the sounds. You make them connect. This makes one musical piece. In March 2008, Pahud played a new song. This song was for a flute and a string group. Another new song was by Elliott Carter. Pahud played this in 2008. This was for the BPO, Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival, and the Boston Symphony Orchestra. Pahud will play another new song in 2010. He likes new music. But he is most happy with old music. He says that learning new things helps him. It helps him keep music moving. He thinks music must mix old ways and new ideas. But he thinks "tradition" can sometimes hide the past. It can mean not changing.

In talks, Pahud talks about music. He talks about "phrasing." A phrase in music is like a small piece of music. It is part of a song's tune. Think of it like a line in a poem. It does not feel finished by itself. Usually, two or more phrases work together. This is like how words make a sentence. Musical phrasing is also about how the music sounds when played. For the Dalbavie concerto, Pahud showed how the flute sounds good with the big band. He kept the flute sound bright and lovely. Pahud also talked about Jarrell's poem style. He said some music feels deep. This feeling is hard to say with just words. He liked that feeling in the music. When talking about Jean-Pierre Rampal, Pahud said he was special. Rampal made the flute sound new and grand. He played long phrases. It was like the music had no end. Pahud started with jazz. He met and worked with jazz pianist Jacky Terrasson. He likes jazz flutists like James Newton. He played big band music with friends. His work with Jacky Terrasson was good.

When people see Pahud play, it is not just for fun. Pahud wants people to learn about music. His shows are about feeling many different things. He wants to talk with the audience. He wants to help you think about the music. He wants to give you chances to be curious. This helps you learn more about music. In 1996, he made a special deal with EMI Classics. He was the only flutist to have this big record deal. Pahud helped make many flute songs we hear now. Now, he spends much time recording. He added his contract with EMI for six more years. Recording is fun for him. It lets him work close to the microphone. This is different from playing live. When he plays live, he has people watching him. When recording, he must be very careful with small things. He must also make the music feel very strong. Pahud has made and worked on 24 music discs for EMI.

Pahud played flutes. First, his flute was silver. His mom and dad bought him two more flutes. One was partly made by hand. The other was all made by hand. Before that, he played a golden flute. He got this flute in 1989. He bought it in Boston. He used money he won in contests. Two weeks later, he bought a special part for the flute. This part was from Dana Sheridan. Pahud liked the Brannen flute body. He liked it because it had a good Cooper scale. This scale was made by Albert Cooper. He said the flute is very good. It helps him play what he thinks and feels. But he said the player is the most important. The player must work with their muscles. They must control their breath. They use their body to make the sound better. Now, Pahud plays a solid 14-karat Haynes flute. He used to play a Brannen-Cooper flute. This was from 1989 to 2012. Miguel de Oquendo y Segura was a man. He was a Spanish Navy officer. He was born in 1534. He died at sea in 1588. He was returning from a big trip. He was the father of Admiral Antonio de Oquendo.

This story is about a player named Linda Brigitta Sembrant. She is a woman who played football. She is from Sweden. She used to play as a center back. This means she played at the back of the team. She started playing at SK Servia. Then, she played with Bälinge IF. When she was small, she liked a player named Henrik Larsson. But she chose to be a defender. She played in England with Lincoln Ladies in 2006-2007. After that, she went to AIK in 2008. In 2010, she went to Kopparbergs/Göteborg FC. Then, she moved to Tyresö FF. In 2012, her team won a big game. But she got hurt and could not play at the end. Later, she went to a club in France called Montpellier. Then, in 2019, she went to Italy to play for Juventus. In 2024, she played for Bayern Munich. She won many awards there. She scored three goals in 31 games. After that, she signed with AIK Stockholm again. She will play there until December 2026.

Sembrant played for Sweden in many games. She won her first big game for Sweden in 2008. She could not play in the Euro 2009 game because of a hurt. In 2011, she was called to the team for the World Cup in Germany. She stayed on the team for the 2012 London Olympics. When she played her 50th game, she scored a goal for Sweden. This was in a game against Canada in 2014. She scored for Sweden at the 2019 World Cup. She played in the 2023 World Cup too. Later, in 2025, it was said that she was leaving the team. Sembrant is with a player named Lisa Boattin. The other part talks about bees and flowers. Bees like to visit flowers that are common. This is called frequency-dependent foraging. It means they pick flowers based on how many of them are around. This is different from looking at how many flowers there are in a small space. Bees still like common flowers even if there are lots of flowers.

Flowers have colors, shapes, sizes, and smells. These things help bring in helpers called pollinators. Pollinators learn that these flower signals mean a sweet reward. Pollinators are very important. They move pollen from one flower to another. This helps the flowers make seeds. If pollinators like one type of flower more, that flower type will become more common. This is called directional selection. If pollinators like rare flower types, it keeps many different flower types alive. This is called balancing selection. Charles Darwin thought about this long ago. He wondered why some orchids tricked the insects. Later, Donald Levin said that how often a flower type appears matters a lot. Now, people study why some flowers give no reward. They still get visited. Scientists use tests with fake flowers. They show two or more colored discs. They arrange these discs in different ways and amounts. This helps them see how much pollinators like one type over another.

Bumblebees are good to study. They like to look for food for a long time. Scientists studied how they look for food. They used two types of flowers. These flowers had different colors or types. When the food was the same in both types, the bees liked the most common type. This was true for many kinds of sweet liquid (nectar). But, if one flower type had different amounts of nectar, this rule changed. If both flower types had no good food, the bees liked the rare type more. Even though this happens, the preference is not the same for all colors. For example, blue and yellow flowers were tested. The bees liked the common type when food was there. But, the bees needed a bigger change in yellow to blue than blue to yellow. Bees like blue flowers very much. This is because blue stands out to bees against green. But, this blue liking was less strong when both flowers had lots of nectar. So, we must look at two things. We must look at the commonness of the flower. We must also look at the natural liking for a color. This helps us know how the bees choose where to go.

Scientists looked at bees and flowers. They found mixed results. Some studies showed bees like common flower colors. But other studies saw no clear pattern in where bees visited. This difference might happen because lab tests use very bright, different colors. In the real world, colors are not so different. This makes the "frequency-dependence" weaker outside. Also, in nature, many good things about a flower can be linked to each other. So, just looking at one color is not enough. The bees need to visit many flowers to see a pattern. Therefore, we must look at big areas of flowers. We need to check over large places. Some studies found butterflies like common flower shapes. This was because rare shapes had fewer seeds. Visiting common shapes is good if they give more food. But if rare shapes have the same good food, it is strange that bees skip them. Many ideas try to explain why the bees visit the way they do.

Big animals that hunt often like to catch the most common kind of food. One idea says that if you see a certain food a lot, your eyes get better at seeing it. Flower and bug helpers are different from hunters and hunted. For the bug helper, finding the flower is good for both. But, some think that bugs can only remember a little bit. This might make finding many types of flowers hard. This makes flower help a bit like hunting. Even if flowers look bright, their colors can look like the leaves around them. Bugs that are good at seeing one type of flower will search faster. Studies show that visiting more flowers makes the bug remember better. This means it is something they learn slowly. Other ideas talk about time spent looking. They say there is a trade-off. You must choose between looking long or finding food fast. When there are many flowers, the bug still likes the common kind. This fits with the ideas about search time. Bees go slower when there are many flowers. So, they can see yellow flowers better when they move slowly.

Scientists studied other bugs. They learned that bugs can search for food for a long time. This liking for food happens after seeing only a few types of flowers. If they see two good types of flowers, the bug might only pick one type. It will stay on that one type for a while. Then, it will switch to the other type. It will keep going back and forth. This idea is called the switching attention hypothesis. The bug might pick the most common flower first. It does not need to learn this. It is just likely because the common flowers are more often seen. Pollinators will pick the common flowers first just by chance. They will keep visiting these common flowers. If the flowers do not give sweet juice (nectar), the bugs might pick different types. This makes the bugs meet different kinds of flowers. But, tricky flowers might not have babies. This is because the bugs will learn to go away from bad flowers. Some say that bad flowers stay because new bugs visit them. Because the bugs cannot tell good from bad before landing, they must visit a few times first. This helps them learn. If the good flower type is not there, the bugs might go to bad flowers. This happens if the bad flowers look like good ones. But, the bug should learn that these bad flowers have no reward. Then, the bug will avoid them next time.

Some ideas say that only silly bugs visit tricky flowers. A different idea says something else. It says that when a bug visits a flower with no treat, the bug remembers it. This memory is for a short time. So, the bug goes to a different kind of flower next time. If these tricky flowers are not seen often, the bug forgets about them. Studies show that how many bad flowers a bug sees depends on how often those flowers are around. For example, some tricky orchids need to be rare to have babies. These two ideas are not against each other. Bugs that visit the easy flowers are also likely to be rare compared to the good flowers. If bugs visit common flowers often, they will only meet others like them. Rare flowers might have trouble having babies. This can make the plant's genes weak. Climate change makes plants bloom early. But, for plants that need bugs to visit, the timing of the bugs is very important. The first flowers to bloom will be rare. This is because most of their brothers and sisters have not bloomed yet.

Some animals can mix in a place. This place has many different looks. Some helpers, like bees, like to visit the common looks. They do not often visit the rare looks. This keeps the animals from mixing their genes too much. The Philemon Sage House is an old house. It is at 69 Sandy Brook Turnpike in Sandisfield, Massachusetts. It was built in 1799. It was made bigger in 1827. It shows Federal style building. People put it on a big list in 1982. The house is in the country. It has wood walls. It has a front that looks balanced. The front has a door in the middle. There are windows next to the door. The inside keeps old things. These things include old doors and floors. The land also has old parts of a barn. An old place for making leather was there too. Philemon Sage built the first part in 1799. He was a good farmer. He also ran a place for cheese. He worked at the post office in this house. He built the main part in 1827. This was for his big family.

Castell'Arquato is a town in Italy. It is in a place called Val D’Arda. This town is near Piacenza and Parma. People call it one of the most beautiful villages in Italy. The old part of the town looks like it did in the 10th century. It is built on a high rock. This rock was once very important for watching the valley. Today, the village surrounds it. Its pretty, old parts have been seen in movies. A famous writer named Luigi Illica was born here in 1857. He is also buried here. This place is also good for growing grapes. They make special wines there. Some wines are called Gutturnio and Bonarda. People think this town started as a Roman army camp. Later, it grew into a small town. It was good because it watched the roads from Piacenza and Parma. These roads went toward the sea.

Long ago, in the 8th century, people started writing about Castell’Arquato. A strong and good lord named Magnus built a castle there. He also built a church. This church was for the Mother of God. At that time, Castell’Arquato had a place for soldiers. It also had a place for farms. It had a place for law and rules. And it had a place for church things. When Magnus died in 789, he gave the town and the church to a bishop. This made Castell’Arquato a Pieve. The bishop could collect taxes from everyone there. Later, the Bishop of Piacenza chose Castell’Arquato as his home. The town became more free. In the summer of 1220, the town got official rule for itself. A bishop gave his land to the town people. He gave it as a fiefdom for 700 coins. For a little more money, he gave them all the rules and taxes for many places. The town was ruled by a podestà. This person was chosen by the town people. The podestà helped with laws and government. He worked for three years.

The rule of the podestà stopped in 1290. Alberto Scotti became the lord of Piacenza. He got help from the Guelph group and the shop owners. Castell’Arquato also became its own small kingdom. Alberto Scotti joined with the Visconti family. He made his power bigger in Piacenza. He gave Castell’Arquato to the podestà Tedesio de' Spectinis. This friendship with the Visconti ended in 1302. Galeazzo I Visconti, who was Matteo Visconti's son, married Beatrice d'Este. This changed things. It started a time of fighting. The fighting brought the Scotti to Milan. When the Scotti were in charge, Castell’Arquato gained respect. Many buildings were made then. You can still see the Podestà's Palace and the Court of Justice today. In 1304, the city of Piacenza kicked Alberto Scotti out. But he came back three years later. When the German emperor Henry VII came in 1310, Alberto Scotti ruled until 1316. Galeazzo I Visconti then surrounded Castell’Arquato. The town gave up after one year. Galeazzo Visconti let the town have special rights. These rights let it make its own laws. This started the laws of the 15th century. In 1324, the town went to the town of Piacenza. The Church was in charge of Piacenza. Piacenza went back to the Visconti in 1336. Azzone Visconti helped the town be free from Piacenza. He put a trusted podestà named Galvagno de' Comini. He also helped make the area strong.

A long time ago, in 1403, a man named Gian Galeazzo Visconti gave power to the Borromeo de' Borromei family. They had power over a place called Castell’Arquato. The Arcilli family was strong. So, the Borromeo family gave their rights back to the people of Arquato. The people then gave these rights to Filippo Maria Visconti. From 1416 to 1470, the town was called Castel Visconti. In 1438, Filippo Maria Visconti gave the power to a soldier named Niccolò Piccinino. He made rules for the town. Later, the village went to his sons. After Filippo Maria Visconti died, his son-in-law, Francesco I Sforza, became lord of Piacenza in 1447. In 1541, Pope Paul III said the village was free. He came to see it in 1543. People were happy for this freedom. The Sforza family ruled until 1707. Then, the land went to the Duchy of Parma and Piacenza. Later, the House of Bourbon ruled there. Finally, it joined Italy in 1860. Today, the shield shows these changes. It has the castle. It also has signs for Piacenza, the Farnese, the Scotti, and the Sforza. The castle has old music books. These books are from about the 16th century. They are for instruments like the harpsichord.

This text talks about a few different things. First, it mentions a music piece called "Al Milanese." This piece has a royal sound. Then, it talks about Twin Lakes. Twin Lakes is in Lake Clark National Park in Alaska. It is a place with two big lakes. One lake is six miles long. The other lake is four miles long. A small stream joins them. The lakes water goes to the Chilikadrotna River. This place is very far away. People do not live there. Only hunters visit in the late summer. A man named Richard Proenneke lived there. He lived there for many years. He built a small house by himself. You can only get to Twin Lakes by a small plane or air taxi. The text also mentions Rob Davis. He was a politician from Canada. He worked on the City of York council. He was the first Black city council member there. He also served on the Toronto City Council.

Rob Davis is a person who lived in Toronto. He was born and grew up in Toronto, Ontario. He was a Student Council President at St. Michael's College School. He went to York University to study political science. In 1991, he was one of six new city council members. People voted for him in the city election. He was very young when he became an elected helper. He was re-elected to the York council in 1994. He worked on many city groups. In 1997, he helped manage the city's money. Then, the City of York became the big City of Toronto. Davis was elected to Toronto City Council in 1997. He helped start a plan to stop crime in the city. In 2000, he helped make a program. This program let people give up a gun. They got fifty dollars for giving up the gun.

Davis was a council helper. He was on the right side. He helped Mayor Mel Lastman. In 1999, he wanted to take away Howard Moscoe's job as TTC chair. In 1998, Davis voted against benefits for city workers who liked the same sex. Before the 2000 election, the city parts changed. Davis lost his job in Ward 21. Joe Mihevc beat him by many votes. He tried to go back to council in 2003. He ran in Ward 33. Shelley Carroll beat him by a small amount. In 2003, Davis supported helping renters. He also supported keeping rent control. He also supported money for the TTC. He said his party did not agree with these things. After leaving council, he worked for other people. In 2004, he helped a march for Police Chief Julian Fantino. In 2008, he took a job when Christine Nunziata left. In 2010, Davis became a helper for the school board. He said the board needed to be honest. His first big idea was to make a new honesty helper.

Davis ran for a job in Toronto. This was in the year 2010. He wanted to take the place of a man named Howard Moscoe. Later, in 2023, Davis ran to be the mayor of Toronto. But he did not win. He came in 22nd place. Another thing is a song. The song is called "The Meaning of Life." A band named the Offspring made this song. They put it on their album. The song came out in 1997. A music video was made for the song. Kevin Kerslake made the video. The video shows a fast race in a wheel chair in the desert. It also shows a singer hanging upside down in a tree with a monkey. Michelle La Rue is a scientist. She studies nature. She works with animals in the cold places. She looks at pictures from space, called satellite imagery. She studies penguins and seals. She has gone to Antarctica many times. She learned science at Minnesota State University. There, she studied how bats eat. She looked at bugs in the droppings. She also studied groups of deer.

She learned a Master's degree in Zoology. She went to Southern Illinois University Carbondale. There, she studied where cougars live and how they move. She also has a doctorate in Conservation Biology from the University of Minnesota. This let her use special pictures from space. She studied animal groups, where they live, and what keeps polar animals safe. In December 2025, she became a full professor at the University of Canterbury. In 2022, she got a special award. This let her study seals and penguins in Antarctica. Another place is the Pablo Casals Museum. It is in Old San Juan, Puerto Rico. This museum is for Pablo Casals. He was a great musician. He lived there and wrote his best song. The museum has his things. It has his cello, pictures, and music tools. A chapel is called the Jane E. Putnam Memorial Chapel. It is in Eau Claire, Wisconsin. It was built in 1908. Jane E. Balcolm was born in 1832. She moved to Eau Claire in 1857. She married Henry C. Putnam in 1858. He came to Wisconsin from New York. He checked the pine lands for people. He was a very good land seller.

A kind couple helped their town. They helped pay for the First Presbyterian Church in 1857. Jane also helped make Eau Claire's first public library in 1875. Before Jane passed away in 1907, she wished for a small chapel. This chapel was for the people of Eau Claire. They would use it for church services. They would also put bodies there when the ground was frozen in winter. The year after Jane died, Henry got a piece of land. This land was in Forest Hill Cemetery. He built the chapel there. The chapel is a one-story building. It has a steep roof. It looks like a Neogothic style. Its walls are made of rough stone. The doors and windows are tall and pointed. Two wood doors are behind iron gates at the front. The roof has red tiles. At the back, there is an extra room. Inside, a path goes down the middle. On one wall, there is a simple fireplace. Under the floor, there are places for bones. Seven Putnams are in the crypts on one side. Jane and Henry are also there. The back room used to hold bodies in winter. Now, the chapel is mainly used for keeping things.

The show Baddies, called Baddies East, started on September 17, 2023. It was filmed in the East part of the USA. This included cities like Atlanta, Charlotte, and New Orleans. The show also went to Jamaica for a trip. After the show, there was a special reunion. This special was hosted by John and Nene Leakes. It came out between February 11 and February 25, 2024. Some people were not at the reunion. Brown, Chrisean Malone, Sherman, and Waldrip were not there. Malone said she would not come back to the show. Waldrip did not go because of legal things she was doing to Malone and the Zeus Network. Camilla Poindexter, Kissen, and Mayham left the reunion after they fought. DJ Sky High Baby was at the reunion. On August 14, 2023, some people said Victoria Waldrip, also called Woah Vicky, might press charges against Chrisean Malone. This was for a fight. Waldrip's team said she had a rule. This rule stopped any touching while filming. Later, Waldrip put a long video online. In the video, she said Malone set her up. She also said Malone threw something at her. Another person named "Smiley" shared secrets. These secrets were some lies. They were also some true things about the show's workers and cast members. This caused big trouble.

This is the last time to see Chrisean Rock and Stunna Girl in this show. Chrisean Rock will come back later. She will be a 'Special Guest' on "Baddies Mid-west". She will talk with an old friend named 'Tesehki'. They will try to fix old problems. This talk ends with crying and yelling. Stunna Girl will also come back. She will be a 'Special Guest' on "Baddies Africa". She will talk with another old friend named 'Ahna Mac'. They will try to fix problems too. But this talk gets physical right away. It ends with many fights and hurts. Now, let's talk about a place. Isabela barrio-pueblo is a town part of Puerto Rico. It was home to about 7,826 people in 2010. Like in Spain, this town has a 'pueblo' part. This area has a big open space. It also has the town office and a church. Every year, they have big town festivals there. This big square is where people meet. They gather there for fun all day and night. Old Spanish rules said this square was for parties. The rules also said the square must be big enough for all the neighbors. These rules also said the streets near the square must be nice walkways. These walkways should keep people safe from the sun and the rain.

In Isabela barrio-pueblo, there is a fun place called the Manuel Corchado y Juarb plaza. Near it is a church. The church is named Parroquia San Antonio de Padua. People call it Anthony of Padua Roman Catholic parish church. This church was built a long time ago. It was built between 1819 and 1824. A big shake, the 1918 San Fermín earthquake, hurt the church. Now, the church is made of strong concrete. People finished the current church in 1924. They last fixed it in 1998. Isabela barrio-pueblo was in Spain's list. This changed after a war. Spain gave it to the United States. In 1899, the U.S. counted the people there. They found that the people in Pueblo number 881. The Bumping River is another place. It flows into the Naches River. It flows down the east side of the Cascade Range. It goes through Wenatchee National Forest. It also goes through the William O. Douglas Wilderness. The river starts at Fish Lake. It flows to Bumping Lake. A dam makes the lake bigger. The river keeps flowing after the dam. The American River joins it. Then, it makes the Naches River. The Bumping River is part of the big Columbia River basin.

Stockmen said that the river got its name for a reason. This reason is because big rocks moved down the river. During a freshet, these rocks bumped together. The bumping made a loud, rumbling sound. The United States Geological Survey (USGS) has other names for this river. These names are Tancum River and Tanum River. For Indonesians, an ID card is very important. This card is needed for all citizens and people who live there. You get this card when you are 17 years old or when you get married. For Indonesian people, this card lasts for life now. Before, it only lasted for 5 years for people under 60. For people who are not Indonesian, the card lasts as long as their stay paper lets them. Since 2011, the government made an electronic card. This is called the e-KTP. It has a small chip inside. A long time ago, during the Dutch time, the ID card was called a residence certificate. This old card did not write down a person's religion. People needed to talk to a local controller. They also had to pay money for this. The paper card was small. It was signed by local leaders. Chinese people also needed two other papers. These were an entry permit and a residency permit.

A Japanese ID card was used from 1942 to 1945. This card was made of paper. It had Japanese and Indonesian words. It also had messages that made people agree with the Japanese. After Indonesia became free in 1945, they used a new paper card. This was the Indonesian Citizenship Certificate. It was used from 1945 to 1977. This card had no plastic covering. The card changed over time. Some areas made different cards. Then, in 1976, they made the cards look the same everywhere. During a time called the New Order, special codes were put on cards. These codes showed if a person was a former prisoner or Chinese. Later, they stopped using these special codes. The KTP card was made of paper. It was covered in plastic. It had a photo, a sign, a number, and a thumb print. Sometimes the background color was yellow. When Aceh was in a special time in 2003, its card was different. It had red and white colors. It also had a picture of a garuda bird.

A special card called e-KTP was made. A picture of the person was printed right on the plastic card. This card had the person's thumb print and a special number. The e-KTP was first tested in six places in 2009. Then, it started everywhere in 2011. This card is meant to last a long time. It has a tiny chip inside. It also has a unique number. You can use it for many government things. Some people said that cheating (corruption) made it bad. In May 2013, people found out that copying the card many times could break the chip. The e-KTP holds special body marks (biometric data). It was made to make government help better. It also helps stop cheating and keep things safe. This card is the base for getting Indonesian passports. It is also used for driving licenses (SIM). It is for tax numbers (NPWP). It is for land papers and other ID cards. To make the e-KTP, they take prints from all ten fingers. But the chip only keeps the right thumb and index finger prints. The card has nine layers to keep it safe. A chip is put between two layers. This chip has an antenna. When you swipe it, it sends a wave. A machine reads this wave. This proves that the right person has the card. The card size is like a regular credit card.

Indonesia made a big ID card called e-KTP. Many people used it. It reached 100 million people in less than one year. This ID data does not end. Indonesia has many groups and languages. Some groups, like Javanese people, do not use a family name. So, the name on the card is written as: first name, middle names (if there are any), and last name (if there are any). The system sorts names by the first name. If you only have one name, it is usually okay. The card needs you to pick one of six main religions. These are Islam, Protestantism, Catholicism, Hinduism, Buddhism, and Confucianism. In 2006, a Minister said this was important. It helps keep peace between groups. It also helps with things like marriage. But in 2014, a different Minister said this part could be left blank. Some religious groups wanted to keep it. After a court ruling, starting July 1, 2018, people with local beliefs can write "penghayat kepercayaan." Also, Confucianism came back as an option in 2006.

A big office called the Home Affairs Ministry started a test for a new ID card. This was in 2009. They tested it in six places. This test was run by a group called Lintas Peruri Solusi. Many problems happened. Also, people said there was cheating, or corruption. In June 2010, the Attorney General's Office named four people. These people worked at the Ministry. They were accused of cheating when buying things like computer parts and blank ID cards. Even with the cheating talk, the e-KTP project continued. It went all over the country in 2011. Later, in 2012, the Attorney General's Office stopped looking into it. They said they did not have enough proof. Then, a group called KPK looked at the whole project. They found big money problems. They said the cheating cost the country a lot of money. Another group, ICW, said there was trickery in giving out jobs. They also thought some promised tools were not given. For example, one group promised to use iris scanning. But they only used finger scanning. Later, in 2014, the KPK named a man named Sugiharto as a suspect. In 2016, they named another man named Irman as a suspect. He was accused of making the costs too high.

A minister named Tjahjo Kumolo stopped a project in September 2014. Later, on July 17, 2017, a man named Setya Novanto was named a suspect. This was because people thought he took money from the e-KTP project. Setya Novanto said he did nothing wrong. He could not go to talk with KPK investigators in September 2017. He said he was not well. On September 29, the South Jakarta District Court stopped him from being a suspect. Then, on April 24, 2018, a court in Jakarta said Setya was guilty of stealing. The court gave him 15 years in jail. Before that, KPK gave a list of more than 30 people who got money from the e-KTP project. These people included some ministers and old lawmakers.

Little bugs, called larvae, eat flowers. These flowers are from Calamintha, Hypericum, Origanum, and Thymus. These bugs sleep in a pupa when winter comes. This moth is related to Eupithecia. A song named "Brandy" is from 1972. It was by a band called Looking Glass. Elliot Lurie wrote this song. It was on the band's first album. The song was a big hit. It reached the top spot on two music charts. The words talk about a girl named Brandy. She worked at a bar near a busy port. Many sailors liked her. But she missed a man. He left her because he loved "the sea." People thought Brandy was about a real woman named Mary Ellis. But Lurie said this was not true. Lurie was happy when people used the song's words like a story. This happened in the movie Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2. In 1972, Robert Mandel worked for music promotion. He got a test album from Looking Glass. He took this album to many radio stations. WPGC AM/FM was a top radio station in DC. Harv Moore was the boss there. He played the song for two days.

Music was popular. The band Looking Glass released a song called "Brandy." People really liked it. It was a big hit. Two weeks after the song came out, "Brandy" was number one in DC. Even before people bought copies, it was number one. Other radio stations played it too. Soon, it sold one million copies. A year later, Looking Glass went back to WPGC. They played at the party for Moore's tenth birthday. A magazine called it "a tuneful, soulful effort." After the song came out in 1972, the name Brandy got popular. Many girls were named Brandy. In 1973, it was the 82nd most popular name. Barry Manilow sang a song called "Mandy." This song was about a different song. The original song was also called "Brandy." Manilow changed the name. This was so people would not mix up the two songs.

In a show called The Simpsons, Marge's sister, Selma Bouvier, sings a sad song to Lisa. Selma feels sad because she cannot find a husband. This is a story about a real man. His name was Birger Kristian Eriksen. He was a soldier from Norway. He was a military officer. He was very important in stopping the first German soldiers. This happened near Oslo. Birger was the boss of Oscarsborg Fortress. Nazi Germany attacked Norway. This was in the early morning on April 9, 1940. Birger told his soldiers to shoot. They shot the big ship Blücher. This made the ship sink. Birger was born in 1875. He left home when he was twelve. He went to study in Kristiania. He went back home every summer. He married Christiane Sæhlie. He started his job in the army in 1896. He was a Captain and then a Major.

In 1931, he became an Oberst, which means Colonel. Two years later, he led Oscarsborg Fortress. He stayed there until a big day. That day was the Battle of Drøbak Sound on April 9, 1940. When the battle came, Eriksen was close to retiring. Before this job, he led other forts. These forts were Tønsberg, Agdenes, and Bergen. He was there when the fort came back to the Norwegian army. This was on May 12, 1945. This was many years after the Germans took it. Eriksen spoke about the Flag of Norway. He said the flag showed the home country. He said the flag that flew until 1940 was raised again. A group called the Commission of 1946 said no one was legally to blame for giving up the fort. Even though he was praised after the war, some leaders criticized him. They thought he gave up too soon. Eriksen said he felt much pressure. He also said he shot at the bad people. This was different from the rules. The groups in 1945 and 1946 said he did his job well.

Birger Eriksen was a hero in a war. He passed away on July 16, 1958. His funeral was at Oslo New Crematorium. His ashes were buried at Drøbak Church. Later, on October 4, 1977, people moved his ashes. They moved them to Vår Frelsers gravlund cemetery in Oslo. It was a big honor for a Norwegian to rest there. Later, on May 6, 1995, King Harald V showed a statue of him. This statue was in the Borggården square at Oscarsborg's Main Fort. This showed that he was a top leader in the war. In the film *The King's Choice*, Erik Hivju acted as him. The movie showed the Battle of Drøbak Sound. The story is about April 9, 1940. This was when Germany invaded Norway. Eriksen was at Oscarsborg Fortress. He helped sink the German ship, Blücher. He gave the order to fire. He said, "Either I will be decorated, or I will be court-martialed."

John Herbert King was a good player of cricket. He played for Leicestershire. He played from 1895 until 1925. He also played one big game for England. This game was against Australia in 1909. At first, he did not play well. He did not score many runs. In 1898, he seemed to be a regular player. But he could not play much. He was disappointed in 1899. But in 1900, he got much better. He changed his way of batting. He became a strong hitter from the left side. He scored 940 runs. He also bowled really well. He took 76 wickets. He could bowl with good spin. In 1901, he scored over 1,600 runs. Even when his bowling was not great, he still scored big runs. In 1904, he played at Lord's. He scored two big centuries on a hot pitch.

In 1906, King was the last player to get out in a big game in England. This happened when he played against Surrey at the Oval. He stopped the ball from hitting his sticks. He hit it a second time. Then, he tried to run a little bit. King's team did not have a good year. But in the wet summer of 1907, he played well. He took 40 wickets. His score was good. In 1909, King played very well. He did this with his bat and his ball. So, they asked him to play for England. He played against Australia at Lord's. Colin Blythe could not play. He was sick. They needed a left-handed bowler. King was the first player from Leicestershire to play for England against Australia at home. He scored sixty runs in the first time. But, he did not play in the Third Test. He never played for England again. In 1910, he got hurt in his knee. This happened in May. He played only two games. In 1911, King was not very good. The summer was very dry and hot. But, on a sticky pitch against Yorkshire, he helped his team win. He took seven wickets for no runs.

King was a big star in Leicestershire cricket. This was true when county games started again in 1919. He took 100 wickets in 1920. But after that, his bowling got worse. Still, in 1921, he scored fifty runs. Then, from 1921 to 1923, he scored one thousand runs each year. In 1923, he scored 205 runs against Hampshire. This was a big deal because he was fifty-two years old. He batted all day long. In 1924, King was tired. He was tired with his bat and his ball. He left the team in 1925. After playing, he still helped the game. He worked as an umpire for eleven more years. Separately, there is a statue. This statue is of Queen Victoria. It is in Karachi, Pakistan. The sculptor made this statue. His name was Sir Hamo Thornycroft. The statue was put in Frere Hall. In 1962, a leader took it away. Now, it is in Mohatta Palace.

A church was first built there in 1247. Camaldolese nuns started it. The church you see now was built in 1602. Giulio della Torre built it. He learned from Domenico Tibaldi. Later, during the time of Napoleon, people used the church as a place to sleep for soldiers. The church has two statues. These statues are of St Peter and St Paul. Guido Reni made these statues. He is famous for his paintings. A big painting on the altar shows the Ascension of Christ. Ludovico Carracci made that painting. Other art is in the church. Giuseppe Maria Mazza and G. Fiorini made other statues. Giacomo Francia painted the Nativity. Francesco Salviati painted the Madonna and Child with Saints. Lucio Massari painted the Visitation. Bernardino Baldi painted the Coronation of the Virgin. Bartolomeo Passerotti painted the Martyrdom of St Catherine. His son, Tiburzio, painted other things. Many artists painted in the church. Next to it is a monastery. It is now a place for art at the University of Bologna. The monastery has a painting of the Crucifixion. This painting is from the school of Lorenzo Costa. A room called Santa Cristina is big. People often have small music shows there. These shows use old kinds of music tools.

The place called Mueang Narathiwat started as a small village. It was first named Menara. After that, it grew bigger. The government moved the town hall. Then, they made Tambon Manalo into Mueang Bang Nara. King Vajiravudh (Rama VI) changed the name to Narathiwat in 1915. But in 1917, they changed it back. Later, in 1938, the name became Mueang Narathiwat District. Near this place are other areas. The Bang Nara River is an important water source. There is a park called Ao Manao-Khao Tanyong National Park. The district has seven smaller parts, called tambons. The Chitarero were people who lived in Colombia and Venezuela. They were a group of people. They are known for an event in 1533. They killed a German man with poisoned arrows. Their land was big. It was in areas now in Venezuela and Colombia.

The Spanish people called them "Chitareros." This was because the men had to carry a calabash gourd. This gourd held maize wine or chicha. The people who lived there called themselves "chitarero." They traded with other groups. These groups were the Muisca, the Guane, and the Lache. Elishe was an Armenian history writer. He lived a long time ago. He wrote about the Armenian War. This war was against rule from Sassanid Iranian people. Elishe learned from Sahak Partev. He also learned from Mesrop Mashtots, who made the Armenian alphabet. In 434, he went to Alexandria to learn Greek. He returned to Armenia in 441. He served in the army. He fought in a war for freedom. After the war, he stopped fighting. He became a hermit. He lived in the mountains near Lake Van. Later, people asked him to write the history of the war. After he passed away, his body went to a monastery near Lake Van. People remember Elishe as a church doctor.

People questioned when Elishe wrote his book. This started in the 1930s. Some scholars thought Elishe's book was older. They thought that the Armenian words from Philo were made much later. But, the real story is different. The words were actually made in the fifth century AD. Other smart people say that the time period is not the only thing that matters. They also say that Elishe did not copy words from Philo. He put the words from Greek into Armenian himself. Another idea was that Elishe copied a book by Ghazar Parpetsi. But, Ghazar wrote about a long time. Elishe wanted to show the great bravery of the Armenians. He wanted to give hope to people. Elishe knew many fortress names. He also knew about the fighting skills of the Armenians and the Persians. This shows that he was near the real events. He also knew more about the customs than Ghazar. Elishe did not mention the Council of Chalcedon.

Death that we do not know is just death. But death that we understand is like being forever alive, or immortality. Elishe wrote a very famous book. It is called the History of Vardan and the Armenian War. David Mamikonian asked him to write it. Elishe called it a Hishatakaran. This means it is a 'Memorial' or a 'Recollection'. In this book, he tells about the fight of the Armenians. They fought with others for their faith. They fought against the Persians. This was from 449 to 451. Both sides thought that religion was a sign of who they were. The Armenians wanted to keep Christianity. The Persians tried to make them follow Zoroastrianism. Elishe wrote this book to teach people. He wanted people to listen and learn. People could curse him if they did wrong things. This book is a great piece of old Armenian writing. It does not have many Greek words. Other books by Elishe exist too. The original writing of his work is lost. The oldest copies we have are from later times. One book was printed in Venice in 1826.

Some books talk about seven chapters. But some later books have an eighth chapter. This chapter talks about people called Leontine martyrs. People question if this chapter is true. Also, the fifth chapter is missing in all the old books. To fix this, the original sixth chapter was cut in two pieces. This was done to make up for the missing chapter. There are many translations. A French one is by Langlois in 1869. An Italian one is by G. Cappelletti. There is also a short English one by C. F. Neumann in 1830. Full English books were made by Dickran H. Boyadjian and Robert W. Thomson. This article uses text from an old book by Herbermann in 1913. Rok 1863 is a Polish movie. It came out in 1922. This article about the film is not full. You can help Wikipedia by adding more words. Dornheim is a small town in Germany. It is in the district Ilm-Kreis. The church there is special. It is where the musician Johann Sebastian Bach got married in 1707. This place article is not full. You can help Wikipedia by adding more words. Munain is a small village in Spain. It is in Álava province. The people spoke the Basque language there for a long time. But now, the main language is Spanish.

A church was built a long time ago. Pedro de Ibarra and Juan de Arteaga built it in the 16th century. The bell tower is square. It has four floors. An altarpiece was made later. Manuel de Zozaya and José de Angulo built it. Saint Peter and Saint Paul statues stand next to it. Inside, there is a chapel. This chapel was for the Vicuña family. Near this place, there is a big oak forest. This forest is very special. Many trees are very old. Some trees are even 1500 years old. The Zadorra river starts nearby. Another church is in North Olmsted. It is a Unitarian Universalist church. It is one of the oldest churches in its area. People have used it since the middle of the 1800s. They named it a special place later on. People built the church in 1847. John Ames helped them design it. The building is a simple box shape. It has walls. The front has a bell tower on the roof. There are four windows on the sides. There is one window near the front door. The front has a fancy top part called a pediment. This pediment has nice details. The church bell is more than 150 years old.

The people who go to the church have new ideas about religion. They let a woman named Abbie Danforth be the first preacher in 1878. But, they like old things when it comes to buildings. St. John's Episcopal Church is very old. It was built in 1838. It is the only church in the area that is still standing and is older than another church. This staying the same was important. It helped the church become a historic place. In 1980, the church was put on a special list. This list is called the National Register of Historic Places. It got this spot because of its old building and its local story. This was special because usually, churches or moved buildings are not put on that list. This church is one of nine old spots nearby. These spots are near North Olmsted and Olmsted Falls. The other spots are listed too.

Vijay Kapoor is a good man. He lives happily with his wife Pratima. He also has four children. His son, Ajay, came home. Ajay got a Master's degree from a school far away. Vijay's daughter, Priti, likes a man named Rajesh Purohit. Rajesh also just finished school. Vijay likes Rajesh too. So, Vijay says it is okay for Rajesh to marry Priti. But, Rajesh has a bad plan. He wants to trick the Kapoor family. He wants to steal Vijay's money. At the same time, Ajay loves Nisha Thapar. Ajay plans to marry Nisha. Ajay tells his father that he wants his own shop. Vijay tells him to work in the family shop first. They have different ideas. So, they argue. Ajay still wants his own shop. He takes money from the bank for it. Vijay gets very angry. He kicks Ajay out of the house. Ajay marries Nisha. They move to a new house. Rajesh makes Vijay sign a paper. This paper gives Rajesh power over things. Vijay has to pay a lot of money to the court. He cannot pay it. So, Vijay has no money. All his money goes to Rajesh. Ajay learns that Rajesh started fights between him and Vijay. He tries to be close to Vijay again. This makes problems in his marriage with Nisha. Nisha is not happy. They separate because they fight a lot. Nisha finds out she is having a baby. Ajay goes back home. Now, Ajay must fix the family's money. He must also fix Vijay's trust. Vijay still cannot forgive him. Finally, Ajay and Vijay become friends again.

Rajesh treated Priti very badly. So, Priti went back home. Ajay found out something else. Brij, an old friend of Vijay, also left Vijay. To get back their family money, Ajay made Rajesh sign a paper. This paper said the money must go to the real owner. Because of this, Vijay could pay the court bills. Priti told Rajesh she could never forgive him. She told him to leave forever. Nisha and Ajay became friends. The family finally became happy again. The song music was by Nadeem–Shravan. The words were by Sameer. The music album sold a lot of copies. It was one of the best-selling albums that year. Some people liked the movie. They praised Amitabh Bachchan's acting. Others thought the movie was not very good. One person said the story was bad. But they still liked the acting of Amitabh, Akshay, Karishma, Juhi, and others.

Ek Rishtaa was a big movie. It was a Hindi film from 2001. People could buy it on DVD on August 6, 2001. Tip Top Video sold it on one disc. Later, Shemaroo Entertainment made a better DVD. This DVD had good picture and sound. Even though the movie did very well at the box office, the man named Darshan would not sell the TV rights. The rights for his movies were worth a lot of money. Darshan finally sold these rights to Zee in 2017. Then, Ek Rishtaa showed on Zee Cinema on September 16, 2017. This was 16 years after it first came out. Another thing was a big boat drill. This drill was called Exercise Mainbrace. It was a big drill for a group called ACLANT. ACLANT is a main military group of NATO. This happened in the fall of 1952. Leaders ran this drill. They saw that Norway was very important. They knew this since the First World War. During World War II, Germany took over Norway. This showed how important the area was. Germany used it for boats and planes against ships going to Murmansk.

After a big war, many navies practiced together. One big practice was called Exercise Mainbrace. General Dwight D. Eisenhower started the plan for it. He was the leader of NATO's army in Europe. The exercise was led by two big officers. One was Admiral Lynde D. McCormick. The other was General Matthew B. Ridgeway. Admiral Sir Patrick Brind also helped lead it. Mainbrace happened for twelve days. It was from September 14 to September 25, 1952. Nine navies joined. These were the US Navy, the British Royal Navy, and others. They practiced in seas like the Norwegian Sea. The goal was to show Denmark and Norway. They needed to know that their land was safe. They could be safe from the Soviet Union. The practice had many parts. They practiced air attacks. They also practiced fighting under the sea. US soldiers even landed in Denmark. Eighty thousand men joined. Over 200 ships and 1,000 airplanes took part. A reporter said it was a very big and strong group of ships.

Big ships played in big games. These games were called exercises. The games were part of NATO. NATO is a group of countries. In the Fall of 1952, they had big practice. Many people joined. They moved from the cold Arctic Circle to the warm Mediterranean Sea. Two big games happened. One game was called Ancient Wall. This game used small ground troops. It also used airplanes from land. And it used airplanes from big ships. Another game was called Longstep. This game was in the Mediterranean Sea. It lasted ten days in November 1952. Many warships and many planes were there. The blue team wanted to push away the enemy green team. The blue team was led by the U.S. Sixth Fleet. This fleet had two big carriers. One was the USS Franklin D. Roosevelt. The other was the USS Wasp. The green team had submarines and land planes. The game ended with soldiers landing at Lebidos Bay. French, Italian, and Greek soldiers helped. The Soviet Union thought these games were like war. They said these games were "war-like acts."

Some people saw a fast, shiny circle in the sky. This happened near a place called RAF Topcliffe in the UK. Two groups of airplanes saw this circle. It was flying very high, at 15,000 feet. People on the ground at RAF Dishforth also saw it. They saw it following a jet plane called an RAF Meteor. This was on September 19th. Many newspapers in the UK wrote about these sightings. Two weeks later, NATO said Danish airmen also saw a shiny circle. They saw it over the North Sea. This article talks about trams too. The M-class was a type of tram. Duncan & Fraser built these trams for Adelaide. They were given to the Melbourne & Metropolitan Tramways Board on February 2, 1920. These trams had four wheels. They had a special roof. Inside, there was a place for people to sit. This place had four windows on each side. There were open ends for people to smoke. These ends had two seats on each side.

In 1916, a group called the HTT started using ten M class cars. These cars were used on trams. Later, the Trust wanted seven more cars. They asked for more space inside the open cars. So, these new trams were one foot longer. The second group of seven cars waited at the builder's place. They waited because World War I stopped the power work. The HTT needed money for track fixes. So, they sold the car bodies to the FTT. The HTT kept the wheels for these trams. The FTT had enough wheels and power stuff. Sadly, these trams never ran for the FTT. The M&MTB took them first. Then, all seven trams came back. They went to Hawthorn Depot. They started working in August and September of 1920. After that, they moved to the Footscray tramway. They started running there on September 6, 1921. When they got their first paint job, they changed their numbers. They became 183 to 189. From September to October 1923, six trams moved to Essendon Depot. Car number 188 joined them in February the next year.

The trams got new paint. The paint color was a special brown, like chocolate and cream. When they changed their numbers, they joined other cars. These cars were called A class. Some cars, like 183 to 189, had special air-brakes. If they did not have them, the M&MTB put them on later. In January 1930, two cars, 107 and 108, were sold. They went to two towns: Bendigo and Ballarat. People liked these trams. So, other cars followed. In February 1935, more cars joined. Some cars went to Bendigo. Some cars went to Ballarat. Many of these cars worked with only one person driving them. Eleven of these trams are still kept safe. Separately, Kémes is a small village in Hungary. It is in Baranya county. A man named Rajasekharan Parameswaran is an artist. He is from India. He is a painter. He learned to paint by himself. He worked in many jobs first. Then, he started working in movies. He was an assistant director first. He became an art director later.

A man named Parameswaran made big art. In 2008, he made a huge painting. It was a picture of a former Chief Minister. This painting was very big. It was 25 feet by 50 feet. He showed it on a big stand. This stand was on a road in Kerala. In 2010, this painting was also in the Limca Book of Records. He won another prize that year. He painted Mahatma Gandhi. Also, his painting of Fidel Castro won an online art contest. In 2017, he got another Guinness World Record. This time, it was for something called "The Largest Devil's Knot." This was a big puzzle. Each piece was 24 feet by 2 feet. He showed his art in many places. He showed it in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, in 2015. He also sold a painting in Chennai. The money helped people after a big storm. Parameswaran painted many people. He painted Mother Teresa and Abdul Kalam. Nature Reviews Endocrinology is a medical book. It talks about hormones. It was started in 2005.

This text talks about three different things. First, it mentions a journal. This journal got a big score in 2021. It was number one out of 146 journals in a group called "Endocrinology & Metabolism." Second, it tells a story about a bus stop. This bus stop is on the island of Unst. People call it Bobby's Bus Shelter. It is kept by the Shetland Islands Council. A boy named Bobby made it special. He used to ride his bike to the stop for school. The council first planned to take it away. But a seven-year-old sent a letter. He asked them not to take it. He said he kept his bike there. So, the council left it. Local helpers decorated it. It has a sofa and a television. Third, it talks about a movie. The movie is called "Love in the Times of Corona." It is an Indian movie. It came out in 2021. It was written and directed by Indrani Ray.

Ronak Kotecha liked the film. He gave it 3.5 out of 5 stars. He said the stories are warm. They are also easy to understand. Everyone can find something in them. He praised the people who made the movie. They made it well. They worked from far away. They did this from the story to the screen. They did not lose the good movie feeling. Shreya Paul also liked it. She gave it a good rating. She said the movie is good art. It should help other movies. The film shows that women telling women's stories is good. It is true to what many feel. Shaheen also liked it. She said it is a happy movie. It gives a good feeling. She said some parts are for one time only. But another part, Tea and a Rose, you can watch many times. Knox Theological Seminary is a school. It is in Florida, US. It started in 1989. D. James Kennedy started it. He wanted to teach people to be pastors. He wanted to teach them to be teachers. He also wanted to teach them to spread good news. The goal was to train helpers. These people would stand up for truth. They would also love to share their faith.

The seminary changed a lot. It became its own place on July 1, 2013. In 2023, Knox had many teachers. Scott Manor is the President and a teacher. Many smart people have taught there before. Knox offers some Master's classes and one Doctorate. It also has small paper programs, called certificates. A board of directors runs Knox. They put Samuel Lamerson as president in 2014. The seminary is still close to Coral Ridge Presbyterian Church. The school first sent out students in 1993. It got a special paper from the Association of Theological Schools in 2005.
