Knox got okay to teach online in 2012. The seminary works with the ATS on a program called Science for Seminaries. The Wyler Aerial Tramway is in El Paso, Texas. It opened in 1960. The park runs it. It is in Franklin Mountains State Park. The tramway goes up to Ranger Peak. This peak is very high. The ride takes about four minutes. From the top, you can see three states and two countries on a clear day.

A tramway was built in 1959. KTSM radio built it. They built it to help build a big tower for sending out radio waves. A man named Karl O. Wyler ran this job. People could ride it first. It was called the El Paso Aerial Tramway. It ran from 1960 until 1986. The tram stopped for the public. This was because insurance costs were too high. After that, the tram was only for the big towers. Wyler gave the tramway to the public when he died. The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department took the gift in 1997. They fixed it and opened it for people again in 2001. The tramway closed again in September 2018. This was because the Texas Parks and Wildlife did a check. They said the tram was too old for people to ride safely. Fixing it would cost lots of money. In July 2024, people said they would fix the tramway. By November 2025, the Texas group gave $20 million for fixes. This money is for the first part. This part includes more parking and better bathrooms. Another $7 million was given for the next part. The Texas Parks and Wildlife Foundation will try to get $5 to $7 million more. This money will build a new tramway. It will also build a visitor center and new paths.

This story is about a special family line called the Davidic line. This line was the family of kings. They came from a man named David. David ruled over two lands. These lands were the Kingdom of Israel and the Kingdom of Judah. This happened a long, long time ago. David fought with another man named Ish-bosheth. Ish-bosheth became a king after his father. During this fight, God sent a prophet named Samuel. Samuel anointed David as the true king of the Israelites. After Ish-bosheth died, David became the king. He took the throne around 1010 BCE. He started a new royal family. His son was Solomon. After Solomon passed away, many tribes did not follow the David family. Some tribes chose a different leader. They made a kingdom in the north. The loyal tribes kept the line going in the south. They kept the name of the Davidic line through the kings of Judah.

A long time ago, the big city of Jerusalem had a temple. This temple was broken. The kingdom of Judah fell. Many years later, a group called the Hasmonean dynasty made a Jewish kingdom. This was the first free kingdom since the bad times. In Jewish belief, the Messiah will be a king. This king will have a family line from David. He will rule for the Jewish people. Christians think that Jesus is part of this David line. We know little about David's family. A stone called the Tel Dan Stele talks about a king from the "House of David." This stone is very old. It tells us about a king's death. Some smart people think this king was Ahaziah of Judah. Another king from David's line was Uzziah. Uzziah lived in the 8th century BCE. This was about 75 years after Ahaziah. These kings show us about the royal family.

We do not know where the kings came from. The Tel Dan Stele is the only place outside the Bible that talks about David. It is hard to prove the story of the Israel kingdom from long ago using just old things found by digging. Some old walls in Jerusalem suggest people lived there when King David lived. This makes people think that Jerusalem was a strong fort before. But, it looks like Jerusalem did not grow much until long after David died. This makes us wonder if it was the big capital city the Bible says. Back then, the capital might have been just a strong castle. The "David kingdom" was maybe just a group of small areas joined together. Other digs show that the people of Judah could have big, busy towns much earlier than some people think. These finds show big growth in many places. Still, some smart people think that David and Solomon might be based on "some real old stories." They probably did exist. But, they might not be the exact people from the Bible.

Taeneremina is a group of moths. These moths are in the Noctuidae family. This group has only one kind. The kind is called Taeneremina scripta. You can find this moth in Taiwan. Gaspard de Fieubet was a man. He was from France. He lived a long time ago. He was a judge. He was a magistrate. He was the leader of a big court in Toulouse. This job was from 1653 to 1686. His family was famous in law and money. His family had two parts. One was in Paris. The other was in Toulouse. Gaspard was part of the Toulouse family. He helped the king with rules in the South of France. He worked on rules for Protestants. In Toulouse, he bought a house. This was called the Hôtel d'Ulmo. He wanted to have power in the town. He picked the town leaders himself. Even though some thought he liked Jansenists. He was a big person in Toulouse's culture. He helped science and art. He was given books about law, sickness, and poems. He helped a group called the Academy of Lanternists. He also started a place called the Salle des Illustres. Gaspard's father was Guillaume de Fieubet. His mother was Marguerite de Saint-Pol.

Gaspard de Fieubet was the oldest son. He had a little brother and sisters. Gaspard married two times. The first time, he married Marguerite de Gameville. This was on March 3, 1648. She passed away in 1671. They had six daughters. They also had one son. Later, on March 5, 1680, Fieubet married Gabrielle-Éléonore de Nogaret de La Valette. She owned a big house called Château de Caumont. This second marriage did not have any children. Gaspard was known in two places. He was from the Toulouse part of the Fieubet family. But another part of his family lived in Paris. So, he was a cousin to the father of Gaspard III de Fieubet. This father worked for the king. In the 1600s, the Fieubets in Paris were near people who collected taxes. These families helped the king. The king always needed money. Later, the Fieubets joined many rich families. They worked in a place called the Parlement of Paris. At the Parlement of Toulouse, Gaspard got many big jobs. He became the president of requests in 1643. He was the attorney general in 1645. He became the first president in 1653. The king gave him this job. When he was president, the Parlement of Toulouse was a big court. Many people worked there. This was because the king made many jobs to sell.

A man named Gaspard de Fieubet started to fight the power of the Parlement of Paris. This was in the year 1654. The Parlement had said that François-Jacques d'Amboise d'Aubijoux must die. He was guilty for being in a secret fight where his helper died. But Aubijoux was let go from punishment in 1656. Fieubet was a big leader in the Parlement of Toulouse. He worked there for many years. He helped the king's power in a place called Languedoc. He stopped the Parlement from wanting too much freedom. The king thought Fieubet was a good and true man. Before Fieubet, the Parlement people wanted to control the local city groups called capitouls. Fieubet kept doing this. He put his helpers in the city of Toulouse. He named a man like Germain de Lafaille as the city helper, or syndic. In 1659, Fieubet got the king to agree to pick some of his friends as capitouls. By 1661, he picked them himself. This made the city have less power. Fieubet made sure that people who liked the king were in important jobs. In 1659, the king visited Toulouse. The king was sad to hear about someone's death. Fieubet’s brother-in-law was the law helper. Together, they helped the king. They made the king's rules happen. This was true even before a big rule change. For example, in 1666-1667, Fieubet led a meeting. At this meeting, they made rules against Protestants. They stopped the Protestants from ringing their church bells. This was even though they were allowed to ring them before. Fieubet said this was because Protestants did wrong things.

In the year 1679, a group called the Chamber of the Edict of Castres closed. This chamber was made of people who were Catholic and people who were Protestant. Their workers joined the Parlement of Toulouse. Later, in 1685, the Protestants had to leave their jobs or say they did not believe in certain things. The Parlement of Toulouse wanted to join this chamber before. In 1685, the Parlement of Toulouse made a rule. This rule said that some Portuguese sellers were guilty of something wrong. The rule said they should be burned alive. But, they were only burned with fake bodies. This was done to take their things for the king's money. The first leader of the Parlement of Toulouse got some money each year. He also got a pension from the king. This money was not enough for his life. In fact, being a Parlement worker was expensive. They had to pay money to keep their job. The leaders of the Parlement were much richer than other workers. Around 1653, a man named Gaspard de Fieubet bought a big house. This house was on Ninau Street. Many important families lived there. When he died, his daughter Catherine de Fieubet and her husband got the house.

People in Toulouse who studied law thought it was smart. They gave their book collections to Gaspard de Fieubet. He was the first president of the Parlement. Some books are examples. One book is "Abrégé du Recueil des arrests notables de la Cour de Parlement de Tolose." Another book is by Bernard Médon. A third book is by Simon d'Olive du Mesnil. Fieubet was also the person who got other law books. From the late 1500s, the Parlement people started to rule the town's culture. Gaspard de Fieubet followed this way. He was like his cousin in Paris. He gathered smart people. They had talks about religion and science. Emmanuel Maignan often led these talks. Maignan taught Fieubet about stars and the microscope. People also wrote books for Fieubet. These books were not just about law. They were about thinking or medicine. Fieubet helped a historian named Germain de Lafaille. Lafaille wrote a book about Toulouse. He gave this book to remember Fieubet. This happened after Fieubet passed away.

Fieubet started a place called the Salle des Illustres at the Capitole de Toulouse. He had big fights with a math man named Pierre de Fermat. Because of this fight, Fermat could not be in that room for a long time. The fight was because of a law case. In 1658, a priest named Jean Montralon was hanged. Fieubet helped make this happen. This made Fermat very angry. Fermat was a judge in this case. He thought Montralon was not guilty. Later, in 1680, Fieubet helped a group of smart people. This group was called the Academy of Lanternists. They could meet in a house near Pont-Neuf Square. So, the Academy of Lanternists came back. But, it had trouble. The smart people went to the big city. Gaspard de Fieubet also got poems dedicated to him. He helped protect a group of young girls. This group was started by Madame de Mondonville and Abbé de Ciron. This group was near the Parlementary families.

When Colebrooke died, the title went to his next son. This was the third Baronet. He had no children. So, his uncle, the fourth Baronet, took the title. This fourth Baronet was the son of Henry Colebrooke. Henry was a worker in India. He also studied Sanskrit. This fourth Baronet stood for Taunton in Parliament. His eldest son became the fifth Baronet. This happened in 1906. Lord Colebrooke had no boys left. When he died in 1939, the title went away. Robert Colebrooke was the older brother of the first and second Baronets. He was in Parliament for Maldon. Athenry Castle is a big old house in Athenry, Ireland. It is near the River Clarin. It stood on a high spot. It protected a crossing in the river. People called it King John's Castle. But it was not built when King John lived. The first part was built in 1235 or 1240. Later, someone named Meyler de Bermingham made it bigger. In 1316, the castle was attacked. After that, they built city walls. In the 1400s, the Berminghams moved away from it. They moved to a house near the market. In 1596, the O'Donnells took the castle.

Athenry Castle is a big, square building. It is old. Some parts are from the 13th century. The castle also has parts from the 15th century. These older parts were changed for a new roof. The castle was fixed up in 2005. The castle first had a hall upstairs. It also had storage rooms on the ground floor. The battlements are from the 13th century. They have tall slits for arrows. In the 15th century, the roof parts were added to the north and south ends. You can still see parts of the old castle wall. The first door was on the first floor. You went up wooden stairs to reach it. They might have kept the room warm with a brazier. The smoke went out a small opening in the roof. The toilet area, called a garderobe, is across from the main door. The door has nice carvings on the outside. The carvings look like flowers. A special staircase went up to the top floor. Towers were built at two corners. The gate protected the other corner. A children's book talks about this castle. Also, the U.S. Post Office is in Patchogue, New York. It helps the whole village and two smaller parts.

The Patchogue Post Office was built in 1930. An architect named John Vredenburgh Van Pelt designed it. The building mixes two styles. These styles are Art Deco and Classical Revival. The front part of the building is made of light stone called limestone. It has cool carvings and big windows with nice metal patterns. A clock hangs over the front doors. The rest of the building is mostly brick. Stamp collectors like to go there. They look for rare stamps. The building was added to a special list called the National Register of Historic Places in 1989. In 2005, the U.S. Congress changed the name. They named it the Lieutenant Michael P. Murphy Post Office Building. This honors Michael P. Murphy. Separately, Finlaystone House is a big, old house in Scotland. It is near the Firth of Clyde. The Dennistoun family once owned this place. Later, the Cunninghams got it. It was the home of the Earl of Glencairn until 1796. Now, the Chief of Clan MacMillan owns it. The house is protected. Its gardens are also on a national list.

Long ago, in the 1300s, King Robert II gave the lands of Finlaystone to Sir John de Danyelstoun. Then, his son, Sir Robert, took care of Dumbarton Castle. When Sir Robert passed away in 1399, his land went to his two daughters. Elizabeth got Newark Castle. Margaret got Finlaystone. In 1405, Margaret married Sir William Cunningham. His family kept the land for a long time. Later, Alexander Lord Kilmaurs became an Earl. This family liked a new way of believing, which was the Protestant Reformation. In 1556, they held a special service there. An architect named John Douglas was asked to build a new house in 1746. But they did not build it until 1764. The new house used some parts of the old castle. In 1796, the family who owned it died without children. So, Finlaystone went to a cousin. This cousin's family changed their name. Later, they sold Finlaystone. In 1882, George Jardine Kidston bought it. Kidston asked an architect to change the house. This change was finished in 1903. The yard around the house grew bigger. Now, George Gordon MacMillan is the owner. His family still runs the estate today.

This place is like a big park. Rangers take care of it. People can walk on marked paths. There is also a visitor center. You can find toilets and play areas there. They have fun events every month and every year. The park has many parts. It has 10 acres of pretty gardens. It has 140 acres of woods. Mazlan binti Othman is a smart lady. She is a Malaysian scientist who studies space. She helped Malaysia learn about space. She was the first scientist like her in Malaysia. She helped make classes for space science at a big school. She taught people about stars and space. She was the boss of the Malaysian Space Agency. She also worked for the United Nations. She learned at a school in Malaysia. Then she studied in New Zealand. She got a degree there. Later, she came back to Malaysia. She worked to teach space science. She also did science work in Japan.

She liked teaching people about learning in public. In 1990, the Prime Minister, Mahathir Mohamad, gave her a big job. She was in charge of the Planetarium Division. She helped build Planetarium Negara. This planetarium is in Kuala Lumpur. It opened in 1993. Then, she became the main boss of the government's new Space Science Studies Division. There, she started a plan to build small satellites. The next year, she got to be a full professor. In 1999, Kofi Annan, the boss of the United Nations, made her the director of UNOOSA. This place is in Vienna. In 2002, she went back to Malaysia. She worked there for five years. She was the first boss of Angkasa, the Malaysian Space Agency. Her work helped launch the first Malaysian astronaut, Sheikh Muszaphar Shukor. In 2007, she went back to UNOOSA. There, she talked about many space things. These things were about working together in space. She also talked about space trash. She wrote about space laws between countries. Some news said the UN would make someone an ambassador for aliens. But a UN speaker said those stories were not true.

Othman did many helpful jobs after she left the United Nations. She helped on groups about science and space. She also taught at a school. She became a senior helper at the Academy of Sciences Malaysia. In 2017, she became the boss of the International Science Council (ISC) office for Asia and the Pacific. In 1997, a big leader in Malaysia gave her an honor. It was called Panglima Jasa Negara. This gave her the title "Datuk." Also in 1997, her school, the University of Otago, gave her an honor degree. In 2009, the Institute of Physics gave her a medal. They did this for her work in science. In 2013, she got the "Polarstern-Preis." This award was for her love of space. Othman has two kids. She lives in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

Private Music is a new song book from the band Deftones. It is their first album since 2010. The band's bassist, Sergio Vega, left the band in 2021. A new bassist, Fred Sablan, played on this album. He also helped write some songs. Chino Moreno sang most of the words. The music was made by Abe Cunningham, Moreno, Frank Delgado, Fred Sablan, and Stephen Carpenter. Because Stephen Carpenter was sick, Moreno played more guitar parts. People liked this album very much. Critics gave it high scores. One review said it was like a "full journey through a fever dream." Another review said it was a gift for all fans. The songs are called alternative metal and shoegaze.

Sexual harassment is bad behavior. It can happen to people of any gender. It can happen between friends or people who do not know each other. It can happen when people are boss and worker. It can be words, touching, or hidden actions. Examples are mean words about sex. They can be making rude jokes. It can be showing private parts. It can be sending private photos. It can be asking for sex for good things. It can be touching someone or hurting them. In many countries, some types of work harassment are against the law. This is like unfair treatment at work. Some laws are different in each place. Laws do not stop every small mean thing. But, if the bad stuff happens a lot, it can be illegal. This makes the workplace feel bad. Or, if the bad stuff makes someone lose their job, it is illegal. Over 100 countries have laws against this. These laws cover bad feelings at work. Or, they cover making someone do something sexual. This bad behavior has been talked about for a long time. People have seen it since the 1600s.

The talk about sexual harassment as a law problem started in the 1970s. In the 1990s, many countries made new laws. Big groups, like the #MeToo movement, helped people know about this. They made big changes in society and in laws. A lady named Mary Rowe first wrote about this in a 1973 report. She worked at a big school called MIT. Because of her work, MIT made rules to stop this bad thing. Back then, women groups in Massachusetts talked about this. At Cornell University, a teacher named Lin Farley heard women talk. They said they left jobs because men treated them badly. She and friends used the words "sexual harassment." They used these words to talk about the problem. Later, a writer named Susan Brownmiller wrote about it in 1999. This book told about women who became loud helpers. They were helped by a mom named Carmita Dickerson Wood. She was being treated badly by a teacher at Cornell.

Some brave women were Lin Farley, Susan Meyer, and Karen Sauvigne. They made a group called Working Women United. Another group was the Alliance Against Sexual Coercion. These groups helped show everyone about sexual harassment. This was in the late 1970s. Lin Farley wrote a book. The book was called Sexual Shakedown. It came out in 1978. This book helped make the first training video. The video was about sexual harassment at work. The laws about this grew from lawsuits. Women in the U.S. brought these cases in the 1970s and 1980s. These U.S. laws helped other countries too. Many women who sued were African American. They used ideas from civil rights. Early court cases helped set the rules. One case in 1976 helped show that firing someone was wrong. This happened if they said no to a boss's advances. In 1979, a smart writer named Catharine MacKinnon wrote a big book. She said some harassment was like unfairness because of sex. So, it was against a big law. She also named two kinds of harassment. They are quid pro quo and hostile environment. Her ideas were very important for laws all over the world.

In the U.S., laws about bad behavior at work got stronger. A case called Bundy v. Jackson in 1981 was very important. It said that sexual teasing at work was unfair treatment because of sex. Later, the big court, the Supreme Court, agreed with this idea in a case called Meritor Savings Bank v. Vinson. Another big case was Alexander v. Yale in 1980. This case said that teasing female students was illegal under Title IX. In 1988, a big group lawsuit started. Other countries also made rules. By 1994, many countries made laws against sexual teasing. By the year 2021, many, many countries had laws. These laws stopped bad behavior at work. Some laws stopped teasing based on who you love. Some laws stopped teasing based on who you are. The rules for what is bad can change. Laws look at rules. But smart people who study this look at the bad action itself.

In the 1980s and 1990s, smart people called psychologists named gender harassment. This was a kind of bad talk or bad actions. These actions hurt people because of their gender. Examples are mean jokes about sex. Or showing pictures about sex. Or making fun of people based on gender ideas. These ideas came from an old report. People do this for bad reasons. Two big reasons are sexist thoughts and controlling gender rules. These things make gender harassment keep old rules about gender. A smart law person named Katherine Franke called it a "technology of sexism." Gender harassment is not about wanting sex. It is not like asking someone for sex. This makes people confused. The word "sexual" makes it sound like wanting sex. But later ideas said it was about a man wanting to be in charge. Or wanting people to keep their place in society. So, it is about sex or gender. Not just about sex. Some laws say it is both sexual and based on sex. Some laws say they are two different things. Some people want to change the name. They want to use "sex-based harassment." This helps show that it is about gender. Not just about wanting sex.

In the late 1990s, some smart people said that the law should talk more about gender teasing. This was not many people's idea. Old laws about bad behavior at work often talk about gender teasing too. But, people think it is not as bad as other kinds of bad behavior. Still, smart minds like psychologists keep talking about gender teasing. They say this is the most common bad thing. It is very bad for people. It is also bad for groups of people. There is no one rule for what is sexual harassment. Different places have different ideas. Social scientists look at the actions and how they hurt people. They say it can be sexist jokes. It can also be unwanted attention. The law at work talks about asking for favors. It also talks about bad actions that make a place feel mean. Laws are different. They do not agree on everything. Sometimes, they only say it must be about sex. Other times, they say it can be about gender. Sexual harassment can also mean bad jokes. It can mean touching someone without asking. It can mean sending bad messages. These things make people feel bad. They can make people feel not respected. Because of this, many workplaces make rules. These rules help stop bad behavior. They also help people tell about it.

It is hard to know about sexual harassment. This is because it has many kinds of actions. Often, the person who was hurt finds it hard to say what happened. This can happen because the situation is hard to put into words. It can also happen because the person feels stressed or very ashamed. Also, the actions and the reasons change for every person. Many times, the people in the situation do not even call it sexual harassment. For women who went through things that fit the rules of sexual harassment, they only called it that time about 25 percent of the time. Men had an even lower rate. But, even if people do not call it sexual harassment, they still feel very sad and bad. This problem was found out after people saw that victims of rape also did not call it rape. The place and the power between the bad person and the good person change how people see things. Also, a person's gender affects what they call it. In the 1990s and 2000s, women who said it was harassment were sometimes called too sensitive. They were sometimes asked if they misunderstood the action. Some women called it "sexism" or something about the place, instead of saying "sexual harassment."

Some times, seeing a woman's chest area can be called sexual harassment. Scientists use a model called Fitzgerald's Tripartite Model. This model helps sort out different types of sexual harassment. It has three parts. These parts are gender harassment, unwanted sexual attention, and sexual coercion. Gender harassment means mean words about gender. It can be jokes or bad words about sex. This kind of harassment tries to make people feel bad because of their sex. There is sexist hostility. This means mean jokes about gender. There is also crude harassment. This uses bad words about gender or sex. Unwanted sexual attention is when someone talks about sex when you do not want them to. It can also be touching you when you do not say yes. Sexual coercion is when someone tries to force you into sex using threats or money. Gender harassment is the most common one. Coercion is the rarest. A model by Lilia Cortina shows this. It is like an iceberg. The easy-to-see parts are unwanted attention and coercion. But most harassment is hidden underneath. This hidden part is gender harassment. When women of color are harassed, it often includes race problems too.

Sometimes, when men hurt other men with words or actions, it is like a punishment. This happens because the other man does not act like a "normal" boy or man. The person who hurts might think that being gay, or being young, or not knowing much is bad. Women being harassed by men is talked about more. But, when women of color get harassed, people often forget it. This harassment often comes from racism. Poor Black women can get hurt more. But, people do not see them as victims. This makes it hard for women of color to tell about the bad things. Earlier studies said that all women had the same chances of being hurt. But, new proof shows that women of color face worse kinds of harassment. Race and gender change the harassment women of color get. If the person who hurts is the same race, women of color might not tell people. This is called a "code of silence." The race of the person who hurts changes this. Black women might not say something is harassment. This is because they get used to it. So, they think it is normal.

For women of color, there is something extra in sexual harassment. This is called the common bond factor. It means a man of color sees another person of his own race or culture. He then feels that it is okay to harass her sexually. He thinks that he can speak and act badly. He thinks that the law does not see this bad action. The feeling of harassment for women of color has racism and sexism. White women only talk about sexism. These two things mix together. This mix is called intersectionality. Women of color face harassment with racism and sexism mixed in. When white women talk about this, they talk as a victim. But women of color talk as if they are the harasser. Women of color also face stereotypes. These make it hard for them to speak up. People might not believe them. For example, some people think Latina women are too emotional. If a Latina woman speaks about harassment, people might not take her words seriously. Speaking out makes others use stereotypes on her. This makes her feel bad. Also, it is hard for women of color to get help. Their stories are different from white women's stories. Also, some groups help white women more. They do not see the problems of women of color. So, women of color do not join those groups. They do not see their own life in those groups.

A person's legal status can connect to sexual harassment. Your citizen status can change things for women who face or tell about sexual harassment. If you do not have papers to live here, it is hard to speak up. You might be scared of being sent away. White women with papers say that sexual harassment is bad behavior. Women of color without papers found it hard to explain what sexual harassment was. But they said it did include race. This makes it hard for Black women. They have trouble telling the difference between work harassment and street harassment. Martha Langelan talks about four types of people who harass. Men are more likely to be the ones who harass. A study in 2018 found that 82% of the harassers were men. Experts think that men harass because it shows power. This power helps their place in society. Because today's world gives power to men, harassment helps keep men's special power. This also explains why harassment often punishes people. It punishes them for not acting like "normal" men or women. People are more likely to harass when they have bad, sexist ideas. They might think men and women must stay in certain roles. But, what really happens depends on the place. If a work place lets harassment happen, it will happen. If a place favors men, harassment is also likely.

Bad behavior, called sexual harassment, is often about power. It also uses ideas about what boys and girls should do. Even if it seems like the bad person wants something sexual, it is often really about hurting someone. They hurt someone for not acting like what the group expects. It can also be about making women feel small just because they are women. Sometimes, this bad behavior is everywhere. It is not just for one person. It can happen in many places. This can be in a factory, a school, or a place like a movie theater. Often, the person doing it has more power than the person being hurt. Now, it can also happen online. For example, in video games or chat rooms. The EEOC says workplace harassment is when someone is harassed because of their sex. This includes bad talk or unwanted sexual things. Harassment is against the law. It is illegal if the bad actions hurt a person's job. Or if the bad actions make the work place feel scary or mean. The bad actions must be something the person did not want.

Different studies say different things. They talk about sexual harassment at work. Some studies say many women have been harassed. Other studies say some men have been harassed. A 2024 study found that many transgender workers reported this. Women made most of the complaints to the EEOC. But, only a few people tell their boss about it. Few people even file a big complaint. Bosses sometimes call it a small fight. Sometimes, people get bad things happen after they speak up. Many people who were harassed were fired. Or, they quit their jobs because of it. Most times, coworkers cause the harassment. The work place feeling is very important. Harassment is more likely where men are more than women. Or, if leaders are mostly men. If a place lets bad things happen, it is more likely. Restaurants and health care had many reports. For nurses, patients or co-workers caused it. In the army, supervisors often caused it.

Most mean words at work are about gender. Fewer people say they are forced to do things they do not want at work. This was only for about 4% of women. Many times, this bad thing keeps happening. Few people say it was just one time. Many say it lasted for weeks or months. If the bad thing was physical, it was different. About half of workers who complained said it was physical. Managers had a lower number of physical complaints. A study found that over half of bad things happened away from work. Some happened with letters or phone calls to the victim's home. In 1991, Anita Hill told a big group. She said Clarence Thomas harassed her. She said he asked her out many times. When she said no, he used work to talk about sex. Since Hill spoke in 1991, the words "sexual harassment" became known more people. The number of cases in the U.S. and Canada grew a lot. Now, people talk a lot about this. People care more about the rules against sexual harassment. Many schools focus on this topic.

Paula Jones sued President Bill Clinton. She said he did sexual harassment. This happened at a hotel in 1991. Jones worked for the state of Arkansas. After many court fights, the case ended in 1998. President Clinton paid Jones $850,000. But, he did not say he was wrong. A sexual bribe means asking for sex for a better job or more money. This happens at work. It means you must have a sexual thing with your boss to keep your job. This is called quid pro quo sexual harassment. Girl watching is a game men play. In this game, they look at women in a sexual way. This game is a kind of sexual harassment. It is common at work. Studies showed something interesting. When they asked women if they ever experienced sexual harassment, 24% said yes. But, when they asked if they had seen harassing behavior, 58% said yes. Beth Quinn studied this game. She found out more about girl watching.

Quinn found something important. She saw that some men thought this was just a game. They did not see it as hurting women. Quinn said that men could excuse bad behavior. They thought it was only a 'game' or 'playing.' Men also used jokes to bother women. With jokes, men could say rude things. If they got caught, they could say it was just a joke. They would tell women to relax. This kept the bad behavior going. This made it easier for men to bother women. It also made women feel they had to say no nicely. This just made the men try more. When Quinn asked men to think like women, they showed the hurt. The men said they would dress better. They said they would not get noticed by other men. This showed the harm of 'Girl Watching' to women. Quinn kept asking men about their feelings. She learned that men liked it when it was fun. But it stopped when a woman looked at them. Or when a woman spoke to them. This made the game feel strange. This was because men saw women as things to look at. As soon as women noticed, the game was broken. They were not seen as people with feelings.

Sexual harassment is not just about liking someone. It is often about power. Men sometimes use it to stay in power. They might harass others when they feel scared. They do this to keep their power. Men also do this to keep up their "man-ness." This is especially true if they feel their "man-ness" is in danger. They use it to show they are strong. This makes them feel better about who they are. When men feel scared, they might harass more. There is not an equal power between men and women. This is partly because men harass women to keep their power. Studies show this happens more in the army than in normal life. In 2018, many people in the US army were hurt. A study in Canada found some reasons for this. These reasons are the soldiers being young. Also, living in groups can make it worse. Women are a small group there. Many men are in big leader jobs. The army likes strong, usual ways of acting. They want people to follow rules. The risk goes up when the army goes on missions too.

Some men in the army can be bothered by bad behavior. But, women are much more likely to be bothered. Young women are also at more risk. This is true if they joined the army when they were little. Young people who are in cadet forces also have a bigger risk. In the UK, many complaints about hurting young cadets were seen since 2012. In Canada, one out of ten reports of bad things in the army comes from young cadets or their moms and dads. People who are kept by the army can also get this bad treatment. During a war in Iraq, soldiers from the US army hurt people in a prison. They did bad things like rape. Even though people know about this risk in the army, soldiers often do not tell about it. They are scared of getting in trouble. Women who are bothered by bad things are more likely to get sad feelings or sickness in their mind. Studies in the US found that if a woman is hurt badly, she has a much higher chance of getting PTSD after missions. Separately, on April 16, 2026, students from the University of Indonesia were stopped. This was because mean messages about girls were found online.

Sampling is very important for all kinds of research. It matters because it changes if the results can help everyone. It helps us understand sexual harassment better. There are two ways to pick people. They are probability sampling and non-probability sampling. Each way has good things and bad things. Probability sampling picks people by pure chance. This random picking helps make the results true for everyone. So, many people use this way. But, if we only study one place, the results only fit that place. For example, a study in a China office cannot help a US school. Also, if we pick too few people, we cannot say it is true for all people. Non-probability sampling picks people in a different way. This way is okay if there is no money or few people to study. The picking is not random. Often, they pick people who are easy to find. Many first studies used this easy way. They asked people at big meetings or sent notes in magazines.

When people study sexual harassment, the words used in the questions matter a lot. The way they ask things can change the answers people give. A smart person named Mary Koss studied this. She looked at how the words made people talk about sexual violence. Koss found a big problem. People thought that sex without saying yes was normal for men and women. This belief made the numbers about sexual violence look wrong. Some smart people think society makes people believe this. They think men are strong. They think women should follow them. This makes people believe bad stories about rape. It makes the real number of rape seem smaller. To fix this, Koss made new questions. These questions used neutral words. She talked to women college students. She found that the real number of rape was much higher. Her work showed that the words in the study are very important. Old ways of measuring were not good. They were not true or always right. So, they could not tell the real story.

In 1980, people first tried to make a way to count and name sexual harassment. Before there were clear rules, Till made a system. He used a small group of college women. He put different bad actions into five groups. These groups were: Gender harassment, seductive behavior, sexual bribery, sexual coercion, or sexual imposition, or assault. Later, in 1992, Gruber made another system. This system had 11 types of harassment. These 11 types were in three groups. The groups were: words asked, words said, and not showing. These early studies did not use perfect science. But they showed that sexual harassment was a big problem in society. Working Women's United (WWU) did one of the first big checks. They asked women about what happened to them. One hundred fifty-five women answered. Seven out of ten women felt this bad thing. They found that this happened in every kind of job. Women Office Workers (WOW) did a survey in 1975. They asked 15,000 women about their work feelings. One third of them said they felt direct sexual harassment.

Long ago, in 1975, people made a survey called the Redbook Survey. This survey asked women at a navy base about bad things. The bad things were called sexual harassment. Many people took the survey. Eighty-one percent of people said they felt this bad thing. Later, they used this survey in other places. This showed that the problem was big everywhere. From 1981 to 1987, a group made a new way to count this. They made a scientific survey for jobs in the government. They wanted to know about sexual harassment at work. They looked at old papers and talked to many people. They tested the survey on workers from different groups. They found seven bad actions. These actions were put into three groups. The groups were: not very bad, a little bit bad, and very bad. For example, very bad meant actual rape. The survey asked if people felt these things. They found that forty-two percent of women and fifteen percent of men felt this at work. They also learned who felt it more. They also learned what kind of bad thing it was.

Long ago, a report called the Uniform Crime Report (UCR) helped count crimes. This report tried to count rapes against women in the 1980s. But, people said the UCR was not always right. They said the UCR only counted crimes that people told the police about. Many rapes were not told. Or, the reports were mixed up. This made the numbers wrong. Later, in 1988, people made a new test. It was called the Sexual Experiences Questionnaire (SEQ). The SEQ was the first way to study this in a smart way. People took the test themselves. They chose an answer. The answers were: never, once, or more than once. The test used simple stories. It did not use the words "sexual harassment" right away. It waited until the end. This helped keep the answers honest. The test gave numbers and percentages. It was tested many times. It gave good and true results. Many places use the SEQ. People say it is the best tool. One question asked: Did a boss or work friend tell bad jokes to you? Even with praise, some people say the questions in the SEQ can trick people. Also, the way it counts scores only shows how often things happen.

Some people made a tool called SEQ-W. This tool helps look at three things. These things are: bad pressure for sex, unwanted looks at sex, and mean words about gender. Gender harassment means saying or showing mean things about women. This can be bad looks or mean words. Examples are rude signs, teasing, or bad words. This is the most common type of bad feeling. But people often ignore it. Bad pressure for sex means trading sex for good things at work. Another tool was called the Sexual Experiences Survey, or SES. This SES was made to count more about bad things. It used clear rules for rape. It asked many specific questions. The SES made more studies about rape happen. But some people said the SES was not perfect. They said the words were too big. These critics thought the SES counted too much rape. They felt it made women say they had bad feelings, but not really rape.

In 1992, a survey changed its name. It became the National Crime Victimization Survey, or NCVS. This new survey was better than the old one. The NCVS checks yearly. It tells us about crimes. These crimes are things like robbery or theft. It also checks on sexual crime. The NCVS has run since 1973. It uses the same ways to ask questions. This makes it special. It lets us see how often things happen over time. A group checked the NCVS. They wanted to check if it missed counting rape. They found some problems. These problems made the count of rape and sexual attack too low. One big problem was the words used. The words made people answer in different ways. People might not want to call something rape. Or they might fear that the person who hurt them would get punished. This made the answers wrong. Also, the NCVS did not keep people's secrets safe. The helper asked every person in a house. This meant everyone knew others were talking to the helper. This lack of privacy made people not tell the truth. Lastly, the NCVS had small definitions for rape. This made things confusing.

Two big surveys are NCVS and NVAW. We can look at both surveys. This helps us see what is good and what is not good about each one. The NCVS looked at 233 big schools in the US. These schools had 1,000 or more students. They used a special way to pick the schools. Then, they picked students from those schools. 4,446 students took the NCVS survey. The NVAW survey used the same picking way. But, the numbers were a little different. The names of the surveys were different too. NCVS called its survey "The Extent and Nature of Sexual Victimization of College Women." NVAW called it "Victimization Among College Women." They used similar ways to ask questions. Trained women asked the questions for both. They used a computer on the phone to ask. The NCVS interview took longer. It was 25.9 minutes. The NVAW interview was shorter. It was 12.7 minutes. Both surveys got most people to answer. NVAW got 91.6% of answers. NCVS got 85.6% of answers. Both surveys started with the same words. They said that the study wants to know about crime that happens to college women. They said that your answers will help them fix this problem at your school and in the country.

Two studies asked about rape. They used different ways to ask about rape. One study, the NCVS, used a big way to say what rape was. This meant it counted more things. Another study, the NVAW, used a smaller and more clear way. For trying to rape or just threatening rape, the NVAW used a bigger idea. It included when someone felt scared in their mind. Both studies asked women questions first. Then, if they said yes, they wrote a story about what happened. The rape numbers were lower in the NVAW study. This was because the NCVS used big ideas and confusing words. These differences show that how you ask questions matters a lot. The words you use can change the answers people give. Bonnie Fisher and friends made a new study called the NCWSV. This new study used simple questions about actions. The NCVS did not ask about rape when someone was sleepy from drugs or alcohol. The results were surprising. The NCVS missed almost all the rape cases that the NCWSV found. So, people think the NCVS needs to change or a new survey is needed to count sexual attacks right.

A survey called the Online College Social Life Survey asked people from 2005 to 2011. It asked about bad things like rape. People were asked things like, "Has someone tried to make you have sex, but you got away?" They also asked, "Did someone have sex with you when you were drunk or asleep?" This survey showed low numbers for rape. This is because it did not ask about unwanted touching or mean words. Other surveys were small. They only asked a few colleges. So, the answers were not for all college girls. Some studies tested ways to count things. These studies sometimes have bad ways of asking questions. This makes the answers wrong. The article says it is very important to measure things right. Good measurements help us know how to stop and treat sexual problems. One scale, the Bergen Sexual Harassment Scale (BSHS), has two parts. The first part asks about unwanted words or unwanted touching. The second part asks if you think you saw sexual harassment at work.

Maass and friends made a new way to check for mean behavior. They used a computer model. This model checked for "gender harassment" through actions. They asked men to pretend they were with a female partner on the computer. They wanted to know if the men would send mean messages. They found that men were more likely to be mean. This happened if the partner talked about things that made the man feel less strong or manly. This paper gives a new test. It asks men to think about pretend situations. Then, they pick what they would most likely do. They wanted to see if men would harass a female co-worker. This happened if the co-worker threatened their feeling of being a man. Mean talk in groups, like at work or school, is a big, old problem. People often ignore it. It is a big problem in our society. But, fixing it needs more than just simple rules. We must talk about it first. We must say that it is a big problem. Then, we must want to find real fixes.

When a workplace lets bad behavior happen, it is a big problem. If the bosses say loudly that they will not let bad behavior happen, it helps stop it. Leaders who really try to stop harassment will help the company change. They can make new, smart ways to stop it. Also, leaders show everyone how to act. So, their ideas about stopping bad behavior change the whole feeling of the place. This is very true for stopping harassment that hits people for many reasons. For example, if school leaders learn to support all students, it lowers trouble for LGBTQ students. How the company is set up also matters. If workers feel safe at their jobs, they get harassed less. A kind workplace also helps stop bad behavior. Making things fair for all genders helps stop harassment. Giving power equally to everyone, no matter if they are a boy or a girl, makes things better.

To stop bad actions like harassment, we must first teach people. We need to teach schools, colleges, and jobs about this. Some groups for young men taught good changes in behavior. Many student groups in the US have rules against hazing. Hazing can sometimes include bad actions. Big schools and groups have rules against hazing. These rules help stop bad times. Job training about bad actions is not always good. Some training teaches rules but not how to act better. Some studies say training can even make things worse. It can make men scared to talk to women. They might worry they will be blamed wrongly. This causes unfair treatment based on gender. Better training is hands-on. It should be made just for one job. It needs to last for many hours. Leaders must show why they give the training. It is also good to train just the bosses. This helps bosses feel like helpers. They learn new ways to fix the problem. They learn to treat people well.

Some proof shows that bystander training is better. It is better than regular training about bad behavior. Bystander training teaches good skills. These skills help people step in. They can step in when they see bullying or problems. These trainings do not make students feel scared. They teach good skills. They do not just say what to avoid. They see everyone as helpers. They do not see them as bad people. Good bystander training lowers bullying. This happens in schools. If people do not get help from the school, they help each other. They make their own safety plans. People have done big street protests. They used art to show people about street bullying. This made people less okay with it. Learning true stories helps people. These stories show how bad bullying feels for victims. Projects like HARASSmap collect these stories. This helps people learn. They learn to stop bullying where it is common. Using sound or video can help keep proof. Phone apps can record sound. This can help when someone is hurt. The feeling from bad things is different for each person. Many women said they felt angry, annoyed, or embarrassed.

Every year, bad things like sexual harassment stop women from doing things in society and work. This costs lots of money. But, men are also in these fights. Sexual harassment means unwanted things that cannot be allowed. If someone is hurt, there are ways to feel better. They can get help from friends and family. They can learn stress management or talk to a helper in therapy. This helps them feel good again. It helps them go back to school or work. A study found three ways women miners dealt with this. Some women, called "ladies," kept their distance. They were polite and did not act in ways men might misunderstand. Because of this, they got less bad attention. But, they also got the jobs that paid the least. Other women, called "flirts," pretended to like the bad comments. Because of this, people thought they were not very smart. So, they did not get chances to learn or grow in their jobs.

Tomboy women were single women. They were older than women who liked to flirt. These women did not like to act like typical girls. They liked to focus on their job as coal miners. They tried to be strong people. When men teased them, they used jokes. They also used funny words back. Sometimes, they talked about sex too. Because of this, some men called them bad girls. They thought these women broke the rules about sex. So, some men teased them even more. This study found that trying to fix it alone is hard. It might make things worse at work. Women who try to handle this by themselves are in a tough spot. If a victim tries something new, experts say it is wrong to put the blame on the victim. Being harassed can make you feel sad. It can cause worry or panic. It can make you lose sleep. It can also hurt your body. You might feel bad about yourself. You might feel angry or scared. You might lose trust in people.

People often treat people who speak up. This is true for victims of bad behavior. When someone speaks about sexual harassment, they might be called troublemakers. People might say they just want attention. It is like in cases of rape. The victim can become the person accused. People might look closely at how they look. They might look at their private life. They might attack their character. Some reasons for blaming the victim are their clothes or their actions. They might feel mean things from co-workers or teachers. They might feel left out. Sometimes, women do not help other women who were harassed. If the bad person was a man, some women might act mean. This could be because of jealousy. Also, some women might be scared. They might fear being targeted next. For example, when Lois Jenson sued Eveleth Taconite Co., women left her out. They left her at work and in the town. Sometimes, they might act mean to feel close to men at work. Retaliation means the victim gets bad things after speaking up. This could be bad report cards or bad grades. Their work might be ruined. They might not get jobs or chances to learn. They might even lose their jobs. This can happen if they tell about the harassment.

A writer named Naomi Wolf wrote in 2004. She talked about women who shared their stories. These women said their teachers had treated them badly. Naomi Wolf warned them. She said they should worry about making a report. She thought that what they feared might happen. She said that none of the women she heard from had a good result. Their outcome was worse than staying quiet. Some girls were kicked out of school by their friends. Many faced big paper problems. Some women lost their good student status fast. Money for school stopped coming. Friends would not write good letters. No one got a fair way to solve things. The leaders at the school or college often worked together. They worked with the teacher who was accused. They did this to keep the school's good name safe. They also wanted to keep secrets from other women. The goal was not to be fair. It was just to fix the bad news. Another woman said that talking about the crime was worse. It was worse than just being quiet. This stress is called backlash stress. It is stress from changing rules at work. Now, some men are afraid to be friends with women. They do not help women, like holding doors. Because of this, women have trouble finding friends and help at work.

Most companies have rules against bad behavior like sexual harassment. These rules should not try to control feelings or love. If someone tells about harassment at work, an investigation must happen fast. The check must gather all the facts. It must also take the right action. Then, they must tell the person who reported it when the check is done. The boss must help prevent this. The work place feeling and the work place must be safe. These things are very important. Sometimes, if there are few women at work, the risk is higher. The European Union says many women see bad behavior at work. To make it better, the company must change things. They must make clear rules against harassment. These rules can stop bad acts. They also give people a way to ask for help.

Dr. Orit Kamir says employers must make a clear rule. This rule must stop sexual harassment at work. It must also teach all workers about this rule. Many women like to complain at work. They want to fix the problem there. They do not like to tell everyone in public. They worry that friends or bosses might think they are bad. They want a simple fix. This fix should stop the bad action. It should also stop the bad person from coming near them. To go to the police is very hard. A person who is hurt must do three things. First, they must name the bad thing. Second, they must say who is to blame. Third, they must ask the big leaders for help. Sexual harassment is a bad job rule. It is a kind of hurting. It can be physical or in the mind. The law sees this as a big problem. It can happen at home. It can happen in the town. Or the government might let it happen. Sexual harassment means bad things in the town. It includes bad touching, bad words, and scary times at work or school.

Many places have rules against bad touching at work. The European Union has a rule about this. In the United States, the EEOC says it is wrong to bother someone because of their gender. In India, a case from 1997 made sexual harassment against the law. Israel also made it illegal for bosses to punish workers who said no. In 2002, the European Union made a rule. This rule stopped sexual harassment in jobs. It said this was a wrong based on gender. All EU countries had to make new laws. By 2005, China added rules about this. In 2014, Egypt made it a crime. The United Nations also has rules about this. These rules help keep women safe from bad treatment.

Bad actions about sex are not okay. These actions can be touching, saying bad words about sex, or showing bad pictures. This is done with words or with actions. This kind of bad behavior can make someone feel small. It can also be a danger to keep people safe at work. It is unfair if a woman thinks that saying no to bad things will hurt her job. It is also bad if it makes the workplace feel mean. Even if men do this to women, many laws say that men and women can both be the ones who do this or the ones who are hurt. However, most women tell people about this. Laws for this are different in many countries. In Egypt, many women said they were bothered by bad actions about sex. The government sometimes punishes women when they speak up. In Morocco, a new, stronger law was suggested in 2016. This law talked about fines and maybe jail time for bad actions. But before, the old law was not used well. People did not tell the police. And even when they did, the police did not check it. On June 1, 2023, a court in Morocco sent a man to jail for bad actions with a woman. One law, the Sex Discrimination Act 1984, says that someone harasses another person if they ask for sex things, or do other unwelcome things about sex.

In the big group called the European Union, there is a rule about bad jokes or actions at work. This rule is called Directive 2002/73/EC. It says that treating men and women equally is very important. Sexual harassment is not okay. It means any words, actions, or touching that makes someone feel bad about their body or their worth. It is done against their wishes. It makes the person feel small or hurt. Men and women are seen as equal. If someone tries to make things unequal because of being a man or a woman, that is sexual harassment. At work, jokes can be bad. But the boss must write a rule saying that the jokes are wrong. In France, there are laws for this. The old law said harassment was for getting sexual favors. Now, the law says co-workers can harass each other. A big court decided that the old rule was too fuzzy.

Abigail C. Saguy writes in her book. She talks about sexual harassment. She says that in French law, it is not like rape. It is not like touching someone. Instead, people use money problems or boss power. They use these things to make someone want to have sex. In 2016, leaders decided to make the law stronger. They made a new law called Sexualstrafrecht. This law now makes sexual harassment illegal. The law says that unwanted touching is harassment. But in 2020, they added "cybergrooming" too. Greece also made a law. This law says sexual harassment is unfair because of gender at work. People who are hurt can get money back. Before this, the rules were weak. Russia has a problem. Right now, there is no clear law. This law does not stop repeated harassment. It does not stop losing a job because of bad behavior.

A study in 1997 showed that leaders did not check or make rules for these problems. In 2008, a paper said that all women workers said their bosses harassed them. Also, 32 percent said they slept with their bosses. And 7 percent said they were hurt badly. There are rules in the big book of laws. These rules stop unfair treatment. One rule is in the Federal Constitution. Another rule is in the Federal Act on Gender Equality (GEA) from 1995. This Act says no unfair treatment at work. It wants everyone to be equal. Article 4 of the GEA talks about bad behavior. This bad behavior must be about sex. It hurts a person's feeling of worth at work. This bad behavior can be threats. It can be promising good things. It can be using force or pressure.

A rule called the Discrimination Act changed in 1986. It made sexual harassment a kind of unfair treatment. Harassment happens when someone does unwanted things. This can be because of a person's gender. It can also be unwanted things about sex. This behavior must hurt a person's feeling. It must make them feel scared, or treated badly, or made to feel bad. If a boss treats someone poorly because they said no to this bad behavior, that is also harassment. Now, a law called the Equality Act 2010 helps with this. This big law keeps many old rules together. It protects everyone's rights. It wants everyone to be equal. This law stops unfair treatment based on many things. These things include age, if you are sick, your gender, or your race. It also covers work, schools, and homes. Under this law, it is wrong to be unfair to someone for these reasons. It also tells big groups, like local councils, to think about fairness in all their rules. They must try to help everyone have a fair chance.

Even though there are laws, people are asking the UK government for more rules. These rules are to stop bad touching or mean words at work. A group called "This is Not Working" speaks up. They say that bad touching at work is still very common. China has a law from 2005. This law says that sexual touching against women is not allowed. But, this law does not say exactly what it means. People in China still face this problem. A survey in 2018 showed many female reporters felt this way. In Lebanon, a law was passed in 2020. This law made sexual touching a crime. Before that, there was no clear law. In India, this is called "Eve teasing." This means any unwanted, sexual behavior. This includes bad words or touching. The most important thing is that the person does not want it.

In 1997, a big court in India made rules. The Supreme Court made rules about sexual trouble at work. They also said what to do to stop it. They also said how to fix it. People call these rules the Vishaka Judgment. Later, in April 2013, India made its own law. This law is called The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act. This new law used many of the old rules. It helps make things fair for all girls and women. The law wants to help all women workers. This includes workers who are not in big offices. It also helps workers at home. The law says that sexual trouble is wrong. It breaks a woman's right to be equal. It also breaks her right to live safely and with respect. The law says these are human rights. Other countries also agree with this.

Some countries made new rules about bad behavior. For example, India made sexual harassment a big crime. This new law says that if someone harasses you, it is a crime. It can mean jail time or money. These new rules also talk about things like taking clothes off without asking. Another place, Israel, has a law against this. This law says that bad behavior is unfair. It hurts a person's right to feel safe. It also stops people from threatening you because of bad behavior. In Japan, people started talking about this a lot. A court case in 1989 was very important. A woman won her case. This was the first big law case about sexual harassment in Japan. After this, the law made two types of bad behavior. These types were called taika-gata.

In Malaysia, sexual harassment is bad behavior. It is any unwanted action that is about sex. This can be spoken, shown, or touched. This action must make someone feel bad, ashamed, or scared. The law does not care if the person is a man or a woman. It does not care if the boss does it or the worker does it. Sexual harassment can happen in many ways. To help stop this, trains in Malaysia have had pink cars just for women since 2010. Buses in Kuala Lumpur also have women-only cars. In 2011, the government started a taxi service just for women. These taxis have women drivers. Another study in 2018 found that some men and women faced bullying or harassment at work. The law also says that asking for sex, even in a small way, is harassment. The person who does the bad thing can be anyone. It can be a boss, a friend, or even a customer.

A safe place to work is very important. It must be safe for your health and safety. The workplace must have safe machines and buildings. It also needs safe ways to work. You must use, handle, and keep things safely. If you have a problem with your job, you can file a personal grievance. You can file this against your boss. You have 12 months time. This time starts when the bad thing happened. Or when you found out about it. If the problem is about sexual harassment, there are special rules. The Human Rights Act 1993 says it is illegal to ask someone for sex. This is true if you promise good things if they say yes. You cannot do things that make another person feel bad. This is true even if they do not say they feel bad.

Harassment is a bad thing. It is an act that hurts someone in their job. Pakistan made a law called the Protection Against Harassment of Women at the Workplace Act in 2010. This law says that harassment means many things. It means unwelcome sexual talk. It can be written words too. It can be actions. It can also be making someone feel bad at work. This law was the first big step in South Asia. It was made to stop sexual harassment at work. A group called AASHA helped make this law. Another law, the Penal Code, was also changed. This change let people report harassment everywhere. Police must write down these cases. After the President agreed on March 8, 2010, the Prime Minister made a group to watch the law. Dr. Fouzia Saeed led this group. The rules for using the law came out on January 15, 2011. This started the law working all over Pakistan.

The law to stop bad touching at work took ten years to make. People wrote many papers about it. They also wrote about trying to change the law. Maliha Husain wrote a big book. It looked at the law for ten years. It showed good things and hard things. The Anti-Sexual Harassment Act of 1995 was made. It was made to keep people safe. It kept the respect of workers, students, and people who want a job. This law has ten parts. It clearly says what is bad touching at work or school. It also tells the boss what they must do. It sets punishments if people break the law. A person hurt by bad touching can still ask for money in another court. A man named Derek Puertollano was fired. He broke the law of 1995. He was found guilty of touching someone badly. He was also guilty of touching or looking at people when they were not supposed to. This made the people who complained very sad. A man named Menardo Guevarra put a temporary helper in the empty office.

The Civil Rights Act of 1964 is a big rule in the United States. It says that people cannot be treated badly at a job because of their race, gender, skin color, where they are from, or their religion. This law is very important. At first, it was only about bad treatment for women. But now, it stops bad treatment for both men and women. Bad treatment means when a job only lets one gender work. It can also mean when a rule seems fair but stops one gender more than the other. This law only works for big companies. A company must have 15 or more workers. Some early cases helped teach this rule. The Supreme Court helped make things clearer. In a case called Meritor Savings Bank v. Vinson, the court said that bad behavior at work, like unwanted touching, is not okay. This bad behavior can make a workplace feel unsafe. The court said that because one person is boss to another, the boss's bad actions are not okay.

The Civil Rights Act of 1991 changed some rules. These rules protected women. They let women sue for bad treatment because of sex. They could ask for money for hurt feelings. A court case called Ellison v. Brady changed a rule. It said to look at what the person who was hurt felt. It did not just look at what a normal person would feel. Some smart people think this is not enough. They say the law must also look at many different parts of a person's life. Another case, Jenson v. Eveleth Taconite Co., was first. This made it easy for many people to sue together. Later, in 1998, more rules were made. These rules helped with money for mental hurt from lawsuits. Courts also said that bosses are responsible. They are responsible for bad actions by their workers. Also, a case called Oncale v. Sundowner Offshore Services helped. This set a rule for same-sex bad treatment. It said any bad treatment because of sex is wrong. This is true even if there is no "sexual desire." It only needs to make the person feel bad at work.

In a big court case in 2006, the rule changed. This rule was about when a boss could punish someone who said they were treated badly because of sex. The punishment could be any bad job choice. This was if the boss's action would stop a normal worker from complaining about unfairness. In 2007, many people filed complaints. They complained about sexual harassment at work. Another case in 2009 was about a worker who did bad money things and also sexual harassment. The court said that this worker must lose all his pay and extra money for being disloyal. The court said this was true even if the worker did other good jobs. In 2010, a case said that a bad place to work can have bad words or pictures. This bad feeling can happen even if no one person is the main target. From 2010 to 2016, many men filed complaints. A big rule called Title IX says that no person in the U.S. can be kept out of school or activities because of sex.

The big court called the U.S. Supreme Court said something important. In a case called *Franklin v. Gwinnett County Public Schools*, they said that regular people could get money if teachers hurt students with bad touching. Another case, *Bethel School District No. 403 v. Fraser*, said that schools can punish students. This is true if students use bad words or bad signs. These words must stop learning. Schools must also keep good values. Later, in 1997, rules said schools must take care. This is true if a teacher uses their job power to hurt a student. Also, schools can be blamed for mean things between students. This is true if the school leaders knew about the bad stuff. But they did nothing. Some ways to ask for help are mediation. You can also file with the EEOC. Or you can use a state law. Not all bad touching is enough for a big lawsuit. But often, many kinds of bad behavior happen. The law does not say there must be a minimum amount of bad actions.

The EEOC says it is wrong to tease or hurt someone at work. This is called harassment. Harassment can happen to any person. It can happen to any gender. The law does not stop small jokes. It does not stop little teasing. But, if the teasing is bad, it can make the work place feel scary. This is called a hostile work environment. The EEOC has rules about this. Sexual harassment has three kinds. Two kinds are called "quid pro quo." This means "this for that." It is like a bad trade. For example, a boss might say, "You get a raise if you date me." This is bad. The third kind is the hostile work environment. This is when the place feels mean all the time. If you feel this way, you must first tell the EEOC. Then, you get a paper to sue the company in court.

This is about bad things at work. This happens when someone hears mean words about sex. Or when someone touches you in a bad way. It can also be when people share bad pictures. This makes the work place feel scary. One small bad thing is not enough. The court must see if the bad things are "serious" and "frequent." Bosses, helpers, and even customers can cause this. Sometimes, two bad things happen together. For example, the job might get worse. A boss might threaten someone. The boss might say that if you do not do what he wants, he will hurt you at work. This is called "quid pro quo." If a person speaks up, and then gets fired, that is bad too. This means both harassment and firing for speaking up happened. In the US, there are no big laws against this. But, a special order from President Bill Clinton stops this for some workers. Small business owners must follow state laws too.

Retaliation means a bad thing happens to a worker. This happens after they speak up. They might report bad behavior like sexual harassment. Or they might help someone else with a complaint. Negative actions are very bad. Examples are being fired. Or getting moved to a lower job. It can also be not getting a raise. This bad treatment tries to stop workers from reporting unfairness. Retaliation is against the law. It is as wrong as the harassment itself. It is also hard to prove. Retaliation is illegal even if the first complaint is not proven true. New Jersey had strong rules against this. Before, the company could be blamed if a boss did the harassment. But in 2015, the rules changed. If the company had a good rule against harassment, they might not be blamed. The person who was hurt must still report it. The company is only blamed if the bad thing happens again. In January 2022, President Joe Biden made sexual harassment illegal under U.S. military law.

Sexual harassment is a big topic. People agree it is bad behavior. But the rules about it are hard to say. This can cause confusion. Some lawyers think the law limits free speech. Another expert thinks the rules make women seem too delicate. This is because they think women need special care. But these rules might hurt a company's money. Someone else says that being too nice can make people say bad things. They say that when you blush, people might want to act badly. Other people think that we talk too much about sex. They think we should talk more about bad actions at work. These actions stop men and women from working well together. One professor says that some harassment keeps important jobs for men. Another expert sees this as a split in ideas. One group likes sex. Another group is not so sure about sex. This split might be causing problems.

Some people worry about bad uses of the sexual harassment rule. People, or even bosses, might use fake or silly claims. They might use this to fire workers. They want to fire them for other reasons. These workers often have little help under the "at-will employment law" in most US states. O'Donohue and Bowers named 14 ways for fake claims. These ways are like "lying" or "gender prejudice." Others talk if clothes or habits make things feel too sexual. This can make some talks wrongly called harassment. But maybe it is just a normal reaction. Many people argue about how groups should handle this. Some people say groups must have a "zero tolerance" rule. This means they must report, must check, and must punish. Others say the person who feels hurt should have choices. Also, the rules can be used unfairly. Some thought that advances from a plain-looking co-worker felt worse. In 2018, Catherine Deneuve signed a letter. She said the #MeToo movement went too far. She called it a "witch hunt." Later, she said sorry to the victims. But she said there was nothing bad about harassment in the letter.

20th Century Fox Records was a small part of a big movie place. This place was called 20th Century-Fox. Its record history is long. It was from about 1938 to 1981. Before this, Fox Film Corporation made records. They used a sound system called Movietone. In 1929-30, Fox made music on discs. These discs went with movies in theaters. Between 1933 and 1937, a label called Fox Movietone came out. It had songs from Fox movies. These songs were sold only at Fox Theaters. In 1938, 20th Century-Fox made new records. These records had white labels. They showed typed words. These records were for fun. They were for people who visited the studio. They were not for everyone. Later, 20th Century-Fox stopped making these records. But their music part was still busy. They let others use their music for musicals and movie sounds.

Fox made a music company in South Africa. Fox also talked to Roulette Records. They wanted to make a team in the US. But the talks did not work out. So, Fox made their own company in the US. This company was called 20th Fox Records. It started in 1958. Henry Onorati led it. He came from Dot Records. He was hired to run the new music place. Onorati brought a song. The song was "Carol of the Drum." It was a Christmas song. It was recorded at Dot. But it was not sold. They changed it. It became "The Little Drummer Boy." 20th Fox sold it as a single. The Harry Simeone Chorale sang it. This song became very popular fast. It helped the company a lot. When Onorati was there, 20th Fox did many big things. The albums were for grown-ups. The single songs tried to sell a lot. But they did not sell much. 20th Fox albums often had fancy boxes. Sometimes, movie sound albums had talking parts. Other songs used old movie sounds. Glenn Miller and George Gershwin sang there. Later, in 1962, Onorati left 20th Fox. He went back to Dot. He last worked on a movie sound album. Then, Basil J. Bova took his place.

Basil Bova got a big job at 20th Fox. His first job was to stop rumors. People said the label would join with Cameo-Parkway Records. In May of 1963, Bova changed the name.
