He renamed it 20th Century-Fox Records. They changed the look to use the movie studio's sign. 20th Century-Fox was different. Their single music and album music were kept apart. The singles played fun pop songs. The albums were for grown-ups. This was part of a plan. Some albums were about hit songs. For example, *Sing We Now of Christmas*. Then, the *Cleopatra* album came out. It was before the movie. It did very well on the album chart. But the movie lost a lot of money. So, the studio had to save money. In 1965, they cut some parts. They closed the newsreel part. This stopped them from making some kinds of albums. They also stopped trying new music like folk music. From 1966, ABC Records helped sell the music. The label only made movie music albums. They also made a small new group called Movietone Records.

20th Century-Fox Records made some hit music albums. They released music for the movie *Valley of the Dolls*. They also released music for *Hello Dolly*. In 1970, the studio stopped the record label. ABC Records still sold old music from that label. The label was quiet from 1970 to early 1972. Then, it came back. Russ Regan made it 20th Century Records. He used one million dollars a year for three years. The first singers were The DeFranco Family, Maureen McGovern, and Barry White. But a group called Brighter Side of Darkness gave the new label its first big hit in 1973. The label also had big hits with Barry White. It also had the *Star Wars* music in 1977. They put out an album from The Alan Parsons Project in 1976. They also sold the song "Little Drummer Boy." This song made a big album. This album became the best selling Christmas album ever. Later, PolyGram bought the rights. They sold it on CD in 1988.

20th Century Fox made many movie music albums. These albums were for movies like Zorba the Greek. They also had albums for Doctor Dolittle. Fox did not release music albums for Rodgers and Hammerstein movies. Instead, Capitol Records made some albums. This was for films like Oklahoma! and The King and I. RCA Victor made the other albums. This was for films like South Pacific. Years later, the Capitol albums came back on CD. Angel Records made these bigger versions. Fox let the movies be seen by everyone. In 1966, Fox worked with ABC Records. This worked well until 1970. By 1970, Fox had money problems. So, the record company made no new music. ABC Records still sold old albums. But, no new things came out. So, 20th Century-Fox closed its music part. It started again in 1972. It was called 20th Century Records. They made a new blue label and a new sign. A man named Russ Regan became the new boss. This made them look good in business. The first two new songs sold very well.

In 1976, Russ Regan started his own record label. He called it Parachute Records. Another singer, Barry White, also made his own label. It was called Unlimited Gold Records. This was through CBS. Barry White left his old job in 1978. A company changed its name. It became 20th Century-Fox Records. They started a new deal for Carl Davis' Chi Sound Records in 1978. In 1979, another company called RCA Records took care of selling the music. In 1982, PolyGram bought the control of the label. Marvin Davis did not want the record company. So, they sold it. PolyGram had bought Casablanca Records before. All the songs and deals for singers like Stephanie Mills went to Casablanca Records. Later, PolyGram stopped Casablanca Records. They moved all the songs to Mercury Records. Now, Universal Music Group owns the old 20th Century-Fox Records songs. Fox Music handles the songs from movies. They let other people use them too.

In 1910, a new area called Stoke on Trent was made. It joined six towns. The hotel was picked for the first meeting of the local leaders. They did this so no one felt left out. Before that, meetings went to different town halls. Later, the leaders decided to stay in Stoke. The NSR wanted to rent the hotel. This did not work well. In 1923, the LMS took over the hotel. They found the hotel was not in good shape. When a rental time ended in 1931, the LMS took care of the hotel. They fixed the building a lot. The hotel grew bigger many times. They added rooms and kitchen space. Some new parts did not look like the old parts. This made different styles at the back. In 1972, the hotel became a listed building. It is in Winton Square. It is right across from the Stoke-on-Trent railway station. There are four listed buildings on that square. The station is also listed. A statue of Josiah Wedgwood is listed too. Also, some little houses by the tracks are listed. Winton Square is special. It is the only place in the UK where a railway company planned the town just for the station.

The hotel was once owned by British Rail. Then, it was sold in 1953. Now, a company called Britannia Hotels owns it. They bought it in 2002. It has 88 rooms for guests. Hester Maria Elphinstone was a smart lady. She was also a writer. She lived a long time ago. She was the first child of Hester Thrale. Hester Thrale was a writer and kept diaries. Her husband was Henry Thrale. Hester Maria married George Elphinstone. Samuel Johnson gave her a nickname. He called her "Queeney." She was born in a place called Southwark. She grew up near her family home. This home was in South London. Many smart people lived there. Hester Maria was very smart from when she was little. People thought she was a very clever child. She learned Latin with Dr Johnson. She also learned Italian and Hebrew. She was painted when she was two years old. She and her mother had a picture taken in 1781.

People wrote about Queeney's life. This was in books called The Family Book and Thraliana. Hester Thrale started these books. The Family Book told about Queeney's childhood. It told about what she learned. She learned many things, like languages, stars, and places. Thraliana talked about her liking for Mad Jack Fuller. He asked her to marry him. But her sister, Susannah, said no. Queeney's father died in 1781. After that, her mother married a music teacher. His name was Gabriele Mario Piozzi. This made people talk and caused a problem with Queeney. The new couple went far away for two years. From 1787 to 1793, Queeney did not talk to them. She lived in London by herself. She had a good friend to help her. On January 10, 1808, Queeney married Admiral Lord Keith. He was a famous man in the navy. He was 19 years older than her. They met in 1791. They wrote letters to each other for 16 years. They were a well-known couple. They had a daughter, Georgina Augusta. After Napoleon lost in 1815, Lord Keith stopped working in the navy. They lived on a big farm. They built a big castle there. Lady Keith lived for many more years. She passed away in London.

One lady is buried in Kensal Green Cemetery. Her grave has a big marker. This marker is special. It is a Listed Grade II. This means it has a nice, old style. Another thing is the "Queeney letters". These are many letters. Johnson, Fanny Burney, and her mother Hester wrote them to Queeney. These letters came out in 1934. Miles: The Autobiography is a book. It is about a man named Miles Davis. He was a jazz musician. The book came out in 1989. Davis wrote it with Quincy Troupe. In 1985, a magazine called Spin asked Troupe to write about Miles Davis. Davis liked Troupe's writing. So, a book company asked Troupe to help write the book with Davis. Publishers Weekly said the book was amazing. Francis Davis wrote about it for The Atlantic. He said the book was good at showing Davis's voice. But, he also said Davis was too proud. He also said Davis treated women badly. The book won an American Book Award in 1990. The sound book version was read by LeVar Burton. It was named for a Grammy Award. Paul Gégauff was a French writer. He wrote for movies. He worked with a director named Claude Chabrol. They made 14 films together.

Paul said that Gégauff is good at making things bad. He can make someone look silly and mean very fast. Paul Gégauff's first marriage to Danièle Gégauff ended with divorce. They had a daughter named Clémence Gégauff. Paul Gégauff died on Christmas Eve in 1983. His second wife was Coco Ducados. They had a bad time together. His last words to her were: "Kill me if you want, but stop bothering me." This article is short. It needs more words. San Agustin is a town in the Philippines. People there count to 23,698 in 2024. The town name changed to San Agustin on June 20, 1957. This was because of the town's special saint. Before, it was called Guintigui-an. People called it that because there were many fish called "tigue" there. First people lived there were Negrito and Mangyan tribes. They came from Panay and Mindoro. Later, people from Romblon and Tablas also came. The first home was in a place called barangay Cabolutan. The early people found it hard to cross the water to Romblon town. They needed to do town and church things. So, the leaders thought about building a small church in their place. Finally, in 1635, they started building a church with coral stone and lime.

In the year 1700, Spanish leaders made a big change. They wanted to separate Cabolutan on Tablas Island from Romblon. This meant the area near visita Cabolutan would control towns west of Tablas Island. The new town of Cabolutan grew slowly. Many people lived there. But, bad things happened. Moro raids often took people. Then, in 1790, a smallpox sickness came. This sickness almost took all the people in the town. Because many people died, the town was closed. Later, it went back to Romblon until 1855. Then, a new town called Guintigui-an was made. This new town was about 4 kilometers south of the old spot. Don Laureano Montesa and his family started this town. They were important people in Romblon. The town's area included places now called Calatrava and Santa Maria. A fort called Cotta was built at Payong-Payong hill in 1873. This Cotta kept the town safe from Muslim pirates. It still stands today. In 1868, a soldier named Andres Lebarde changed the town's name to "Badajoz." San Agustin is in the northeast part of Tablas Island. It is next to Calatrava in the north. It is next to Santa Maria in the south. Romblon Pass is to the east. San Andres is to the west. Its port is a way to get to the big Tablas Island. It is also a way to get to nearby islands.

A big mountain range keeps the town safe from the southeast wind. But, it is open to north-east typhoons. San Agustin has a tall mountain. This mountain is Mount Payaopao. It is 2,182 feet high. There are also health stations in different areas. Schools in the area are managed by one office. This office takes care of all schools. The cloud-forest screech owl is a type of owl. The cloud-forest screech owl is a small bird. It is about 20 to 23 cm long. A boy owl and a girl owl weigh a little bit. This owl is one of the smallest screech owls. It has a reddish face. The face has black edges on the sides. It has white stripes above its dark brown eyes. It also has short tufts near its ears. Its head and back are a reddish brown color. They have black spots. It has a light collar on its neck. When its wings are folded, you see white spots. Its tail has stripes. The owl's chest is reddish with dark lines. Its tummy is light color. It also has dark lines and thin stripes. This owl used to live only in Peru. It was in Pasco, Cuzco, and Puno. Now, since 2005, people see it in northern Bolivia too. It lives in cloud forest. This place is wet and has moss. It has ferns and thick plants on the ground. It lives high up, from 1,900 to 2,600 meters. The owl looks for food in the trees high up. It eats mostly bugs. We do not know much about when it has babies. It seems to have babies between late June and August. It builds nests in holes in trees. The owl sings a sound. This sound is like many steady "hoots." The sound gets louder, and then it stops fast. Sometimes, it also sings a short, trilling song.

The IUCN says the cloud-forest screech owl is Near Threatened. This means it is in danger. The owl has a very small home area. So, it can get hurt by any new dangers to its home. Karla López is a person. She used to be a Member of Parliament for the Swedish Green Party. She was born in El Salvador. She is the first person from Central America to sit in the Swedish Parliament. The Intelligent Ground Vehicle Competition is a big, yearly contest. It is for robot teams. These teams are made of college students. They can join two fun parts. This story is about a monk named Luang Pu Waen Suciṇṇo. He lived in Thailand. He was a Buddhist monk. He started his learning when he was only nine years old. His mom and grandma helped him start. He did not go to school much when he was little. But he studied something called mūla-kachai. This was a special study. Later, he became a full monk at Wat Saang Taw. A teacher named Phra Ajahn Waen guided him. After his first teachers left, he looked for a new teacher. He finally met a man named Ajahn Mun around 1918. In 1921, he met another respected man, Tan Chao Khun Upālī Guṇūpamājaan. Luang Pu Waen became a monk again. This time, he was guided by Tan Chao Khun Upālī Guṇūpamājaa. Later, in 1955, he met Phra Ajaan Noo Sucitto. This man asked him to stay at Wat Doi Mae Pang. Luang Pu Waen lived there until he passed away in 1985. He said that people who care for others only want money. He did not care about wanting praise or fame.

Luang Por Waen was a monk. He lived his life alone. He practiced in the forest. He liked to be by himself. He used a Thai word called 'Dhammo' in his talks. The word 'Maw' means 'drunken'. He called the 'Future' and the 'Past' 'Dham-Mo'. This means 'drunken Dhamma'. He called the 'Current Moment' 'Dhammo'. This means 'straight Dhamma'. He often said, "Do not think about the future and past. It is drunken Dhamma." He lived hidden in the countryside of Thailand. A pilot from the Thai air-force saw him meditating. This made him a very famous monk. The King, King Bhumipol, came to know him well. Later, the head of his temple, 'Wat Doi Mae Pang', had to limit the visitors. A doctor asked him about the air-force pilot. Luang Por answered, "Do you think I am a bird?"

The InterCity 225 is a fast train. It runs in Great Britain. It uses electricity. It is a push-pull train. At first, it had a Class 91 engine. It also had nine Mark 4 coaches and a DVT. The Class 91 engines came from an old plan called APT. The coaches and DVT were built by other companies. These trains could go up to 140 mph. But, they can only go up to 125 mph now. This is because of old track signs. They started running between 1989 and 1991. They ran on the East Coast Main Line. This line goes from London to places like Leeds and York. Later, they made the trains smaller. They had only seven coaches. This was to keep to the new train times. The train was important for this East Coast Main Line. Back in the 1950s, people wanted to make this line electric. But, politics made it wait for many years. So, they used other fast trains instead.

From 1976 to 1991, the ECML got electric power. People put up big wires, called 25 kV AC overhead lines. This work happened in two parts. First, from London King's Cross to Hitchin. This was done between 1976 and 1978. It was a big job. Next, in 1984, they started the second part. This went to Leeds and Edinburgh Waverley. In the late 1980s, this was a very big building job. It covered over 250 miles. In 1989, a new train, the InterCity 225, started working. That same year, the electric power reached York. Two years later, it reached Edinburgh. Electric trains could start on July 8, 1991. This was eight weeks late. The whole electric work cost £344.4 million. This was a little more than the planned money. A big part of the cost was for the new trains. Another big part was for the electric wires. They needed new, fast electric trains. They talked about the trains for many years. A train called the APT was shown on June 7, 1978. At first, they thought the APT would be the main fast train. But, because of some problems, the APT plan stopped in the summer of 1989. After that, they looked at two other ideas. One was an electric version of the InterCity 125. The other was a Class 89 train. Both were meant for the best service.

Some train workers at British Rail (BR) wanted better trains for the future. They wanted the trains to go very fast, up to 140 mph. To help this, they looked at old train ideas called tilting train technologies. BR's leaders thought about buying one Class 89 train first. But, a group asked why they liked the Class 89. They asked why not a big, strong engine called a Bo-Bo locomotive. The Class 89 was okay for many jobs. But, it was not much faster than the old Class 87 train. Old electric trains, like the Class 81 and Class 85, were getting old. But, they could not take them away. This was because they needed many electric trains. The InterCity 225 idea was better. It was lighter than the Class 89. Being lighter meant it could go faster and start faster. Also, the Class 89 was more costly. The InterCity 225 was cheaper because it could work with other train parts. They used much of the old APT's design for the InterCity 225. So, the group said the InterCity 225 was the best choice. The other ideas were stopped.

By spring in 1984, people liked a new kind of train carriage. This carriage could tilt. It was called the Mk 4. People thought it was better than the old Mk 3. This meant one design could work for two train lines. At first, they thought the InterCity 225 train could go everywhere. It might even go on a different train track. But by the middle of 1984, these big ideas stopped. They also decided the InterCity 225 train would not carry many heavy goods. The new Class 90 train was built. This made the InterCity 225 train need to be built less. If it did not tilt, it was not much faster than the Class 90 train. So, they started a contest for the InterCity 225 train. This was to avoid problems from a past train project. They made a paper with rules. These rules said the train must do many jobs. It must carry people day and night. It must carry mail and heavy goods. It must carry both tilting and normal trains. It must go very fast. It also had rules about its weight. They gave this paper to BREL, Brush Traction, and GEC.

A long time ago, on February 14, 1985, a board said something. They changed a train type. They chose Class 91 instead of Class 89 for the ECML line. The buying process was tricky. But GEC offered a help plan to BREL. This was very important. GEC’s idea won. After that, a contract was given. They would build 31 Class 91 trains. They also got an option for 25 more trains. In February 1986, BREL started making these trains at its Crewe Works. The InterCity 225 train started working on the ECML in 1989. These trains worked with other trains. They worked with Class 90 trains and Class 317 electric trains. The old diesel trains went to the Midland Main Line. When the InterCity 225 came, more people rode on the ECML. One station saw many more people. The InterCity 225 could go very fast. It could go up to 140 mph. In 1989, it was seen going 162 mph. Later, on September 26, 1991, it ran from London to Edinburgh. But now, the rules say trains need special lights in the driver's seat. These lights stop trains from going over 125 mph. This rule is true for most trains.

Eidsvollsbygningen is a very old house. It is in a place called Eidsvoll in Norway. This house is special. The big thing happened here. The Constitution of Norway was signed here. This was on May 17, 1814. Now, the State of Norway owns this house. It is a national museum. The building was first built in 1770. It is very big. Around the year 1800, a man named Carsten Anker bought it. He fixed up the house. He and his family lived there when the Constitution was signed. Later, in 1822, Carsten Anker had money problems. So, in 1823, other people who were owed money bought it. A group of people led by Henrik Wergeland helped buy it. They bought the house and the nice garden. This buying was done in 1851.

A big house called the manor used to be a home. Carsten Anker and his family lived there. Now, it is a museum. Long ago, in 1895, people fixed it. They did this for a big party. It was for the 100th year of a rule book, the constitution. Later, in 1964, they planned another fix. This was for the 150th year party. Both fixes wanted the house to look like it did in 1814. Then, in 2011, a new group started fixing it. This group was Statsbygg. They worked for the Ministry of Culture. The goal was to make the building look like 1814. The University of New Orleans, or UNO, is a big school. It is a public research university. This school is in New Orleans. It is in Louisiana, in the United States. UNO first opened in 1958. Back then, it was called Louisiana State University in New Orleans (LSUNO). Now, it is a very big public university. It is one of only two big research schools in the area. UNO is part of the University of Louisiana System. It is known for doing lots of research. The university has eight schools and colleges. These schools teach many things. They offer 46 bachelor's degrees. They also offer 40 master's degrees. And they teach 17 doctoral degrees. UNO has special classes. For example, they have the only mechanical and electrical engineering classes for beginners in New Orleans. They also have the only graduate classes for hotel and travel. And they have a special class for city planning. Also, it has one of the few schools for boat building and sea engineering in the whole United States.

UNO is a big school. It has a campus of 195 acres. This campus sits near Lake Pontchartrain. The school is in Gentilly, New Orleans. The East Campus has sports places. These places include Maestri Field and the UNO Lakefront Arena. UNO also has a place called The Beach. This is a park for science and new ideas. The school's sports teams are called the Privateers. There are 14 Privateer teams. They play in a group called the NCAA Division I Southland Conference. A man named Theodore M. Hickey was a State Senator. He wrote a law in 1956. This law started the University of New Orleans. At that time, New Orleans was big. It was the biggest city in the US. But it did not have a public university. It had other private schools. These were like Tulane, Loyola, and Dillard. This school was part of Louisiana State University. So, it was first called "Louisiana State University in."

The university was built near the water in New Orleans. This happened when the United States Navy moved away from Naval Air Station New Orleans. The Orleans Levee Board gave the empty base to the LSU Board of Supervisors. The fixing up of the place was faster than people thought. LSUNO started classes in 1958. This was two years before the plan. It was the first public university in the South where all races could go. For five years, it was like a small part of the big campus in Baton Rouge. So, its main helper was first called a dean. This was from 1958 to 1961. Then, it was called a vice president in charge. This was from 1961 to 1962. In 1962, a bigger group called the LSU System of Higher Education started. Because of this, LSUNO became its own place. To show it was just as important as LSU, the leader's name changed. It changed from "vice president in charge" to "chancellor."

In 2025, people who make laws in the state voted. They voted to put UNO back into the LSU system. This will happen in July 2026. At that time, the school might change its name. It might be called "LSU New Orleans." A long time ago, on August 29, 2005, the school got hurt. This was because of Hurricane Katrina. The main part of the school was on high ground. So, the damage came mostly from wind. It also came from rain water. And it came from people doing things during the big storm. The school was used for people to leave. It was also a place to plan things for the National Guard. A big wall broke on the London Avenue Canal. This was just a few streets south of the main school. This broke the first floor of some buildings. These buildings were the Bienville Hall dorms. They were also the Lafitte Village apartments. And they were the Engineering Building. UNO was the first big, hurt school to open again. It opened almost like it was only on the computer. This started with online classes in October 2005. The school was able to teach classes again.

A big storm called Hurricane Katrina hurt schools in New Orleans. The University of New Orleans, or UNO, was very hurt. This was like the whole city. UNO helps teach many students from New Orleans. After the storm, the number of students going to UNO slowly got bigger. It went up to numbers like before Katrina. Later, a sickness called COVID-19 made fewer students go to colleges everywhere. UNO was hurt a lot for many reasons. Some students who did not go to school in the usual way went to online schools. Also, UNO did not have many classes in person for regular students after COVID. Then, more big storms came later. These things made the student numbers at UNO very low. They were close to the low numbers after Katrina. Because of this, the new leader, President Kathy Johnson, started her job when things were already difficult.

UNO has many clubs. There are over 120 clubs and groups. Some groups are called fraternities and sororities. The UNO Student Government is the main student group. These clubs are put into groups. The groups can be about religion. They can be about honor. They can be about politics. They can be about jobs. They can be for fun times. They can help people. Some groups have special interests. The University Center is a big, fun place at UNO. It is like the heart of student life. Inside this building, you can find places to eat. There is also a big dance room. You can find the UNO Bookstore there. Many meeting spots are also in this center. Important offices are here too. These offices help students. For example, there are places for talking to counselors. There are also places for job help. Student groups and student leaders meet here. The student government is also in this building. You can find the student pantry there. There is also a health clinic. The lobby has a big, open area. Flags hang down there. These flags welcome new students from other countries. The Administration Building has two parts. One part is the old building. The other part is a new addition. Many school offices are in this building. But these offices are usually for school rules.

The college has three places for students to live on campus. These are all on the main campus of UNO. Before two halls called Pontchartrain Halls were built after a big storm named Hurricane Katrina, students lived in a building called Bienville Hall. After this, the main living part of the building closed in 2010. People took down the old building in 2023. On that spot, they built a school called Hynes-UNO Charter School. But, the back part of the building was not taken down. That back part was used for workshop things. It is also used for storing things for the Engineering Building. The college's food service is run by Chartwells Higher Ed. This group is part of Compass Group. They take care of all the eating places on campus. This includes the big cafeteria with food you can choose from.

The University of New Orleans has 14 sports teams. It is in a big group called the NCAA. This group is called Division I. They play in the Southland Conference. UNO first tried to move to a different group. This group was called Division II. On February 1, 2011, a man named Joe King sent a plan for Division II. Before that, UNO was in Division II from 1969 to 1975. Later, on March 9, 2012, the President said UNO would stay in NCAA Division I. They thought about the Sun Belt or Southland Conference. Then, on August 21, 2012, UNO said they would join the Southland Conference. This would start in the 2013–2014 school year. In November 2022, the students voted. They voted against paying more money. This money was for adding football, women's soccer, women's golf, and marching band.

The fight song for the University of New Orleans is "Let's Hear It For UNO." Someone named Lois Ostrolenk won a contest in 1981. This song became the official song. Before that, they played music from "William Tell Overture." They still play a little bit of that old music to remember it. UNO has many fun sports for its students. These are called club sports. All UNO students can join. They can join if they are interested. Some fun sports are called active club sports. Also, there is a place called the University of New Orleans Research and Technology Park. This park has many companies in it. These companies work with the university. They work together to learn new things. They also give training. They help with learning chances. The companies get many help things from the university. These things include the school library and fun places to play.

The SBL is a book. It is an English Dictionary of Swedish National Biography. This book is about people in Sweden. It started in the year 1917. The first part came out in 1918. This first part had names from Abelin to Anjou. As of 2017, the book had names from A to S. The Brownsville Area School District is a place. It is in two counties. One county is Fayette County in Pennsylvania. Here, it covers Brownsville and Brownsville Township. It also covers Luzerne Township and Redstone Township. In another county, it is Washington County in Pennsylvania. Here, it covers a part of West Brownsville. This school district is about 57 square miles big. In the year 2000, it had 15,097 people living there. By the year 2010, the number of people changed.

A group called the Pennsylvania Budget and Policy Center looked at school students. They saw that in 2012, many students in the district were poor. Almost 65% of the students lived at or below a certain poor level. This was seen by who could get free school meals. Next, in 2013, the school department said many kids were homeless. In the Brownsville Area School District, 73 students were without a home. In 2009, people living in the district made about $15,486 each year. A whole family made $32,956 a year. In the whole state, a family made $49,501. In the USA, a family also made about that much in 2010. In Fayette County, a home made $39,115. By 2013, the USA average home made $52,100. In 2014, the USA average home made $53,700.

Brownsville Area School District has schools. It has one middle school. It also has one high school. These two schools are in one big building. There is also one elementary school. This school is on a different part of the land. High school kids can go somewhere else. This place is called the Fayette County Career and Technical Institute. They can learn trades. These trades are building things and fixing machines. Another group helps the district. This group is called the Intermediate Unit IU1. IU1 gives many helps. For example, it helps students who are disabled. It gives help for hearing problems. It also does checks for people who work there. They teach about child abuse. IU1 helps with speech problems. It also helps with sight problems. The district started in the year 1966. It came from three old school districts. These were the Brashear, Redstone Township, and Luzerne Township School Districts.

The Brownsville Area School District has many fun clubs. It also has many activities. They have a big sports program. The district pays for this program. Some schools are closed now. For example, Cardale Elementary school closed in 2012. The building was sold that year. It was at 112 Thornton Road. This school was built in 1962. The district also closed other schools. These were Colonial Elementary School and Hiller Elementary School. Redstone Middle School also closed in 2001. Back in 1966, the state of Pennsylvania made a rule. This rule said that Redstone Township schools must join the Brownsville Area School District. This started in the 1967 school year. Separately, there is a movie. The movie is called Kannad Gothilla. It is a thriller film. It is in Kannada language. Mayuraa Raghavendra wrote and made this movie. It was his first time making a movie. Kumar Kanteerva made it. The movie stars Hariprriya and Sudharani. Someone scored the music for the movie.

A film was made by Kumar Kanteerava. People heard about this film on September 6, 2018. The film started to film on that same day. The filming finished on December 19, 2018. The film makers said they are looking for new singers. These singers will sing the song for the film. The team put the song for the title track on PRK Audio Channel. Nakul Abhyankar made the music for the film. PRK Audio bought the music rights for the film. The film was first set to come out on November 15, 2019. But, it was moved to November 22, 2019. When it came out, people gave it mixed reviews. This article is about a Kannada film from the 2010s. You can help Wikipedia. You can add more missing facts.

Chepauk-Thiruvallikeni is a place name. It is a part of the State Assembly in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu is in southern India. This area has number 19 for its State Assembly Constituency. It is also part of the Chennai Central Lok Sabha area. The Delimitation Commission made this area. It is made up of some wards. These wards are 79, 81, 93, 95, and 111. Another story talks about a big fight. This fight was the Second Battle of Kut. It happened on February 23, 1917. The fight was between British people and Ottoman people. This happened at a place called Kut. Kut is in Iraq, which was part of the Ottoman land. The battle was part of a big trip. The British wanted to go to Baghdad. This trip started in December 1916. A big army of 50,000 men went. Most of these men were from British India. They were put into two army groups.

The British people came back to the city. Frederick Stanley Maude led them. But the soldiers of the Ottomans did not get trapped inside. This was different from last year. Last year, the Ottomans surrounded Kut. The Ottoman leader, Kâzım Karabekir Bey, helped his soldiers. He made a good escape from the town. His soldiers were about 2,500 people. The British followed them on the Tigris River. The British stopped moving on February 27. This was at a place called Aziziyeh. It was about 100 kilometers away from Kut. After three days, they had enough food and things. Then, Maude kept walking toward Baghdad. The main goal was a liquorice factory. This factory was on the other side of the Tigris from Kut. This factory, and the walls around it, were the last Ottoman places.

The British made new holes in the ground. These holes were trenches. They were made on January 21. These trenches were only 300 yards away from the enemy's trenches. There were four rows of these trenches. They were named "Baron's Trench," "Queen's Trench," "King's Trench," and "Emperor's Trench." The 39th Brigade lived in these trenches. They planned an attack for the next day. But, the attack was stopped for three days. This was because of much rain. Then, on January 25, 1917, the Ottoman lines were attacked. This was north of a place called Kala Haji. At 9:40 in the morning, the 9th Worcestershires and the 7th North Staffords attacked. They had big cannons that shot lots of big things. This help let the two groups get very close. They got within 50 yards of the Ottoman trenches. They took the place they wanted. They did this even though many men were hurt.

A Turkish group attacked the British soldiers. The British soldiers ran away because of bombs and mortars. To fix the problem, a man named Lieutenant Colonel Henderson helped. He was from the North Staffords. He led the 9th Royal Warwickshires. They came from the reserve group. He attacked the spots again. He did this even though he was already hurt. Henderson led the Warwicks across a big, open space. The first group of attackers were running away. He got hurt again. But this did not stop him. He led a charge with bayonets. They took back the spots they lost. While setting up a defense, Henderson got hurt two more times. His helper, Lieutenant Phillips, saved him. Then, Henderson passed away. Both men got the Victoria Cross award. Phillips also tried to fix the talking lines. He unrolled a field telephone cable in the open. Corporal Scott also helped save Henderson. He got the Distinguished Conduct Medal.

At 10:40 am, two groups fought. These groups were the 1/4 Hampshires and the 82nd Punjabis. They attacked the Turkish spot. This attack came after a big shooting before. Many people were hurt. This was on the ground between the sides. The 82nd Punjabis lost many people. They were hurt or died from Turkish guns. The attack worked well. They took the small Turkish ditches. These ditches had many dead people. This happened all day. The Turks kept shooting with their guns. At night, the whole 82nd group dug trenches. These trenches connected the taken ditches to the British lines. The Hampshires stayed at the front line. The Punjabis got to rest starting on the 28th day. They went to a camp behind friendly lines. On the morning of the 28th, some Hampshires took the enemy's next line of ditches. They found this by looking first.

At 2am on the 29th, some brave Sikhs moved in. They sent two groups. Each group had about 50 men. They went into the trenches at P16 and P13G. For the rest of the day, they worked hard. They made the trenches better. They also made new paths to walk. At 6pm, big guns from Britain shot at the Ottoman spot. At 6:15, while the guns were firing, they cleared P13G. They used small bombs called grenades. The Turks knew this attack was coming. They hurt 58 people with their guns. The shots were hard to find. The main front line was called Gunning Trench. British guns shot sometimes. The Turkish guns shot all the time. These shots were very good. This kept happening until the 31st.

On February 1st, at 12:10 in the afternoon, two Sikh groups attacked the next line of trenches. These trenches belonged to the Ottomans. The Sikhs crossed open ground. They were hurt a lot. Turkish guns and machine guns made it hard for them. But the few Sikhs left fought back. They used bombs and bayonets. They made the Turks run away. They moved into the second line. But they could not stay there. They did not have enough men. Over 400 Sikhs were hurt in the first attack. An Ottoman group attacked them near point N28. This made the Sikhs go back. The 36th group was small. They had only three British officers. They had one Indian officer. They had 85 men left. Other groups helped them. These were the 1/4 Devons and the 1/2 Gurkhas. They also got help from transport. That night, they took the hurt men to care. The Sikhs walked to the big camp. They rested there.

Fighting stopped on the 2nd of February. Some loud gun sounds came from the British in the middle of the day. The 1/4 Devons stayed near Gunning's and Matthew's trench all day and all night. They also brought big bombs from their own safe places. They dug a new trench called Warwick street. This trench ran along the side of the Shatt-al-Hai. They dug it for 504 more steps. At night, some groups walked around. These walks did not help much. The 1/4 Devons and 1/2 Gurkhas got orders for an attack the next morning. By 8:30 in the morning, the Devons and Gurkhas were ready for the attack. The attack was planned for 9:40. But at 9:26, they heard that the attack would be late. It would be delayed by one hour. Their goal was the Ottoman front line. They wanted the strong hill at N27. They also wanted the two lines just to the west of that hill.

The Ottomans would leave the liquorice factory by February 4th. The 1/2 Gurkhas saw this. They saw men from the 8th Brigade. These men were on the east side of the Hai. They walked into the Turkish lines without any fight. At night, the soldiers on the front line on the west side moved forward. They moved by about 1300 yards. The Gurkhas took a spot at N21k. The 82nd Punjabis would take their place. They found that only a few snipers and a small group of Ottomans stayed at the factory. These people were in strong spots. On the 6th, the 82nd sent small guards to N19a, N19b, and N20. The guard sent to N19b was dead. The other two spots were dug in. They planned an attack on the factory. But they stopped the attack on the night of the 7th. One company was sent to N18a.

A company of the 62nd Punjabis took the candy factory. They also took the market next to it. This happened on February 10th. The British shot at them a lot. The buildings were almost all broken. Only a few houses were still standing. The Turkish walls were mostly okay. But there were no Turks inside them. People found things that could help build bridges. This showed that the Turks crossed the Tigris River to Kut at night. The British-Indian army now held the side of the Tigris River. This was from a spot called M10 to the Hai. On February 15th, many soldiers attacked a bend in the Dahra. They did this after big shooting from cannons. They took spots that night. Also, a group of horsemen went further west. They took the Massaq Canal. This canal goes into the Tigris River.

The Turks were taking their soldiers away from the Sannaiyat defenses. This was maybe because Kâzım Karabekir Bey thought the place was alone. He thought the British would attack it. On February 17th, the 21st Brigade attacked the Sannaiyat spots. This brigade was part of the 7th Division. They did not use big bombs first. So, they had a surprise. But, they still had guns shooting from the other side. The soldiers attacking were slowed down by the mud. But, they still got to the front trenches. While waiting for help from the 19th Brigade, the Turkish guns shot well. Also, the Turks pushed the 21st back to their own trenches. There, they got mixed up with the 19th. No more attacks could happen. This was because they needed to make things orderly. The big push was not a success.

In the 1800s, an Indian group was fighting. They were near the 1st Seaforth Higlanders. Two men, Sergeant Steele and Private Winder, helped out. They took a machine gun. The Indians were taking it away. These two men made the gun work. They put it in a gap in the line. This helped stop the Turkish people from moving forward. This let the Indian group get ready again. For their quick help, Steele got a Victoria Cross. Winder got a Distinguished Conduct Medal and a Médaille militaire. It rained a lot from February 17 to February 21. So, more fighting stopped until the 22nd. Then, the 7th Division broke through to the second-line trenches. They stayed there to be safe. They lost 1,332 people who were hurt.

After fighting in Sannaiyat, Maude changed his plan. He looked at the Hai area. He planned to move forward from there. This made Kâzım Karabekir Bey do something. He moved his men across 25 miles. This was on his side of the Tigris river. He did this in case the British crossed. This helped Maude a lot. It made it more likely that he could have more soldiers than the enemy. On February 16th, Bey saw a danger. The danger was near Kut and Baghdad. So, he told the XIII corps to go back to Baghdad. This corps was going to meet Baratov's move. But, the corps did not arrive with many strong men. They arrived because they did not have enough things. Now, Maude focused on crossing the Tigris river.

The crossing started early. It was at 5:30 am on February 23rd. Major Campbell Wheeler led this crossing. He was from the 9th Gurkha Rifles. The plan was to build three bridges. These bridges were long. They were 1,000 feet long. Before, they practiced on a smaller water spot called Shatt-al-Hai. Each big bridge part had 13 pontoons. Each pontoon had 10 men. These men had 5 rowers each. Two pontoons were for gun guards. Two other pontoons were for men who dropped things. Many rowers were from Southampton waterboatmen. They were part of the 1/4 Hampshires group. A plane watched the soldiers. The plane watched until 5:00 pm. Then, a German airplane flew up. Major Wheeler led the first bridge part. He had three second lieutenants with him. He started at 5:30 am. But he waited 15 minutes. He waited until the other side was seen in the morning light. Halfway across the river, they met fire from Turkey. This fire got stronger as they kept going. They reached 10 pontoons.

The pontoons kept moving men and things across the river. They did this even while they were being shot at. Some pontoons were lost in the strong water. By the middle of the day, a bridge that was 300 yards long was finished. Then, some soldiers from the 14th division started to walk across. The Ottomans made it hard. They threw wood into the river. This stopped the building of two other bridges. By 3 o'clock in the afternoon, three groups of soldiers crossed. They made the bridge safe. By midnight, the whole 14th division had crossed the river. This crossing cost 350 people who were hurt or died. On the evening of February 24th, three small boat guns called Butterfly, Gadfly, and Snakefly were there. Three bigger boat guns named Mantis, Moth, and Tarantula were also there. They stopped near Kut. They raised the Union flag in the town again. The town was very quiet. It was empty. Only cats ate the dead things. The smell of death was everywhere.

A big car race happened. It was the 34th International 500-Mile Sweepstakes. This race was at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway. The date was Tuesday, May 30, 1950. The AAA ran this race. It was the biggest race for the 1950 AAA National Championship Trail. This race was new. It counted points for the World Drivers' Championship. The race was meant to have 200 laps. This was 500 miles. But, the race stopped early. This happened because of rain. It stopped at 138 laps. This was 345 miles. People said something about Johnnie Parsons. They said his team found a big crack. This crack was in the engine block. This was on race morning. This finding supposedly made Parsons charge for the lap leader prizes. He probably wanted to lead many laps. He did this before the engine would break. The race stopping early because of rain was good for Parsons. It saved his day.

Parsons won a big race. He scored 9 points. This put him in a tie for first place. This was after 3 races in the Formula One season. It was the first World Drivers' Championship. He tied with Nino Farina and Juan Manuel Fangio. This was also big news. It was the first time an American won a World Championship race. Parsons is one of only three drivers. These three drivers won their first World Championship race. The others were Farina. He won the first race. This was the 1950 British Grand Prix. Giancarlo Baghetti is the third. He won the 1961 French Grand Prix. Even though the 500 race was his only race in the 1950 World Championship, it was good enough. It helped him finish 6th in points for the whole championship.

Clark Gable and Barbara Stanwyck were at the racetrack. They were there to film a movie. The movie was called To Please a Lady. Barbara Stanwyck waited in the winner's area. She was waiting for the happy kiss for the winner. In the year 1951, a young man named Mario Andretti saw the movie. He saw it in his home country, Italy. There, the movie was called Indianapolis. This movie showed the future champion. He was the Indianapolis 500 winner. He was also a four-time National Champion. The race had time tests for six days. All people used Firestone tires. The Indianapolis 500 was part of a big world race. This was from 1950 to 1960. AAA ran the race until 1955. Then, USAC ran it starting in 1956.

Drivers in the Indianapolis 500, from 1950 to 1960, got points for a World Championship of Drivers. But, the race cars were not always built for Formula One rules. The drivers also got separate points. These points were for the AAA or USAC national championships. The FIA did not give points for the World Constructors' Championship. The 1950 Indianapolis 500 was the third race of seven for the World Championship. However, the race did not get much interest from usual racers. Giuseppe Farina and Franco Rol brought Maserati cars. But, their cars did not show up. So, there were no European racers in the race. The winner, Johnnie Parsons, earned 9 points for the World Championship. He got 8 points for coming first. He also got 1 point for the fastest lap.

Before the big race, people said Slater might not race. He was sick. So, Sid Collins was named to take his place. But, Slater came to the race on time. Collins used to be a reporter about turns. Now, he was asked to be the co-anchor in the booth. This was new for Collins. He interviewed the winner in victory lane after the race. Collins said he burned his pants. He burned them on Parsons's hot pipe. This happened during the interview. It was raining when this happened. Because the race was cut short, Mutual had to stop Queen for a Day. They had to cover the end of the short race. Some people thought this was a reason. This reason helped the Speedway start flag-to-flag coverage in 1953.

The race was shown on local TV. This was for the second time in a row. The TV station was WFBM-TV on channel 6 in Indianapolis. Earl Townsend Jr. was the announcer. Dick Pittenger and Paul Roberts also helped. After the race, the track bosses said no. They would not let WFBM show the race live again. They felt that the low crowd made things bad. Another place is the Cartwright Long Range Radar Site. This site is from the Royal Canadian Air Force. It is far away. It is east-northeast of CFB Goose Bay. This site has a big radar. The radar is called AN/FPS-117. It looks for planes in three ways. They put it in in November 1998. It was part of the North Warning System. The site also has radar towers. It has a place for talking. It also has a place for keeping things.

This article is short. You can help Wikipedia by adding more words. Another article is also short. It is about the body parts. You can help Wikipedia there too. James Bond Jr. is a cartoon show. It is about James Bond's nephew. This show is based on stories by Ian Fleming. It is an American cartoon. Murakami-Wolf-Swenson made it. Danjaq also helped make it. The show started on September 16, 1991. It had 65 episodes. It ended on December 13. This is the first cartoon from this story group. Before this, someone planned a show. The name was James Bond vs S.P.E.C.T.R.E. This show never came to be. Later, EON Productions started planning James Bond Jr. They worked with Murakami-Wolf-Swenson and MGM Television. Danjaq gave them the right to make it.

James Bond Jr. goes to Warfield Academy. He works with his friends. His friends are IQ, who is Q's grandson. Another friend is Gordo Leiter. He is Felix Leiter's son. The last friend is Tracy Milbanks. Together, they fight a bad group. This group is called S.C.U.M. S.C.U.M. means Saboteurs and Criminals United in Mayhem. They are like a bad movie group. James says his catchphrase. It is "Bond, James Bond... Junior." This reminds people of his uncle. The show has very cool gadgets. But, it does not have much fighting. Some bad guys from the real Bond movies show up. These bad guys are Jaws, Nick Nack, Julius No, Auric Goldfinger, and Oddjob. Many episode names are funny like the old movies. S.C.U.M. is a world bad group. They are the main bad guys in the show.

The S.C.U.M. has some main members. Here are the small S.C.U.M. members. Most shows of James Bond Jr. were only on TV. They were not sold in stores to watch later. On April 1, 1992, eight small VHS tapes came out in the USA. The next year, six big tapes came out in the UK. In 1992, Puffin Books gave out six storybooks. These books were about James Bond Jr. John Peel wrote them. He used a fake name called John Vincent. One year later, Buzz Books made a different set of books. These books were from the TV show. Caryl Jenner made these. They were much shorter. They were for kids. Marvel Comics made a comic book series. This was for James Bond Jr. It was from January to December 1992. The first comics were like the TV show. The other seven comics had new stories.

Two video games about James Bond Jr. came out. One was a platformer for the NES. Another was an action game from Gray Matter. Both games came out in the year 1992. THQ was the company that sold them. People did not like the games much. The NES game first started as John Smith, Special Agent. Taxan was supposed to sell it. The SNES game was made from an older game. That older game was called Captain Planet and the Planeteers. Mindscape was supposed to sell that game. Ejikeme George Nzerem is a person. He is a journalist. He is a TV star and a movie maker. He is famous for his work on Channel 4 News in the UK. He worked as a news anchor and a reporter there. He started this job in 2001. Nzerem was born in Lusaka, Zambia. His father was from Nigeria. His mother was from America. He grew up in many places. He lived in Zambia. He also lived in Northern Ireland, Yorkshire, and London.

Nzerem went to a school. It was Thomas Tallis comprehensive. He studied hard. In 1995, he got a very good degree. The degree was in Geography. It also covered Africa and Asia. This was from the University of Sussex. Later, in 2000, he got another paper. It was about Broadcast Journalism. This was from City University. In 1998, after school, Nzerem worked for a good cause. The cause was called Comic Relief. He helped start a website. This website taught about being anti-racist. In 2000, while he studied journalism, he got work time. He worked at Channel 4 News. This news place was made by ITN. After school in summer 2000, Nzerem helped start the new News Channel. Then, in 2001, he moved to Channel 4 News. He worked there as a sports producer and a presenter. A little time later, a friend from school was caught. This friend was trying to blow up a plane.

In 2003, Nzerem got a job. He became the producer for Channel 4 News about home things. In 2005, he got another job. He was the Washington producer and reporter. PBS also showed many of his reports. For example, he reported on Hurricane Katrina. In 2007, Nzerem moved back. He went to Channel 4’s news room in the UK. Then, he went back to Washington. He covered the big election of Barack Obama the next year. He won an award for his story about US soldiers in Iraq. He also started showing a show called More 4 News. Later, he covered the football World Cup in South Africa in 2010. He then covered the Sochi Olympics and Paralympics. He also covered the London 2012 Olympics and Paralympics. He reported on bad money use in FIFA. He covered the football World Cup in Brazil in 2014. During that time, he told stories about social problems. These problems were linked to big sports events.

He talked about right things in sports. He did this at big places. These places were from the University of Texas. He also spoke at the FIFA meeting. This meeting was about being fair to all. In 2016, he started telling general news again. He made many films. His films talked about many things. For example, he made films about autism in girls. He also covered the Grenfell Tower fire. He covered the Black Lives Matter protests in 2020. In 2018, he began a film. This film was about his family. It was also about the long time of slavery. In 2021, he got a BAFTA nomination. This was for a special show on Channel 4 News. This show showed black talents. It included a film he made in Nigeria. That film asked for the Benin Bronzes to come back. He was a reporter in a TV show called Station Eleven. He also went on game shows. These shows were The Weakest Link and Pointless Celebrities.

Nzerem runs a place that teaches people about media. He also works for some big groups. His helper is a person named Knight Ayton. When Nzerem was a young teen, he learned to ski. He did this at a fake hill near Woolwich Barracks. This was during his summer time. He has written words about skiing. He wrote for the Guardian and the Good Ski Guide. He was also a model for bikes and skis. In 2014, he helped judge at two film festivals. He posts often about ski-touring. He also writes about long bike trips in Italy and the UK. Nzerem is one of many adventurers from different groups in Britain. In 2021, he helped start a group. This group is called Opening Up the Outdoors (OUTO). It works for fairness and many types of people in outdoor sports.

Nzerem likes to lead and host big talks. These talks are about fun outside adventures. They are also about business and the Earth. These events include things like UK National Parks. They also include The European Outdoor Summit. Nzerem helps a group called The Ethical Journalism Network. They made a report in 2023. This report was about racism in UK news places. Nzerem started a group called Opening Up the Outdoors. He is also the Vice President of the Its Great Out There Coalition. Before, Nzerem helped a charity. This charity was called Football Beyond Borders. He did this work from 2016 to 2023. In 2008, Nzerem got a big award. This award was for news about America. He was also named for a BAFTA award in 2022. This was for showing something on Channel 4 News.

Nzerem is from Aro. Aro is a group of people. These people are Igbo. They live in south eastern Nigeria. His father is from Nigeria. His mother is from America. He has one sister. He is married to Kate Franklin. Kate is a coach for life and culture. They have two daughters. Yatala is a place. It is a suburb. This suburb is in the Gold Coast, Australia. In 2021, Yatala had 1,405 people. The Albert River is near Yatala. It is to the north and the west. The suburb gets its name from a place. This place was on the Albert River. A man from South Australia named it. He named it after Yatala Harbor. This harbor was near Port Augusta. The word might come from a Kaurna word. That word was 'yertalla'. It means water that runs by a river. As a place name, it meant water covering the dry land. This was on either side of Dry Creek.

Bishop James Quinn opened St Mary's Catholic Church. This was on Sunday, December 12, 1875. The church was first built as a masonic hall. The church building is gone now. St Joseph's School opened in November 1875. It closed in December 1877. Some early people who lived here were Ann Jemima Butler. Her husband was George Dovey Butler. Ann Butler was born in Wales. She moved to Australia when she was in her thirties. Her husband was a famous cattle keeper. He also ran the Bulliwallah cattle station. Together, they had two children. Their names were Mary Jane Maria Salmon and Martha Ann Birkbeck. Ann and George Butler lived in a house near Stanmore Road. They lived there for a time.

Bernie Powers started Power's Brewery in Yatala in 1988. In 1992, Powers worked with Carlton & United Breweries, or CUB. Then, Powers sold the brewery to CUB in 1993. For CUB, this was good. It gave them a new and good place to make beer in the north. By the year 2010, CUB made the plant very big. It became twenty times bigger than before. This let them make one fourth of all the beer in Australia. Before that, Yatala had an African safari park. This park was open from 1969 to 1988. They sold the park because it was not making enough money. The park became big work areas. A school called Rivermount College opened in 1992. Another thing is the Bannockburn Bridge. People call it the Paterson Footbridge. It opened for walkers and bikers on September 11, 2001. This bridge crosses the Albert River. It connects the towns of Yatala and Bannockburn.

A place called Yatala is growing fast. This growing has been happening since the year 2006. Now, over 300 shops and businesses are in Yatala. This kind of building is expected to cover all the quiet land. This land is between the Brisbane area and the Gold Coast City. Right now, about 6 kilometres of this land is left between the two cities. In 2011, 1,346 people lived in Yatala. Most people were male. The middle age of the people was 38 years. This is one year more than the country's average age. Most people in Yatala were born in Australia. Many people spoke only English at home. Other languages like Dutch and Hindi were spoken by a few people.

In the year 2016, Yatala had 1,312 people. This meant that 47.9% were girls. And 52.1% were boys. The middle age of people in Yatala was 42 years. This was 4 years more than the country's middle age of 38. Most people, 77.4%, were born in Australia. Other places people were born were England, New Zealand, and South Africa. Most people, 90.3%, spoke only English at home. In 2021, Yatala had 1,405 people. Now, 50.6% were girls. And 49.4% were boys. The middle age was 43 years. This was 5 years more than the country's 38. 76.7% of people were born in Australia. New Zealand was another top place.

The Yatala Brewery is in a certain place. It is next to Cuthbert Drive. It is also near the Pacific Motorway. Darlington Drive is to the north. Pearson Road is to the west. Yatala is a home base. Supercar team Matt Stone Racing uses it. Before that, Stone Brothers Racing used it. Later, Erebus Motorsport used it. Kanga Loaders is a big machine company. Their main office is at 4 Octal Street. In 2024, they finished building a big factory. This factory is 10,000 square meters. It is for Gilmour Space Technologies. This factory will also be their main office. It is on Pearson Road. It is next to the Yatala Brewery. Rivermount College is a school. It is for boys and girls. It is a private school. It is for small kids and big kids. It is on Rivermount Drive.

Yatala has buses that go to Beenleigh and Ormeau stations. These buses are routes 728 and 729. Kinetic Gold Coast runs these buses. There are no buses for the west side of Yatala. You can get buses 565 and 566 from Windaroo. To get these buses, you must cross the Bannockburn footbridge. This bridge is at the end of Paterson Road. On the east side, under the bridge, there is a place for boats. This place lets you go to the Albert River. Yatala has the Yatala Pie Shop. This shop says it is a big, old place in Yatala. It has been there for more than 130 years, as of 2011. Many people stop here. They are traveling between Brisbane and the Gold Coast. Another thing is a game. The game is called Baten Kaitos: Eternal Wings and the Lost Ocean. Monolith Soft made this game. Namco sold this game. It came out in Japan in the year 2003.

This game was made for the GameCube. It was made because the GameCube did not have many JRPG games. People who wrote about the game liked it. But, not many people bought it. Still, Nintendo decided to make a first story game. This was called Baten Kaitos Origins. Nintendo let it out near the end of the GameCube's time. People liked this game too, but it was not huge. No more games were made. They also planned games for the DS and a third one. But, those were stopped. The team started working on other fun games. They worked on games like Xenoblade Chronicles. Later on, the people who made the game said they wanted to make it again. A special box with both games came out. This box was called Baten Kaitos I & II HD Remaster. It came to the Nintendo Switch in 2023. Then, it came to Windows on Steam the next year.

Baten Kaitos is a Japanese video game. It is a role-playing game. You do not play as the main character. Instead, you play as a "guardian spirit." This spirit talks to the main character. It talks using set lines of words. Sometimes, the characters talk to you. They ask you questions. This makes you feel like you are outside the game. If you answer the questions well, like the character thinks, your "bonds" get stronger. Strong bonds give you good things in the game's fighting part. Also, the game is like a normal RPG. You still move the characters. You explore the game world. You also fight bad guys in battles.

The game uses magic cards called "Magnus." These cards are very important. They can hold the magic of real things. Think of them like a special pocket for items. Some items are already on a Magnus card. Other items need you to put them on a blank Magnus card. There are over 1,000 different Magnus cards in the game. You use these Magnus cards in many ways. If a Magnus has food or medicine, you can use it to help a character feel better. If it has weapons or armor, you can wear or use it to make the character stronger. If it has battle moves, you put it in your deck. Then, you use it to attack in fights. You can also use a Magnus to talk to people in the game. This can start new talks or help you finish quests. The Magnus cards can change all the time. They change for good or for bad. For example, a Magnus with milk can change.

Before a big fight, the player must make a set of cards for each friend. These cards are called a deck of Magnus. The player will get some cards by chance when the fight starts. The fighting is like taking turns. It is also action-based. Each friend gets a turn to attack. They also get a turn to protect themselves. They have just a few seconds. They must play a few cards from their deck. Weapon cards help you fight. Armor cards help you defend. Effect cards do other things. For example, they can make you feel better (healing). Each Magnus has a number from 1 to 9. If you play cards with the same number. Or if you play numbers in order (like 1, then 2, then 3, then 4). This makes the damage bigger. Cards with many numbers let you pick the best one. You can also mix Magnus during the fight. When you play certain Magnus. Special combos happen. These combos make new Magnus.

You get points when you win fights. These points are called "experience points." But you cannot use them right away. You must go to blue flowers in the world. These flowers will move you to a church. In the church, you can "pray." Praying lets you use your experience points. This lets your character "level up." Leveling up makes your character stronger. Your health points go up. Your attack strength goes up. Or your defense gets better. Sometimes, it lets you "class up." This makes your "Magnus" deck bigger. The world is about magic cards called "Magnus." These cards help people keep powers. Long ago, a bad god named Malpercio came. He made the ocean dry. He sucked all the water out. Heroes fought him. They sealed his bad power with five strong "End Magnus." But this left the planet empty. It was not a good place to live.

A player acts like a secret helper. This helper guides a boy named Kalas. Kalas is not very nice. He is also an outcast. This is because he has only one wing. His other wing is a machine wing. Kalas travels the world. He wants revenge. He wants revenge for his grandpa and his little brother. Later, his plans change. He meets a girl named Xelha. They travel together. They accidentally free one of five End Magnus. This breaks the seal on Malpercio. The two must stop the bad Alfard Empire. They must stop it from releasing Malpercio again. Soon, they meet others. These are Gibari. He is a relaxed fisherman. He is from a small town called Lyude. There is also Savyna. She is a skilled fighter who used to be a mercenary. And there is Mizuti. He is a strange masked creature. He comes from a place no one knows.

Kalas went on a trip. He wanted revenge. He wanted revenge for his grandpa and his brother. He met Xelha. Xelha was nice. But Xelha was also a little silly. Together, they opened the first End Magnus. This was bad. People from the Alfard Empire took it. The Alfard Empire was a mean country on an island. Kalas and Xelha chased them. They went to the Empire's big city. They stopped at a place called Diadem. There, they met Gibari. Gibari was a fisherman. They also met Lyude. Lyude was the Empire's helper in Diadem. They learned something big. There are five End Magnus in total. The Empire wants all five. If they get all five, they can wake up the bad god, Malpercio. The group tried hard. They tried to get the End Magnus. They wanted to keep them safe from the Empire. They found one in Diadem. But someone stole it right away. So, they traveled to a place called Anuenue. There, they worked together again.

The friends went to Mira. This was Kalas's home land. There, they met Mizuti. Mizuti was a strange being with a mask. Then, they had a problem. They were stopped because someone thought they took Lady Melodia. Melodia lived in the city of Miran. Because of this, they lost the only End Magnus they had. So, the group ran away to Alfard. They went there to stop Geldoblame. But when they fought, a big secret came out. Kalas was secretly helping Melodia. He was doing this all along. He wanted to find the End Magnus. He wanted to bring back Malpercio for her. Melodia then took charge of the Empire from Geldoblame. His old soldiers took him to the deep Lava Caves. Kalas took the power of the five End Magnus. Then, Malpercio controlled Kalas. The other friends were caught. They were put in jail. But Xelha escaped. She freed all of them. They traveled to Wazn. Wazn is an island with lots of snow. There, they learned that Xelha is the queen there. She got the power of the Ocean.

Kalas feels bad. He is guilty about what he did. He promises to seal Malpercio again. Mizuti leads the group. They go to her home. This village is in the lands below the Taintclouds. The Taintclouds are a bad, poisonous gas. They go down to find the power of the "Sword of the Heavens." This sword will help their trip. But Malpercio and Melodia appear. The two sides fight. The group pushes them away. However, the Sword of Heavens breaks. The group then learns about one last hope. This hope is the Magnus of Life. Kalas learns something true. His grandfather, Georg, was a scientist. Emperor Geldoblame told him to use this power. He used it to make life. He made Kalas and his brother, Fee. Geldoblame thought Kalas was too much like a person. He also thought Kalas only had one wing. So, Geldoblame ordered him to die. Georg then fakes his death. He does this by blowing.

The party goes to Cor Hydrae. This is for a big fight with Malpercio and Melodia. Malpercio loses the fight. Melodia gets her free choice back. Kalas, Melodia, and the Guardian Spirit use their magic. They help let Malpercio's spirit leave his body. The magic to break the shield around Cor Hydrae uses up power. This power keeps five big floating islands up in the sky. Because of this, the islands start to fall down to Earth. But the Earth can live again. Five old gods help the islands. They let the islands fall safely onto the planet. They become new lands, or continents. People are happy about a new, bright time. Xelha tells Kalas a secret. She says she is an old ice queen. She says her death is needed. This death will bring back the water oceans. The water is needed for people to live on the planet. A final battle is coming.

A game maker called Monolith Soft started in October 1999. Its boss was Tetsuya Takahashi. He left his old job at Squaresoft. This happened because Squaresoft said no to money. They would not fund a second game for Takahashi's first big game, which was called Xenogears. Takahashi felt sad. So, he made his own company. He worked with other friends. These friends worked on games like Xenogears and Chrono Trigger before. They wanted to keep making games for the Xeno series. Japanese company Namco gave money to the new company. Namco also became a part owner. But, they could not make Xenogears again. Squaresoft still owned the rules for that game. So, the company changed its main goal. They decided to make a new game. This new game was called the Xenosaga series. After the company was big and had many workers, they started another small project. This new project was mostly for the younger workers.

A game idea started in 2001. Making the game started six months after that. The company was Monolith Soft. They were known for games called Xenosaga. They said the new game would use their skills. But the game would not be about Xenosaga. They chose the GameCube for the game. This was because there were not many JRPG games on it. The team wanted to give a "real RPG" to the players. They hoped this game would become a big series for that machine. They named it Baten Kaitos. This name came from a star in the Cetus constellation. They picked this name. It means the game will show a big, rich world. It is like a space adventure.

Masato Kato wrote the story for the game. He used to work at Squaresoft. He left there when many others left. They started a new company called Monolith Soft. They picked him because he knew many people. He worked with artists and game design director Yasuyuki Honne. They worked on old games like Chrono Cross and Xenogears. They liked him because he could write good talking parts. These parts did not sound weird. Also, some big parts of the game were set early. For example, the game has floating islands. The fighting in the game is an action theme. But, some small things changed a lot. Honne first thought of the kingdom of Mira. He thought it was a strange place. This place was outside the main story. Players could go there for fun things. This was when the main story felt too long.

The game was made for six main characters. Only three characters could be played at one time. There were also many other characters. These characters were not playable. There were about 40 to 50 of these other characters. The people who made the game thought that more was too much for the computer. This made it hard to plan every thing that could happen in the game. Honne said that making Kalas was the hardest. They had to balance his wings, his cape, and his bright clothes. They felt these things were needed for his special way of being. Xelha first wore a short skirt. But they changed it to pants. This was to fit the game's Middle Eastern look and her active moves. Lyude was first meant to be a scared person. But they took away that part of his character. They could not make it fit with his fighting moves. Kato wanted the character Mizuti to talk with a special way of talking. So, he watched the making of it very closely.

Motoi Sakuraba made the music for the game. He also played music on every song. They made over sixty songs for the game. He said the opening song was very hard to make. This was because the video changed a lot. The movements in the video needed to match the song. The music album came out on December 17, 2003. Later, in February 2023, Nintendo told us something. They said there would be an HD Remaster. This game is called Baten Kaitos I & II HD Remaster. It will come on the Nintendo Switch. It will come out in the middle of 2023. This release puts Baten Kaitos and Baten Kaitos Origins together. The remaster does not change the story. It does not take out any story parts. But, it only has Japanese voices. The English voices were taken out. The game has better pictures and clearer colors.

Many grown-up reviewers liked the game. On a site called Metacritic, they gave it an average score of 80 out of 100. This score means that most reviews were good. Forty-eight people wrote reviews. Game Informer said the game made you feel like you were really there. This was because of the pretty pictures and the music. They said the world felt alive. The bright pictures showed places like in a storybook. These places had much movement. Leaves swayed. Clouds moved. The reviewer felt like a child looking at a picture book. The beautiful places and cool looking characters were amazing. They also called the music "amazing" and a "masterpiece." GameSpot agreed. They said it was a beautiful game. It had a world that kept you interested. It also had a special art look. They thought it was a wonderful place to visit.

Baten Kaitos got a good prize. It was for "Best Role-playing Game" in 2004. But it did not win. Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door won instead. People liked the game a lot. But it did not sell as many copies as the company hoped. Namco wanted to sell 500,000 copies all over the world. But it sold much less than that. In Japan, it sold only 80,000 copies after two weeks. In North America, it sold 161,000 copies after one and a half months. This was less than another game. The other game was Tales of Symphonia. That game sold 290,000 copies in Japan. It also sold 285,000 copies in North America. A boss man at Namco, Youichi Haraguchi, said that the company thought people did not like the game for the GameCube. Still, the game was.

This game was first made. People hoped it would become a big line of games. But after it came out in Japan, the makers said that future games were "undecided." At first, there were only two story books about the game. These books were called Baten Kaitos: The Destruction of Truth and the Lie of the Promise, and Baten Kaitos: Castle of Storms. But later, they decided to make another video game. In September of 2005, they said a game that came before was coming. This game was called Baten Kaitos Origins. It came out in 2006. It was for the GameCube. People liked it. It got good reviews and sales. Before Origins came out, in December 2004, another game was planned. This game was Baten Kaitos DS. It was for the Nintendo DS. Another game, Xenosaga DS, was also planned for that machine. The Xenosaga game came out later. But the Baten Kaitos game was still talked about.

A long time ago, in 2011, a website called Eurogamer wrote a report. This report talked about many video games that might be made. One game was called Baten Kaitos 3. This game was thought to be for the Nintendo 3DS. It had a small name: Silence of the Mechanized Son. People saw pictures of a boy with blue hair and a machine wing. They thought this game would tell more of the story of a man named Kalas. The report said there would be a big show in Tokyo in 2011. But, even though many games were talked about, no Baten Kaitos game showed up. Later, in 2018, a person named Honne said that Baten Kaitos 3 started planning. This was after they finished making a game called Origins/2. But, his ideas were very different from the old 3DS talk. The game never got made. Still, they made papers and pictures for the game. Honne said this planning happened when a company called Monolith Soft was still owned by someone else.

The game story stopped for a long time. This was after a game called Origins came out in 2006. Nintendo changed its game machine. They went from the GameCube to the Wii. At that time, Monolith Soft said they did not plan a Baten Kaitos game for the Wii. They focused on other new games. These were Disaster: Day of Crisis and Xenoblade Chronicles. Another group called Tri-Crescendo made a game. It was called Eternal Sonata. This game came out in 2007 for the Xbox 360. A person named Hiroya Hatsushiba said this game was possible. He said it was because they worked on Baten Kaitos before. The people at Monolith Soft talked about these games sometimes. In 2008, a producer named Tadashi Nomura spoke. He said, "We still want to start a new Baten Kaitos game." He said this will happen when the right time comes.

In the year 2010, Honne talked about Baten Kaitos. He said it was his favorite game to work on. Then, he talked about a "secret project." Some writing said that he might mean more Baten Kaitos games. In 2014, a song from Baten Kaitos called "The Valedictory Elegy" was in a game. This game was Super Smash Bros. for Wii U. Later, in 2015, a person named Kensuke Tsukanaka spoke. He said the game series was thought about for another game. This game was called Project X Zone. But, the makers could not find a way to put it in the story.
