He also said that bringing back the series is possible. But, it needs much help from fans. The fans must tell Bandai Namco Entertainment to use the game again.

Xu finished school in 1968. This time was during the Cultural Revolution. He went to the country. He had to do hard farm work. This work was on a farm run by the army. This farm was in Tangyuan County. It is in the northeast part of China. Later, he could go back to the army. This was because his parents worked in a factory. In the spring of 1970, Xu joined the army. He was a student officer. He lived in Jilin province. After joining the officer group, he needed four years for his first rank jump. After the Cultural Revolution, a leader named Deng Xiaoping wanted to help young college students. He wanted them in the army. Most army leaders then only had small school knowledge. Starting in 1982, Xu got many fast promotions. He worked in Jilin province for a long time.

In 1990, Xu became a leader in the 16th Group Army. He was a political commissar there. Soon after, he got a big job title. He moved to Beijing for work. A friend from school gave him an air conditioner. It was to help him with the hot summer. But Xu said no. He did not want a special thing. He said his boss did not have one. Next, Xu worked for a newspaper. The paper was called the People's Liberation Army Daily. He was the main editor. He stayed there for a little time. Then, he got another big job title. In 1996, he became the leader in the Jinan Military Region. This place was very big. It covered many army groups in eastern China. His job was to help with "political things" in the army.

In the year 1999, Xu got a big job. He became a General. This was the highest job rank when there was no war in the PLA. He also joined the Central Military Commission. He was also in charge of the General Political Department, which is like a big office. In December 2000, he got a new job. He became the boss of the Commission for Discipline Inspection. This group stops bad things in the army. His success in the army also helped his job in the Communist Party. In November 2002, he took the main lead for the GPD. Later, at a big party meeting in 2002, Xu joined the Secretariat. This group helps the Communist Party make its plans happen.

Xu got many big jobs very fast. This happened around the year 2000. People said this was because of Jiang Zemin. Jiang Zemin was the Chairman of the Central Military Commission. People thought that Jiang still controlled things in the army. He did this even after he stopped working in 2004. Some old army men said that Xu and his friend, Guo Boxiong, were like "Jiang's helpers in the army." When Xu was the vice chairman, starting in September 2004, he had big power. He could decide about high-ranking army people. Some people saw him as the main boss every day in the top army ranks. This was because Hu Jintao, who was the top boss, did not manage the army very much. In 2007, Xu was put into the 25-member Politburo. He was chosen at a big meeting.

Before, I worked for Xu Caihou. He had a way of doing things. He chose people based on three things. First, he looked at the money. Second, he looked at how much he liked them. Third, he used feelings and emotions. This was the worst part of his power. With Guo Boxiong, Xu tried to make Hu have less power on the CMC. They did this by hiding facts. They also only told some important facts. They wanted to control who got jobs. Xu and Guo also wanted to make Xi Jinping look small. Xi was seen as Hu's next leader. Many news reports said something bad. They said that giving money for jobs was common. This happened from the top leaders to the small workers. People in the army said that Xu had too much power. This was true when he was the Vice Chairman of the CMC.

In March of 2014, a man named Xu was sick. He was 70 years old. He had a sickness called bladder cancer. He was getting much care at a big hospital in Beijing. At the same time, people started looking into if he was doing wrong. Some soldiers thought that Xu would not be charged with crimes. This was because he was very sick. Another man, Gu Junshan, worked with Xu. Gu Junshan was already being looked at. He was in trouble for a big money problem with the military's land. Xu's friends asked for him to be kind. They said that having very bad cancer was like a big punishment already. They pointed to a time before. In that time, they said they should not charge a leader who was sick. The choice to look into Xu was made on March 15, 2014.

At a party for old army leaders in 2014, a man named Xu tried to talk to Xi Jinping. Xi Jinping is the leader of the army group. Xu tried to talk to him many times. But he could not talk to him. On June 30, 2014, Xu left the Chinese Communist Party. The news said Xu did bad things. He used his power badly. He took money from people. This money was for giving jobs or raises. He helped friends with his job power. This was not expected. Big news about army officers getting into trouble is rare in China. So, this big news was very new. Xu became the most high-ranking officer ever investigated for bad money habits. When they checked Xu, they found over one ton of cash.

Some smart people think that Xu's fall was a big sign. It showed that the army's power went right to Xi Jinping. They think this is more important than the trouble with Zhou Yongkang. Zhou was a former big leader. The Communist Party said Xu's fall was part of a big clean-up. Xi Jinping wanted to stop bad things and make the army better. In October 2014, people said Xu took money that was not his. He was the most famous person in China's army caught in Xi Jinping's clean-up. Xu passed away on March 15, 2015. He died from sickness in his bladder and other parts. He was 71 years old. This happened near the time of the "two sessions" meeting. Some people guess that they did not say he died until the meeting was over.

Francesco Buhagiar lived from 1876 to 1934. He was the second Prime Minister of Malta. He served from 1923 to 1924. He was chosen from the Maltese Political Union. His father was Michele Buhagiar. His mother was Filomena Mifsud. He was born in Qrendi on September 7, 1876. He learned Law at the Royal University of Malta in 1901. He started working as a lawyer. He practiced law for twenty years. After that time, Malta had self-rule. Buhagiar was elected to the Legislative Assembly in 1921. He was on the list of Ignazio Panzavecchia's Unione Politica Maltese (UPM). From October 1922, he was the Minister of Justice. One year later, he became the prime minister. He led a small government in 1924. This was before and after the June 1924 election. In that election, the UPM only got 10 seats.

He became a judge of the Superior Courts. He worked there until the year 1934. He passed away when he was 57. He died because of problems with his appendix. He died at the Blue Sisters Hospital. He was buried at the Addolorata Cemetery. His name was Francesco Buhagiar. He married Enrichetta Said. They had five children. People remember him as a very skilled lawyer. They also remember him as a practical man. He was a politician that many people respected. 5-MAPDB is a chemical name. It is also called 5-(2-(methylamino)propyl)-2,3-dihydrobenzofuran. It is a type of drug. It belongs to the dihydrobenzofuran family. It looks like drugs such as 5-APDB and 5-MAPB. These drugs have effects like MDMA. People used them for fun. Scientists studied 5-MAPDB. They wanted to know what it does to the body. They found that it releases serotonin. It does this in a way that is a bit special. It also works a little on other things. It is similar to older drugs like 5-APDB.

The Malta at War Museum has many old things. These things are like souvenirs. They include weapons. They also have uniforms. You can see medals and papers. The museum also shows old movie clips. For example, there is a film called Malta G.C. The museum got new and bigger. This happened between September 2011 and April 2012. Also, there is a plant called Leucadendron laureolum. People call it golden conebush. It is a type of plant. This plant only grows in a place in South Africa. It is a big bush. In the winter, it turns bright yellow.

Rio Pardo is a town. It is in a place called Rio Grande do Sul. This place is in Brazil. The number of people there was 34,654. This was in the year 2022. The land is 2051 km2. The height there is 41 meters. Bereza is a village. It is in Ukraine. Specifically, it is in Shostka Raion. This area is in Sumy Oblast. Bereza is the main center of a group of villages. This group is called Bereza rural hromada. The people count there was 1,371. This was in 2023. People first wrote about Bereza in the early 1600s. Before the big changes in 1917, there was a fight in the village. This fight was against the big land owners. Also, a church was sold to the village. The neighbor village of Makove sold the church.

A long time ago, the Russian Soviet Federative Socialist Republic took over a little village. In the year 1924, a farm called a kolkhoz was made in that village. It was named Zaporozhets. Later, in 2006, people put up a special stone place to remember people who died from the Holodomor. There is also a stone place. This stone place remembers Soviet soldiers. They died during World War II. Separately, there is a science word. It is called Haloferacaceae. This word names a group of tiny living things. These things are special because they like salt. Their type genus is Haloferax. The name Haloferacaceae comes from a Latin word. This word is Haloferax. The ending "-ceae" means it is a whole group or family. So, Haloferacaceae means a family whose main example is the genus Haloferax.

This text talks about many science names. These names are like titles for tiny living things called archaea. Some of these names are Haloprofundus Zhang. Others are Salinigranum Cui. There are many more names like Haloferax Torreblanca. These names show different types of these little life forms. The text also mentions a movie. The movie is called Sarvam Thaala Mayam. It is a film from India. The movie is in Tamil. Rajiv Menon wrote and made this film. G. V. Prakash Kumar and Aparna Balamurali are the main stars. Other actors are in the movie too. The text is listing many science facts and then talking about a movie.

Mr. Menon came back to making movies. This was after 19 years. His new movie was good. It was fun and it gave hope. The movie came out on February 1, 2019. It made a lot of money. The story is about three people. They are Vembu Iyer. He is a famous mridangam player. There is also Peter Johnson. He is a student of Iyer. Peter's father makes mridangam. Peter also likes a man named Vijay very much. At first, Peter was a carefree boy. He did not like his father's work. He did not like his own job. He tried to ask a nurse named Saara to be with him. But Saara kept some space from him. One day, his father made him go somewhere. He had to take a mridangam to Vembu Iyer's concert. There, he could watch Iyer's show. After seeing Iyer's concert, Peter liked him a lot. So, he decided to become a student of Iyer.

Iyer watched Peter. He saw that Peter had talent. But Iyer said no. He said Peter did not have good habits. He also said Peter was not steady. Peter wanted to prove Iyer wrong. So, Peter tried very hard to change. His mother felt worried. She worried about Peter's future. At last, Iyer said yes. He let Peter be his student. But Iyer's helper, Mani, treated Peter badly. Mani did this because of Peter's lower caste. Iyer saw this. Iyer told Mani to be nice to his students. Mani then told Iyer he was unhappy. He said Iyer did not help his music career. He said Iyer used him. This made Iyer very angry. Iyer fired Mani in front of Peter. So, Mani swore revenge on Iyer and Peter. Peter became good friends with Nandagopal, or Nandu. Nandu was an NRI. He also had a PhD from Harvard. Nandu came to learn mridangam from Iyer. At the same time, Mani joined a music contest as a judge.

Anjana made a trick. She wanted to make Iyer look bad. She asked Nandu to sing on her show. She made Nandu think that people only in the USA would watch it. Nandu came with Peter. Peter always told him to ask their teacher first. After Nandu knew it was a trick, he left the place. He left without saying bye to Peter. Peter did not know the truth. He went to the studio to find Nandu. But he only thought about "live." Then, Peter had no other choice. He got ready to play the mridangam. Mani and Anjana made fun of him. They made him seem useless. They also talked badly about Iyer. When Iyer learned this, he asked Peter a question. He asked Peter why he went to play on the stage. Peter said it was his fault. He took the blame to save Nandu. Angry, Iyer sent Peter away. He said it was a big shame for his music skills.

At Nandu's house, Nandu said Peter was wrong for his mistakes. Peter argued back. He said that one day, he would be stronger than Nandu. After this, Peter felt very sad. He started using drugs. This made his parents very worried. Saara saw this. She took Peter to her house. There, she helped him see something. She showed him that music is everywhere. Music is in nature. She told him to explore the world. He should learn about Thaalam. Thaalam means the beats. These words gave Peter new hope. So, Peter started a journey. He went alone to learn many beat instruments. At the same time, the Sangeetha Samrat show did very well. It finished two good seasons. All of Iyer's students, including Nandu, liked how popular it was. So, they left Iyer. Finally, Iyer understood something. He knew that he must change himself. He must change for the world. If he did not change, he could not teach music to the next people. He finally understood this truth.

Peter is happy. He joins his friend. They want to learn the mridangam again. They want to win the show. They also want to get their teacher's respect back. Nandu joins Mani. They start training with Mani. They want to win the show too. They learn that Iyer also wants to join the show. Peter is also in this show. So, Peter and Nandu feel a little scared. But, Peter and Nandu make it to the final round. Before the show, Peter forgets the beats. Iyer taught him these beats. But, Nandu answers these beats to Iyer. Then, Mani comes. He stands in front of them. He challenges Iyer. He says he will show that he is a better teacher. He wants to make Iyer and Peter look bad. This is revenge. He wants revenge for how he was treated. So, he trained Nandu well. He taught Nandu all the songs of Iyer. This is so he can fight back.

In a show, Peter played music. He played on the mridangam. He used many music beats. These beats came from the world. This made the audience feel happy. Mani decided Peter was the winner. This made Nandu very surprised. Later, Iyer left the stage. Peter felt scared. He thought his teacher was mad at him. He thought it was because Peter did not follow his plan. But Iyer felt proud. He happily said Peter was his student. At the end, Peter was a big star. He performed with his teacher, Iyer. Also, in March 2016, people said something. Rajiv Menon would make a new movie. This was his third movie. He stopped making films for a time. His last movie was called Kandukondain Kandukondain in 2000. The new movie was named Sarvam Thaala Mayam. G. V. Prakash Kumar was involved.

In March 2017, Menon said the movie was not stopped. He also said a fun picture shoot with Prakash Kumar was coming soon. Prakash Kumar told people that the story was in two places. It got its ideas from the real lives of singers. During this time, Prakash Kumar learned to play the mridangam. He learned from a music teacher named Umayalpuram Sivaraman. This was so he could act well in the movie. After a few small waits, the movie started on November 29, 2017. The filming began after that day. Sai Pallavi could not be there. So, the team picked Aparna Balamurali instead. Menon liked her acting. He saw her act in a movie called Maheshinte Prathikaaram. So, he called her for a good try-out. The movie also had many actors. Nedumudi Venu, Santha Dhananjayan, Vineeth, Kumaravel, Sumesh, and Athira were named. Ravi Yadav was the camera person. He was the cinematographer. Anthony was the person who cut the movie. He was the editor.

A man named M. Suganth wrote about the movie. He gave it three and a half stars out of five. He said the story moves fast. The story does not make the big ideas feel too heavy. He also said the movie looks very pretty. This is true even though it is a drama. Another man, Karthik Kumar, also gave it three and a half stars. He said the movie is good. It works as a music story and also as a story about music for everyone. He said it works well because it does not make things too exciting. A woman named S. Subhakeerthana gave it three and a half stars too. She said she liked the movie more. She thinks this because Rajiv added a reality show part in the second half. She felt those parts were too strong. She also felt they were a little bit planned. She wanted to see more about Iyer. She wanted to see how he changed himself for the times.

Priyanka Thirumurthy said that the actors acted very well. But she said the movie does not ask big questions about unfair rules in the world. Shubhra Gupta gave the film three out of five stars. She wrote that this movie is not scared. It is scared to say important things. These things are breaking big walls. It is about leaving out bad rules. It is about loving differences. It does this using music. The music is everywhere. It belongs to all people. Srinivasa Ramanujam said that this movie is Rajiv's best movie yet. He said that beauty is not only in nice clothes. It is not only in pretty pictures. It is also in a story. This story must have hope. Sreedhar Pillai said that the movie is happy. It is light and breezy. It is also emotional. It pulls at your heart.

The school got a special okay from a group called the Middle States Association of Colleges and Schools Commission. This happened since the year 1967. The place where Christian Brothers Academy is now was once a farm. This farm belonged to a famous family in New York City. This family was the Whitney family. They also had a famous place called Greentree Stable there. Christian Brothers Academy started in 1958. A group of good helpers started it. This group included a man named Doctor George A. Sheehan. They saw that the area needed another Catholic high school. This school was for Monmouth County. The bishop gave them permission. So, they started to ask people for money. They needed money to buy land. The Brothers of the Christian Schools agreed to help. Their leader was Brother Anthony John Halpin. They agreed to teach at the school. They also helped pay for building it.

Long ago, there was a big farm. It was called the Whitney Greentree Stables. This farm was very big. It was 157 acres. They bought this farm. They changed one building. This building became Henderson Hall. The school opened in September 1959. Six brothers taught at the school. The first class had 140 students in ninth grade. They used a changed horse stable for classrooms. The Bishop of Trenton blessed the school on October 11, 1959. Later, in September 1962, a new brick school building opened. This new building had 13 more classrooms and science labs. That year, 700 students were in grades 9 to 12. Over time, the school got many new things. They built the Henderson Theater. They added three science labs. They made two big gyms. They also added more classrooms. The school is Christian. You can see this on a sign in the lobby.

Christian Brothers Academy got a big prize. This happened in the school year of 1983 to 1984. The United States Department of Education gave them the Blue Ribbon School Award. This was the biggest award for an American school. The school got this honor again. This was in 2017. They were one of eight private schools. The Blue Ribbon Schools Program gave them this award. It meant they were a very good, high-performing school. The school offers many hard classes. These are called Advanced Placement courses or AP. Some AP classes are AP Art History. Others are AP Biology. There are classes for Math, like AP Calculus AB and AP Calculus BC. They also have classes for science, like AP Chemistry. You can study many things. For example, they have AP English Language and Composition. They also teach AP World History. These classes help students learn many things.

Christian Brothers Academy has many classes. They have 22 AP courses. They also have almost 90 other classes in different subjects. To get a diploma, a student must finish four years of English. They must also finish four years of Health. And they must finish four years of Theology. Students need three years of History. They need three years of Foreign Languages. They need three years of Math. They need three years of Science. They also need three years of Physical Education. Plus, students must finish two years of Computer Science. Students who do well at CBA can try to join the National Honor Society. This needs good grades, good service, good leadership, and good character. The CBA chess team is good. They won the shore title in 2003. They also won in 2006. And they won again in 2007. In 2007, the team won the New Jersey state championship. They also won in 1980. And they won in 1985. The team was also good in 2007 at the U1500.

The school has a program called Lasallian Youth. This program lets students help people in the area. It is connected to the spirit of St. John Baptist de La Salle. The Christian Brothers Academy Colts play sports. They have played since 1982. They play in the Division A North of the Shore Conference. This conference has public and private high schools. These schools are in Monmouth and Ocean counties. The conference follows rules from the NJSIAA. Since they started, the Colts won over 240 Shore Conference titles. For the 2019–20 school year, the NJSIAA put the school in a group. This group was Non-Public A. This group was for sports. It was for schools with 381 to 1,454 students. This was for grades 10 through 12.

CBA is a school. It has been part of the NJSIAA since the early 1960s. CBA won its first state title in 1965. This was for basketball. Since then, CBA has won over 145 state titles. The NJSIAA rules all sports at CBA. Crew, rugby, and sailing have their own rules. CBA does not have a football team for the school. The NJSIAA has praised CBA many times. It gave CBA the ShopRite Cup award nine times. This cup shows the best sports in the whole state. CBA won the Shop Rite Cup in many years. These years were 2004, 2005, 2006, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, and 2019–20.

Christian Brothers Academy has many sports. In the fall, they have cross country, soccer, rugby, and sailing. They also have crew. Scott Belford is the head coach for these sports. The CBA crew team started in 2004. Crew is a sport for two seasons. In its first year, the team won something big. They won the New Jersey State Scholastic Rowing Championships. This was in the Novice 4+ group. In 2006, the team got famous. Their new Lightweight 4+ group got second place. This was at the Scholastic Rowing Nationals in New York. The Junior 4+ group won the New Jersey State Scholastic Championships in 2008. The varsity double group got second place in 2008. This was at the big Stotesbury Cup race. In 2009, CBA won the senior 1x event. In the spring of 2011, the Lightweight 4+ got second place at the Stotesbury Cup. They also got first place at Nationals in Camden, New Jersey.

Rugby started as a club team in 2011 at CBA. Then, it became a big school sport in 2013. Patrick Moroney is the coach for the team. In the first spring season, the rugby 15's won the New Jersey state championship. They had no losses all year. Later, in 2015, the rugby 7's won their first state championship. CBA won the State Sevens Championship in 2024. They also won the Sevens State Championship in 2025. This was the first time in New Jersey. CBA also has a sailing team. This team has been around since 2000. In 2005, the club team went to a big contest called the Mallory National Championship. After a break, the sailing team started again in 2007. Then, it became a big school sport in 2011. Since then, the team of 16 people has been practicing often.

Christian Brothers Academy has many sports. In the winter, they have basketball, bowling, fencing, ice hockey, indoor track, swimming, and wrestling. CBA has done very well in a big tournament. They reached the Final Four in almost every year since 1982. A coach named Vinnie Cox was the head coach for many years. He won the first state championship for CBA in 1965. They beat Don Bosco Preparatory High School. This win was in the Parochial A finals. It happened at the Atlantic City Convention Hall. Cox's team won four more state titles. This was before he stopped coaching in 1980. In 1971, a big crowd watched. The team beat Essex Catholic. The score was 70 to 68. They won the Parochial A title that year. They finished the season with 25 wins and only 2 losses. Later, the 1984 team won the Parochial A state title. They finished that season with 29 wins and only 1 loss.

In 2016, a player named Pat Andree '16 broke a big score record. This record was for all-time scoring at CBA. Bob Roma '75 held this record for 40 years. Pat Andree scored 1,984 points. He played basketball for Lehigh University. He also played for NC State University. CBA has a varsity team for fencing. Mary Mottola coached the first varsity fencing team. This was in the 2012–13 winter season. CBA fencers have gone to other schools. They fenced at Brandeis and Stevens. The track team is very good. Karl Torchia coached this team. They won more titles than any other sport. The hockey team plays in two groups. These groups are the Gordon Conference and the Shore Conference. Ryan Bogan coaches the hockey team. CBA plays its home games at the Jersey Shore Arena. This place is in Wall Township, New Jersey. These events happened from 1994 to 1996.

On January 31, 2014, a team called Christian Brothers Academy played a game. They played at Yankee Stadium. Their other team was Don Bosco Prep. The game ended in a tie. In 2014, the Colts played Morristown-Beard School. They were declared co-champions. This means two teams won together. This was only the second time this happened. In 2015, the Colts played Delbarton School. The Colts were losing by three goals. They played very hard. They won the game 4 to 3 in overtime. Dean DiFazio scored the winning goal. This gave CBA their second state title in a row. Later, the team won the title again. This was in 2020. They beat Don Bosco Preparatory High School in the final game.

The CBA school has made great players. Four players came from CBA. Their names are James van Riemsdyk, Trevor van Riemsdyk, Connor Clifton, and Joakim Ryan. These players played in the big National Hockey League. The school honored Trevor. They retired his number 6 after he won the Stanley Cup in 2015. For swimming, the CBA Swim Team is very good. They won the Monmouth County and Shore Conference for 28 years. Michael Sullivan was their coach. Good CBA swimmers include Tom Wilkens. He won a bronze medal at the 2000 Summer Olympics. Another swimmer is Vito Chiaravalloti. He is the swim coach now. The 2009-2010 swim team was super fast. They won 12 games and lost 0. They won a state championship. They beat St. Augustine Preparatory School. The team was the fastest ever. They were also the first team to be top in New Jersey. In 2011, the team won their 21st Shore Conference and Monmouth County Tournament.

In 2005–06, the team did well. They went 17 wins and 4 losses. This helped them reach the division finals. The Colts finished 15th in New Jersey. One swimmer from the team won at the state level. The Colts had four champions in the district. Also, they advanced eight swimmers to the region 6 tournament. David Santamaria placed 2nd in the New Jersey state wrestling contest three times. Kevin Mount placed 4th in the state wrestling contest when he was a senior. Coach Michael Baldi retired after many years. Michael Tomaino is the new head coach. He won his first big win as head coach in the start of the 2006–07 season. The team ended with 14 wins and 10 losses. James Beshada set a school record. He won 41 matches in one school year.

Last year, in 2007-2008, the Colt wrestlers did very well. They came second in District 22. They beat a strong school called Raritan High School. They were very close to winning the big championship. They were only one spot away from beating Ocean Township High School. The CBA sent nine wrestlers to the Region tournament. They won 12 times out of 14 matches in the districts. Their season ended with a record of 14 wins and 12 losses. They beat their old rival, St. John Vianney High School. They won that game by 35 to 22. This win sent them to the Sectional Semi-finals. In that game, they lost to Camden Catholic High School. The score was 35 to 19. The best part was that a senior captain named Joe Favia finished fifth in the whole state. This was the third year in a row that the Colts put a wrestler in the state tournament.

Christian Brothers Academy has many sports. These sports are for the spring. They play baseball, crew, golf, lacrosse, track, rugby, sailing, tennis, and volleyball. Coach Martin Kenney leads the Colts team. The Colts are very good at high school baseball in New Jersey. They have been strong since 1974. In 2007, Coach Kenney won a game. This win made it his 600th career win. He won over Wall High School. He also passed 700 wins in his 40th season. In 2015, CBA had their best year ever. They won five big titles. These were the "A" North Division. They won the Monmouth County title. They won the Shore Conference. They won the NJSIAA Sectional. They also won the NJSIAA State title. In 2015, the Colts were number 1. They were number 1 in the county. They were number 1 in the Shore. They were number 1 in the State. They were also ranked in two big baseball polls.

The CBA crew team started in 2004. It is a sport played for two seasons. In its first year, the team won something. They won the New Jersey State Scholastic Rowing Championships. This was in the Novice 4+ event. In 2006, the team got known across the country. Their new Lightweight 4+ team got second place. This was at the Scholastic Rowing Nationals in Saratoga, New York. The Junior 4+ team won the New Jersey State Scholastic Championships in 2008. The varsity double also did well. They took second place at the 2008 Stotesbury Cup. This cup is a very big race for high schools. In 2009, CBA won the senior 1x event. This was at the New Jersey Scholastic Rowing Championships. In the Spring of 2011, the Lightweight 4+ got second place at the Stotesbury Cup. Also, they got first place at Nationals in Camden, New Jersey.

The CBA golf team won the state championship in 2005. Tim Sewing was their head coach. Later, in 2011, they started winning a lot. They won five out of six Shore Conference tournaments. They also won the title in 2016. Dave Santos '85 is their long-time head coach. Rugby started as a club team in 2011 at CBA. Then, it became a varsity sport in 2013. Patrick Moroney coaches the rugby team. In their first varsity spring season, the rugby 15's won the New Jersey High School state championship. They had a season with no losses. In the fall of 2015, the rugby 7's won their first state championship. Sailing is another sport at CBA. It has been around since 2000. It started as a club team then. The club team in 2005 could go to the Interscholastic Sailing Association.

The tennis team at CBA is very good. The Colts won over 20 state championships. They won the last one in 2013. This good time started with head coach Dan Keane. He coached since 1978. He led the team to 14 state group titles. He had a record of 649 wins and 155 losses. Volleyball became a big sport at CBA in the 2000s. It started doing well near the end of that time. Head coach Monica Slattery helped the team. In 2015, Christian Brothers won the Shore Conference Championship. This was the first time for the team. On April 10, 2019, the team won its 300th game win. The grey-crowned yellowthroat is a type of bird. It belongs to the family Parulidae. You can find this bird in many places. These places are Belize, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, and the United States.

This page is small. You can help it get more words. Angelina Topić is a girl. She is an athlete from Serbia. She is good at the high jump. When she was 17 years old, she won a bronze medal. This was at the 2022 European Athletics Championships. She was the youngest medal winner at that big game. In the same year, she won another bronze medal. This was at the World Under-20 Championships. She won a silver medal at the 2024 European Athletics Championships. She also won a bronze medal at the 2025 World Athletics Championships. Topić is the best in Serbia for the high jump. This is true both inside and outside. She also shares the world record for U18 outdoors. Her mother is Biljana Topić. She is a record holder for the triple jump. Her father is Dragutin Topić. He is her coach.

In 2022, a girl named Topić was very good at jumping. She was only sixteen years old. In June, she jumped very high at a big contest. She jumped 1.96 meters. This jump broke the record for Serbia. It was also the best jump for girls under 18 in the world. Next month, she won the high jump contest. This was at the European Under-18 Championships. She jumped 1.92 meters. Then, in August, she got a bronze medal. This was at the World U20 Championships. She jumped 1.93 meters. In that same month, she jumped again. This was at the Munich European Championships. She jumped 1.93 meters. She won a medal. She was the youngest medal winner at that big contest. Also, she set national records. These records were for the pentathlon at U18 and U20 levels that year.

Richard A. Davey is a man. He is an American lawyer. He also works in big travel jobs. He is the boss, or CEO, of the Massachusetts Port Authority. Before that, he was the boss of the Massachusetts Bay Transportation Authority. He was also the Massachusetts Secretary of Transportation. Later, he was the leader of the New York City Transit Authority. He was there from 2022 to 2024. Davey grew up in Randolph, Massachusetts. He got a BA degree from the College of the Holy Cross. He also got a JD degree from the Gonzaga University School of Law. He started his law job in 1999. He worked for the United States Department of Justice. There, he was a trial lawyer for the Immigration and Naturalization Service. After that, Davey worked for a law office in New York City. This office was called Schulte Roth & Zabel.

Davey started work in 2002. He joined the Massachusetts Bay Commuter Railroad Company. This company runs the MBTA Commuter Rail. In July 2003, he got a job name: general counsel for the MBCR. Later, in 2007, he became the deputy general manager of the MBCR. In 2008, he got a bigger job. He became the general manager. In his first whole year as general manager, the sad things people said went down a lot. They went down 40 percent. Davey left the MBCR in March 2010. He became the general manager of the Massachusetts Bay Transportation Authority. On August 4, 2011, the Governor of Massachusetts, Deval Patrick, said something. He said Davey would take over for Jeffrey Mullan. This would happen on September 1, 2011. Then, on October 10, 2014, Davey told Patrick something. He said he would stop being Transportation Secretary. This would happen on October 31. Frank DePaola, who is the MassDOT Highway administrator, would take over as the acting Transportation Secretary.

Davey worked in many important jobs. First, he left the state government. Then, he was the boss for Boston in 2024. This was a group that tried to get Boston for the 2024 Summer Olympics. Davey also worked at a place called Boston Consulting Group (BCG). In March 2022, New York City's MTA said something. The MTA said that Davey would be the leader of the New York City Transit Authority in May 2022. This Transit Authority runs the city's subways and buses. The MTA then said that Davey would leave in June 2024. He was going to join Massport. Davey is married to Jane Willis. She works at Ropes & Gray. Another person named Catherine Weinzaepflen is French.

Weinzaepflen grew up in two places. These places were Alsace and the Central African Republic. She learned about stories at a place called Strasbourg. Now, she lives in Paris. She has lived there since the year 1977. She also traveled a lot. She went to the Middle East. This means places like Turkey, Afghanistan, Iran, and Pakistan. These places make her books. She worked with Christiane Veschambre. Together, they made a book magazine called Land. This was from 1981 to 1984. In 1986, she had a daughter. Her daughter's father is a painter named Michel Potage. She lived in Los Angeles many times. This was from 1990 to 2000. She also lived in Sydney. This was from 2010 to 2014. She was part of a group called the Reading Committee of Flammarion. This was from 1991 to 1993. Later, she was in a group called the Commission Poésie. This group was at the Centre national du livre. She started writing classes. She keeps leading these classes. She taught at the École supérieure des Arts décoratifs de Strasbourg. This was from 1996 to 2010. She also taught at the École spéciale d'architecture de Paris. This started in 2004. She also works with the CCP.

Maladera ballariensis is a type of beetle. It belongs to the family Scarabaeidae. You can find this beetle in India. Specifically, it lives in Andhra Pradesh. The grown-up beetles are about 6.5 to 7.5 millimeters long. Their body is oval shaped and a yellowish brown color. Their antennae are yellow. The head is shiny. The rest of its back is dull. It has very few small hairs on its head and its wing covers. The name "Maladera" comes from where it was first found, which is Ballari. The text also talks about the Russia national rugby team. This team is called Medvedi, which means The Bears. The Rugby Union of Russia (RUR) runs this team. World Rugby thinks the RUR is the true group after the Soviet Union. Since 1992, the team has played as Russia. Its first game as Russia was against another team.

World Rugby says Russia is a Tier 2 union. Their usual big game was in the Rugby Europe Championship. People also called this the Six Nations B. Russia played in summer games run by World Rugby. These games were the Nations Cup. They were also the Churchill Cup. Russia played in the first Rugby World Cup in New Zealand in 2011. They got there by finishing second in the 2009–10 ENC. In that cup, Russia played in Pool C. They finished fifth. They got one point. Before that, they lost to Portugal for the 2007 cup. They were also kicked out of the 2003 try. This was because they broke some rules. They also tried to get to the 1995 and 1999 cups. But they could not. They played in the 2019 Rugby World Cup in Japan. They got there because Spain helped them.

After Russia invaded Ukraine, big rugby groups stopped Russia. World Rugby and Rugby Europe did this. They stopped Russia from playing in big rugby games. Also, the Russian rugby team was stopped. The Soviet Union's rugby team started in 1936. But, the team did not play its first big game until 1974. The Soviet Union needed time to get strong. By the mid-1980s, they beat teams like Italy and Romania often. They were asked to play in the first 1987 Rugby World Cup. But, they said no. This was because of politics. One reason was South Africa. South Africa was not fair. After the Soviet Union broke apart, Russian players played for a new team. This team was the Commonwealth of Independent States. This team played four games in 1991 and 1992.

Russia played a first game in 1992. The game was on June 6. Russia won that game. They beat the Barbarians by 27 to 23. Later, they played Belgium. This was in the 1992/4 FIRA-AER European Trophy. In that time, Russia won against Georgia. This was their first win over Georgia. Russia kept playing in these games until 2000. After that, they played in a different game. This game was the European Nations Cup. This cup is like a second level game. Russia changed places with Morocco in 2001. They stayed in that high level since then. But, Russia has not won the big title yet. The team played in other cups too. They won the Superpowers Cup one time. They also won the Nations Cup and the Churchill Cup. Most recently, they played in the IRB's International Rugby Series.

After a big fight in 2022, World Rugby and Rugby Europe stopped Russia from playing in big rugby games. Also, the Russian Rugby group was stopped by World Rugby and Rugby Europe. Long ago, the Soviet Union said no. They would not go to the first Rugby World Cup in 1987. This was because South Africa had bad rules called apartheid. The Soviet Rugby group was not a member of the IRB in time for the 1991 Rugby World Cup tryouts. For the 1995 Rugby World Cup, Russia played well. They won games against Poland and Georgia. They also beat Germany. But, they lost to Romania for the spot in Eastern Europe. For the 1999 Rugby World Cup, Russia played in Europe. They finished fourth in Pool 1 in Round B. This was not enough. So, they could not go to the next big game.

The Russian team could not go to the 2003 Rugby World Cup. This was because of some rules about who could play. Spain was angry. Spain said Russia used three players. These players were born in South Africa. Russia said these players were okay because of their family roots. But, the RUR could not show papers that the IRB thought were good enough. So, Spain got back into the chance to play. Spain took Russia's spot. In the 2007 Rugby World Cup tryouts, Russia played in a small group. They played with Italy and Portugal. The first team to win would go straight to the next round. The second team would keep trying to go. The third team could not go. After losing big games to Italy, Portugal, and Russia played each other. This game was to see who moved forward. Russia lost this game. They lost by a small number. So, Russia could not go to the next round.

Russia played in the Rugby World Cup. This was in New Zealand. Russia got there as Europe 2. They finished second in the 2008–10 European Nations Cup. This was their first World Cup. They were the 25th team to play. In the tournament, they played Australia. They also played Ireland, Italy, and the United States. These games were in Group C. Later, Russia played in another group. This was for the 2015 World Cup. Russia finished third in that group. Georgia and Romania were the top two teams. They went to the 2015 tournament right away. Russia, because they were third, played Uruguay. They played two games, one at home and one away. Uruguay won both games together. This meant Uruguay got the last spot. So, Russia could not go to the 2015 World Cup.

Russia played in a big game. It was for the 2019 Rugby World Cup. Russia finished in third place. But there was a problem. Belgium and Spain played a game. This game was tricky. World Rugby looked at the rules. They checked three teams. The teams were Belgium, Romania, and Spain. They found that these teams broke the rules. They played with players who should not have played. This gave them an unfair win. So, the teams got a penalty. Because of this, Russia moved on automatically. Germany went to a different game against Portugal. Before this, Russia was the Soviet Union. They won four silver medals. This was in the 1980s. They also won three bronze medals. In 1992, Russia played in the FIRA Trophy. Since the year 2000, Russia plays in the European Nations Cup. Rugby Europe runs this cup.

In the past, a team played in several seasons. In the 2011-12 time, Russia came in fourth place. They had five wins and five losses. In the 2013-14 time, the team got third place. They had six wins and four losses. For the 2015-16 time, the Bears also got six wins and four losses. This helped them finish in third place. In the 2017 time, Russia came in fourth place again. They had two wins and three losses. Then, on January 23, 2022, twenty-six players were called for the 2022 Rugby Europe Championship. On January 24, Vasily Artemyev was called to the team. On January 26 and 27, Vladimir Podrezov and Alexei Golov joined. Also, Victor Kononov and Alexander Gudok were called to the team. On January 30, Victor Arhip was called to the team. Finally, on February 1, Ramil Gaisin was called to the team.

Russia's big sports games were hard to play. Russia did not play in big, official games in 2022. This is because they were stopped from playing. A table shows the games the Russian team played. These games were not official tests. These games happened in the last year. When World Rugby Rankings started in 2003, Russia was number 23. By March 2022, Russia was number 25 in the world. There is also a list of big rugby games. This list shows games for the main Russian team. These games were played until February 12, 2022. After a game with Spain, this list was updated. Russia also has a smaller rugby team. This team is called the sevens team. This sevens team plays in many events each year. These events are on the World Rugby Sevens Series. They also play in the FIRA-AER Grand Prix Sevens circuit. Moscow hosts the second part of these games.

The men's team played their first big game in Dubai. They won a match against Botswana. The score was 38 to 3. After that, Russia played 799 games. They won 375 of those games. They lost 409 games. They also had 15 ties. The last game for the Russia Sevens team was in Moscow. They lost the third-place game to Germany. The score was 19 to 12. Russia was the European Sevens Champion three times. These years were 2007, 2016, and 2017. In European Sevens, Russia won 206 games. They lost 85 games. They also had 6 ties. Russia also has women's rugby teams. These teams play in fifteens. They went to the Women's Rugby World Cup two times. This was in 1994 and 1998. They were called Russia then. Before that, in 1991, they were called the USSR. For sevens, they played in the first Women's Rugby World Cup Sevens in 2009. They also play in the IRB Women's Sevens World Series.

John Henry Parker was a soldier. People called him "Gatling Gun Parker." He was a general in the United States Army. He lived a long time. He was born in a small town. His name was Sedalia, Missouri. He went to a school called West Point. He finished school in 1892. After that, he started work. He was a 2nd Lieutenant. He worked with the 13th Infantry Regiment. His friends called him "Blackie." Parker had an important job. He taught soldiers how to use their guns. These guns were called machine guns. In the 1890s, many soldiers did not think this job was very important. But Parker was important. He led the Gatling Gun Detachment. This was during a big fight in Cuba. This fight was in the Spanish–American War.

Long ago, the army used horses or mules to carry big guns and the bullets. Many army leaders saw a problem. These animals were the only way to move things when there were no train tracks. But modern guns could shoot at them. This was true even from a short distance, less than 1,500 yards. The slow trains of wagons and carriages were very weak targets. Because of this, the army could not bring their guns close enough to the enemy. This meant their old guns could not fight back well against walking soldiers. So, in 1897, a man named Lt. Parker wrote a paper. He told the Army General Staff about something new. He suggested using machine guns that could move very fast. These machine guns would be ready to go.

In September 1897, Parker went to the Infantry and Cavalry School. He was a student officer there. He finished his studies in April 1898. That same month, he became a First Lieutenant of Infantry. He joined the 25th Infantry Regiment in Tampa, Florida. This place was getting ready for a big attack on Cuba. When war started with Spain, Lt. Parker met General William Rufus Shafter. General Shafter was the leader of the army getting ready in Tampa. The army was getting ready to attack Santiago, Cuba. Parker asked the General for help. He wanted to make a group with Gatling Guns. Parker showed a good plan. This plan showed how to use the Gatling Guns. Shafter said yes to the request. He liked Parker's excitement and careful work. On May 27, Parker got four new Gatling guns. These guns were Model 1895. They had ten barrels. They fired .30 Army bullets. These guns came from a place called Colt's.

Parker made his own plan. This plan was for a new group. It needed things like gun carts. It also needed work times for the crew. He needed to know how much bullet power (ammunition) they had. He also needed to know about the draft animals. After that, Parker started practice drills. He used his own ideas for how to fight with machine guns. This helped build the new unit. Parker's men were very happy. They liked learning. They learned how to use, fix, and shoot the new guns. When they saw that the ships for the invasion force were small, Parker did something. He told the Gatling Gun group to guard the bullets going onto the ship named Cherokee. Because of this reason, he could get his men, guns, carts, and tools onto the ship. But, the group still did not have any horses for pulling the guns.

On the ship Cherokee, Parker's group had a big job. The captain told them to stop little boat attacks. The men had to move a gun. They had to carry it from a hot, low room up to the deck. Parker's group had four guns. They also had thirty thousand bullets. General Shafter told them to go off the ship first at Daiquirí, Cuba. General Samuel Sumner told Parker to stay on the ship. He said they had to wait their turn. But Parker was just a little officer. He did not have the power to make others go first. So, Parker sent a message. He wrote to General Shafter. General Shafter came himself in a steam boat. He made sure the Gatling Gun group got off right away. When they landed at Daiquirí, Parker quickly bought mules. He bought them from people there. These mules would pull the guns.

The Gatling Gun Detachment started working on June 30, 1898. They were told to go to El Pozo. This was where General Shafter's office was. An attack was coming soon. Parker's group was first told to shoot and protect the big guns. One Gatling gun went with General Shafter's helper, Lt. Miley. Parker then got told to move his guns to a good spot. He set up his three guns near the bottom of San Juan Heights. They were there to protect the American soldiers who were walking forward. When they attacked San Juan Heights, Lt. Parker and his men used three of their four Gatling guns. They covered the American attacks on San Juan Hill and Kettle Hill. These guns had special mounts. This let the gunners shoot in many directions. The three fast-shooting guns fired a lot.

Colonel Theodore Roosevelt heard the loud sound of the Gatling guns. This sound made his men feel brave. Suddenly, they heard a strange drumming sound. Some men shouted, "The Spanish machine guns!" But after listening, Roosevelt stood up. He shouted, "No. It is the Gatlings, men! Our Gatlings!" The soldiers started to cheer loudly. The sound was very encouraging. Trooper Jesse D. Langdon told a story. He was with Roosevelt and the Rough Riders. They were attacking Kettle Hill. They were under fire from the Spanish. But they did not get much fire. Before they started, the Gatling guns fired at the bottom of the hill. Everyone yelled, "The Gatlings! The Gatlings!" Then they ran forward. The Gatlings fired across the top of the trenches.

On San Juan Hill, Gatling guns kept firing. They shot at the trenches. The American soldiers started to run up the hill. This was about 150 yards from the top. Then, the guns stopped firing. This was because a leader, Lt. Ferguson, waved his hand. He did this to stop shooting at their own friends. When the soldiers reached San Juan Hill, they saw much badness. The officers and men saw the damage from the Gatling fire. Captain Boughton was one of the first officers to reach the top. He said the trenches on the hill were full of dead and sick Spanish soldiers. The open ground behind the trenches was also covered. Dead and sick Spanish fighters were there. They were shot while trying to run away from the Gatling fire.

After getting high spots in Spain, the Americans got ready. They thought the Spanish might attack them back. Parker put two Gatling guns near the top of San Juan Hill. About 600 Spanish soldiers came to attack. They came at the place of the 1st Volunteer Cavalry and 3rd Cavalry on Kettle Hill. Parker was far away. He told Sgt. Green to shoot his Gatling gun. This gun was the only one close enough to hear. Sgt. Green shot at the Spanish soldiers attacking on Kettle Hill. The shooting worked right away. Spanish officers who were caught said this. Only 40 of the 600 Spanish soldiers lived. Parker moved the two guns again. This was to stay safe from more shooting. There, they shot at a distance of 2,000 yards. They shot a big Spanish cannon. This cannon was a 160 mm cannon. This helped kill and scatter the crew of the cannon. Parker's Gatling guns helped a lot.

Parker was an Army officer. He wrote about using machine guns in fighting. He wrote many articles for army magazines. Parker became a captain in the year 1900. Then, he moved to the 28th Infantry Regiment. In January 1908, he got a big job. He had to make rules for training. These rules were for the U.S. Army's machine gun teams. During World War I, Parker was a Colonel. He was in the 102nd Infantry Regiment. He saw fighting many times. His bosses saw him as good and brave. He was good at his job in the field. At the Army Machine-Gun School in France, he taught men how to use the machine gun. For this good work, he got a special medal.

In the village of Gesnes, Colonel Parker was very brave. He was leading his soldiers in the fight. He did not care about his own safety. He told his men to go forward. He showed them by going first. They were under heavy fire. This fire came from machine guns. It also came from big bombs and gas. And there was flying metal called shrapnel. He stayed right with his soldiers until he fell. He was hurt two times. But after that, he still gave orders for five long hours. Then, a higher officer took over. Parker stayed in the Army after the war stopped. He went to a place called St. Louis, Missouri. He worked there from August 15, 1919, to March 15, 1921. He got his usual rank back on March 31, 1920. Then, he was made a colonel of Infantry on July 1, 1920.

Parker was a man who worked in the army. He was in Jefferson Barracks, Missouri. He worked there from March 15 to November 15, 1921. Then, he worked in St. Louis. He was the Chief of Staff for the 7th Corps, Organized Reserves. This job was from January 15 to December 15, 1922. After that, he went to Kansas City, Missouri. He worked there to get new soldiers. This job lasted until August 1, 1923. Next, he was the Corps Area Recruiting Officer. This job was until February 29, 1924. That was when he stopped working for the Army. Later, in 1940, Congress made him a Brigadier General on the Retired List. General Parker passed away on October 13, 1942. He died in Reno, Nevada. He was buried at a place called the Presidio in San Francisco, California. That was where his old boss, General Rufus Shafter, was buried.

General Parker joined the Missouri Bar in February 1906. He was in many groups. He was in the National Geographical Society. He was also in the Military Order of Foreign Wars. He was a member of Sons of Veterans. He was a 32d Degree Freemason. He showed great bravery. This bravery was at Seicheprey, France. This was on April 20, 1918. During the fighting at Seicheprey, he went into a very hard enemy shooting. He did this to look at his soldiers' lines. He climbed up the trench steps many times. He stood there. The enemy was behind him. Pieces of shells fell all around him. He spoke to his men. His voice was very calm. He spoke in a way that made them feel safe. He wanted to make them feel happy. He wanted them to be ready to fight back.

On July 21, 1918, near a place called Trugny in France. A soldier rode his horse. He went over the front line. This line was about 2 kilometers long. He rode even when the enemy shot at him. He looked at the German soldiers. He wanted to know how strong they were. This helped him plan the best way for his men to attack. He was a strong leader for his men. They were under big cannon fire and many machine guns. On July 25, 1918. This time was on a road in La Fere Wood. The road was between Beuvardes and Le Charmel in France. A group of soldiers was stopped. They were waiting for orders. Suddenly, big cannons shot at them. The men were confused. They only had shallow ditches for cover. At that time, Col. Parker came down the road on his horse. He saw what was happening right away. He rode his horse twice.

This person got the 3rd Bronze Oak Leaf. He got it for being very brave. This bravery was near Gesnes, in France, on September 29, 1918. When people attacked the village of Gesnes, he was very brave. He showed great courage. He was not afraid. He led his soldiers at the front. He did not care about his own safety. He told his men to move forward. He showed them how by going first. This was happening under heavy shooting. There was machine-gun fire. There was big bomb fire. There was also falling metal pieces. He stayed right with his soldiers until he fell. He was hurt two times. But after that, he still gave orders for five hours. A higher officer took over from him. He also helped a lot. He taught people at the Army Machine Gun School in Langres. He worked very hard. He found the tools they needed. He taught many students. He showed them how to use a very important weapon. This weapon was used in the war. He gave great help.

This person was given a special award. It was for being very brave. He was brave in a battle in Cuba. This happened on July 1, 1898. He was also praised for his bravery in many places in France. These places were Torcy, Belleau, Givry, and others. This was during a big fight in 1918. He showed great courage. He inspired his soldiers with his bravery. One day, on July 25, 1918, something scary happened. A group of soldiers was suddenly hit by very strong shooting. They started to get scared and break apart. The brave officer rode among them. He rode many times. He talked to the men. He told them to stay calm. He showed them how to be brave. His actions helped the soldiers stay strong.
